c0871a82-2bf7-5151-9ed5-559555302c93.name: Amphibious
c0871a82-2bf7-5151-9ed5-559555302c93.description: The aboleth can breathe air and water.

attributes.description: The aboleth can breathe air and water.

5d5b3ab0-405e-52df-adb7-3991a58894fe.name: Innate Spellcasting
5d5b3ab0-405e-52df-adb7-3991a58894fe.description:
The aboleths spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 16). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no components:
- **3/Day Each:** Detect Thoughts (range 120 ft), Project Image (range 1 mile), Phantasmal Force

attributes.description:
The aboleths spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 16). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no components:

9553295f-eb41-51e5-aa88-f71272dec2d1.name: Baleful Charm
9553295f-eb41-51e5-aa88-f71272dec2d1.description: The aboleth targets one creature within 60 feet that has contracted Sea Change. The target makes a DC 16 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, it is magically charmed by the aboleth until the aboleth dies. The target can repeat this saving throw every 24 hours and when it takes damage from the aboleth or the aboleths allies. While charmed in this way, the target can communicate telepathically with the aboleth over any distance and it follows the aboleths orders.

attributes.description: The aboleth targets one creature within 60 feet that has contracted Sea Change. The target makes a DC 16 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, it is magically charmed by the aboleth until the aboleth dies. The target can repeat this saving throw every 24 hours and when it takes damage from the aboleth or the aboleths allies. While charmed in this way, the target can communicate telepathically with the aboleth over any distance and it follows the aboleths orders.

5ff9f1ce-48cb-588b-a3dd-a5f3eb63de14.name: Move
5ff9f1ce-48cb-588b-a3dd-a5f3eb63de14.description: The aboleth moves up to its swim speed without provoking opportunity attacks.

attributes.description: The aboleth moves up to its swim speed without provoking opportunity attacks.

d8dfda99-ea16-551e-b251-9e99a4ac0376.name: Multiattack
d8dfda99-ea16-551e-b251-9e99a4ac0376.description: The aboleth attacks three times with its tentacle.

attributes.description: The aboleth attacks three times with its tentacle.

49d8bfd1-611f-53a7-8888-32ead03de51a.name: Slimy Cloud
49d8bfd1-611f-53a7-8888-32ead03de51a.description: While underwater  the aboleth exudes a cloud of inky slime in a 30-foot-radius sphere. Each non-aboleth creature in the area when the cloud appears makes a DC 16 Constitution saving throw. On a failure  it takes 44 (8d10) poison damage and is poisoned for 1 minute. The slime extends around corners  and the area is heavily obscured for 1 minute or until a strong current dissipates the cloud.

attributes.description: While underwater  the aboleth exudes a cloud of inky slime in a 30-foot-radius sphere. Each non-aboleth creature in the area when the cloud appears makes a DC 16 Constitution saving throw. On a failure  it takes 44 (8d10) poison damage and is poisoned for 1 minute. The slime extends around corners  and the area is heavily obscured for 1 minute or until a strong current dissipates the cloud.

83c9ac2e-6d29-5ccf-a321-3a44ed30f3b5.name: Soul Drain
83c9ac2e-6d29-5ccf-a321-3a44ed30f3b5.description: One creature charmed by the aboleth takes 22 (4d10) psychic damage, and the aboleth regains hit points equal to the damage dealt.

attributes.description: One creature charmed by the aboleth takes 22 (4d10) psychic damage, and the aboleth regains hit points equal to the damage dealt.

a13c8b5b-ffa8-552e-8587-b6fb7d84b44e.name: Telepathic Summon
a13c8b5b-ffa8-552e-8587-b6fb7d84b44e.description: One creature within 90 feet makes a DC 16 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, it must use its reaction, if available, to move up to its speed toward the aboleth by the most direct route that avoids hazards, not avoiding opportunity attacks. This is a magical charm effect.

attributes.description: One creature within 90 feet makes a DC 16 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, it must use its reaction, if available, to move up to its speed toward the aboleth by the most direct route that avoids hazards, not avoiding opportunity attacks. This is a magical charm effect.

30ac6e90-bcba-5fd9-8238-10fa9873bbea.name: Tentacle
30ac6e90-bcba-5fd9-8238-10fa9873bbea.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 19 (4d6 + 5) bludgeoning damage. The aboleth can choose instead to deal 0 damage. If the target is a creature  it makes a DC 16 Constitution saving throw. On a failure  it contracts a disease called the Sea Change. On a success  it is immune to this disease for 24 hours. While affected by this disease  the target has disadvantage on Wisdom saving throws. After 1 hour  the target grows gills  it can breathe water  its skin becomes slimy  and it begins to suffocate if it goes 12 hours without being immersed in water for at least 1 hour. This disease can be removed with a disease-removing spell cast with at least a 4th-level spell slot  and it ends 24 hours after the aboleth dies.

1acb32e4-201e-5601-8b0d-9d8311b8855e.name: Sea Changed
1acb32e4-201e-5601-8b0d-9d8311b8855e.description: The aboleth thrall can breathe water and air, but must bathe in water for 1 hour for every 12 hours it spends dry or it begins to suffocate. It is magically charmed by the aboleth.

attributes.description: The aboleth thrall can breathe water and air, but must bathe in water for 1 hour for every 12 hours it spends dry or it begins to suffocate. It is magically charmed by the aboleth.

b661828f-b7e5-5ba0-8cff-e95502f8387d.name: Poison Ink Knife
b661828f-b7e5-5ba0-8cff-e95502f8387d.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) slashing damage plus 10 (3d6) poison damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) slashing damage plus 10 (3d6) poison damage.

3f1e56d8-77a3-5019-a6b3-292e535a3f67.name: Self-Sacrifice
3f1e56d8-77a3-5019-a6b3-292e535a3f67.description: When a creature within 5 feet of the thrall that the thrall can see hits an aboleth with an attack, the thrall can make itself the target of the attack instead.

attributes.description: When a creature within 5 feet of the thrall that the thrall can see hits an aboleth with an attack, the thrall can make itself the target of the attack instead.

673ac314-5966-5d93-9a8d-87ba4e3047e5.name: Camouflage
673ac314-5966-5d93-9a8d-87ba4e3047e5.description: The yeti has advantage on Stealth checks made to hide in snowy terrain.

attributes.description: The yeti has advantage on Stealth checks made to hide in snowy terrain.

daaf77f7-4b1a-53ff-8fc6-7d5cb5e35e99.name: Fire Fear
daaf77f7-4b1a-53ff-8fc6-7d5cb5e35e99.description: When the yeti takes fire damage, it is rattled until the end of its next turn.

attributes.description: When the yeti takes fire damage, it is rattled until the end of its next turn.

012b3f87-94c0-5a88-90b8-f0ffde0f4d19.name: Storm Sight
012b3f87-94c0-5a88-90b8-f0ffde0f4d19.description: The yetis vision is not obscured by weather conditions.

attributes.description: The yetis vision is not obscured by weather conditions.

8ad63b92-3550-575e-bcc6-8570250d319f.name: Chilling Gaze (Gaze)
8ad63b92-3550-575e-bcc6-8570250d319f.description: One creature within 30 feet that is not immune to cold damage makes a DC 13 Constitution saving throw. On a failure  the creature takes 10 (3d6) cold damage and is paralyzed for 1 minute. It repeats the saving throw at the end of each of its turns  ending the effect on a success. If a creatures saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it  it is immune to any Chilling Gaze for 24 hours.

attributes.description: One creature within 30 feet that is not immune to cold damage makes a DC 13 Constitution saving throw. On a failure  the creature takes 10 (3d6) cold damage and is paralyzed for 1 minute. It repeats the saving throw at the end of each of its turns  ending the effect on a success. If a creatures saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it  it is immune to any Chilling Gaze for 24 hours.

4707e2ff-01b3-5b3f-a741-33f2f6ba4dcc.name: Claw
4707e2ff-01b3-5b3f-a741-33f2f6ba4dcc.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (2d4 + 4) slashing damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (2d4 + 4) slashing damage.

29b765ca-0394-5c84-a816-e1e2ddebd202.name: Multiattack (Abominable Snowman)
29b765ca-0394-5c84-a816-e1e2ddebd202.description: The yeti uses Chilling Gaze and makes two claw attacks.

attributes.description: The yeti uses Chilling Gaze and makes two claw attacks.

2b570a2c-acc0-5811-b8ef-55836b4646b2.name: Amphibious (Accursed Guardian Naga)
2b570a2c-acc0-5811-b8ef-55836b4646b2.description: The naga can breathe air and water.

attributes.description: The naga can breathe air and water.

b31c5f33-98ef-5bae-bf9b-3a79c3355475.name: Forbiddance
b31c5f33-98ef-5bae-bf9b-3a79c3355475.description: The nagas lair is under the forbiddance spell. Until it is dispelled, creatures in the lair can't teleport or use planar travel. Fiends and undead that are not the nagas allies take 27 (5d10) radiant damage when they enter or start their turn in the lair.

attributes.description: The nagas lair is under the forbiddance spell. Until it is dispelled, creatures in the lair can't teleport or use planar travel. Fiends and undead that are not the nagas allies take 27 (5d10) radiant damage when they enter or start their turn in the lair.

e1358a41-cd6b-5951-9628-05dd406fbe3d.name: Magic Resistance
e1358a41-cd6b-5951-9628-05dd406fbe3d.description: The naga has advantage on saving throws against spells and magical effects.

attributes.description: The naga has advantage on saving throws against spells and magical effects.

47b2bfa6-e6ed-50cf-a666-0cb0246e8281.name: Spellcasting
47b2bfa6-e6ed-50cf-a666-0cb0246e8281.description:
The naga is an 11th level spellcaster. Its spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 16). The Naga has the following cleric spells prepared which it can cast with only vocalized components:

- **Cantrips** (at will): Mending, Thaumaturgy
- **1st-Level** (4 slots): Command, Cure Wounds, False Life
- **2nd-Level** (3 slots): Calm Emotions, Hold Person, Locate Object
- **3rd-Level** (3 slots): Clairvoyance, Create Food and Water
- **4th-Level** (3 slots): Divination, Freedom of Movement
- **5th-Level** (2 slots): Flame Strike, Geas, Scrying
- **6th-Level** (1 slot): Forbiddance

17c0e756-d9d9-5c03-943d-d3549a979053.name: Bite
17c0e756-d9d9-5c03-943d-d3549a979053.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) piercing damage. The target makes a DC 15 Constitution saving throw  taking 35 (10d6) poison damage on a failure or half damage on a success.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) piercing damage. The target makes a DC 15 Constitution saving throw  taking 35 (10d6) poison damage on a failure or half damage on a success.

28e14adb-6eec-5c78-89c7-6e056dcefa36.name: Command
28e14adb-6eec-5c78-89c7-6e056dcefa36.description: (1st-Level; V) One living creature within 60 feet that the naga can see and that can hear and understand it makes a DC 16 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure  the target uses its next turn to move as far from the naga as possible  avoiding hazardous terrain.

attributes.description: (1st-Level; V) One living creature within 60 feet that the naga can see and that can hear and understand it makes a DC 16 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure  the target uses its next turn to move as far from the naga as possible  avoiding hazardous terrain.

de09e7dd-07f6-5d7f-b789-134185c40ad3.name: Flame Strike
de09e7dd-07f6-5d7f-b789-134185c40ad3.description: (5th-Level; V) A column of divine flame fills a 10-foot-radius  40-foot-high cylinder within 60 feet. Creatures in the area make a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw  taking 14 (4d6) fire damage and 14 (4d6) radiant damage on a failure or half damage on a success.

attributes.description: (5th-Level; V) A column of divine flame fills a 10-foot-radius  40-foot-high cylinder within 60 feet. Creatures in the area make a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw  taking 14 (4d6) fire damage and 14 (4d6) radiant damage on a failure or half damage on a success.

8c72a80e-5ebd-51a2-9953-f6cf4e1131c6.name: Hold Person
8c72a80e-5ebd-51a2-9953-f6cf4e1131c6.description: (2nd-Level; V, Concentration) One humanoid the naga can see within 60 feet makes a DC 16 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure  the target is paralyzed for 1 minute. It repeats the saving throw at the end of each of its turns  ending the effect on a success.

55e742cb-407c-5263-92eb-86c706531877.name: Multiattack (Accursed Guardian Naga)
55e742cb-407c-5263-92eb-86c706531877.description: The naga casts a spell and uses its vampiric bite.

attributes.description: The naga casts a spell and uses its vampiric bite.

7a7d5d43-d91d-5c98-8efe-c3e49afcd6ff.name: Shapeshift
7a7d5d43-d91d-5c98-8efe-c3e49afcd6ff.description: The naga changes its form to that of a specific Medium humanoid, a Medium snake-human hybrid with the lower body of a snake, or its true form, which is a Large snake. While shapeshifted, its statistics are unchanged except for its size. It reverts to its true form if it dies.

bd30615e-5987-5d2c-bd06-035ae6eff90a.name: Spit Poison
bd30615e-5987-5d2c-bd06-035ae6eff90a.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, range 20/60 ft., one creature. Hit: The target makes a DC 15 Constitution saving throw  taking 35 (10d6) poison damage on a failure or half damage on a success.

7de796b3-b8ab-548a-a188-538199b0a1d4.name: Vampiric Bite
7de796b3-b8ab-548a-a188-538199b0a1d4.description: The naga attacks with its bite. If it hits and the target fails its saving throw against poison  the naga magically gains temporary hit points equal to the poison damage dealt.

attributes.description: The naga attacks with its bite. If it hits and the target fails its saving throw against poison  the naga magically gains temporary hit points equal to the poison damage dealt.

abc8dd76-585a-54fb-97f2-87fa4898c5cc.name: Bite (Accursed Spirit Naga)
abc8dd76-585a-54fb-97f2-87fa4898c5cc.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) piercing damage. The target makes a DC 15 Constitution saving throw  taking 28 (8d6) poison damage on a failure or half damage on a success.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) piercing damage. The target makes a DC 15 Constitution saving throw  taking 28 (8d6) poison damage on a failure or half damage on a success.

6de4f209-cd1d-522d-af93-a52edaec56b7.name: Blight
6de4f209-cd1d-522d-af93-a52edaec56b7.description: (4th-Level; V, Concentration) The naga targets a living creature or plant within 30 feet  draining moisture and vitality from it. The target makes a DC 14 Constitution saving throw  taking 36 (8d8) necrotic damage on a failure or half damage on a success. Plant creatures have disadvantage on their saving throw and take maximum damage. A nonmagical plant dies.

attributes.description: (4th-Level; V, Concentration) The naga targets a living creature or plant within 30 feet  draining moisture and vitality from it. The target makes a DC 14 Constitution saving throw  taking 36 (8d8) necrotic damage on a failure or half damage on a success. Plant creatures have disadvantage on their saving throw and take maximum damage. A nonmagical plant dies.

ce2b2f15-44f4-565c-a3f7-f9dc99fe6e1d.name: Hypnotic Pattern
ce2b2f15-44f4-565c-a3f7-f9dc99fe6e1d.description: (3rd-Level; V, Concentration) A swirling pattern of light appears at a point within 120 feet of the naga. Each creature within 10 feet of the pattern that can see it makes a DC 14 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure  the creature is charmed for 1 minute. While charmed  the creature is incapacitated and its Speed is 0. The effect ends on a creature if it takes damage or if another creature uses an action to shake it out of its daze.

attributes.description: (3rd-Level; V, Concentration) A swirling pattern of light appears at a point within 120 feet of the naga. Each creature within 10 feet of the pattern that can see it makes a DC 14 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure  the creature is charmed for 1 minute. While charmed  the creature is incapacitated and its Speed is 0. The effect ends on a creature if it takes damage or if another creature uses an action to shake it out of its daze.

6f974b2e-8f24-5fa3-9023-087b21a1095c.name: Lightning Bolt
6f974b2e-8f24-5fa3-9023-087b21a1095c.description: (3rd-Level; V) A bolt of lightning 5 feet wide and 100 feet long arcs from the naga. Each creature in the area makes a DC 14 Dexterity saving throw  taking 28 (8d6) lightning damage on a failure or half damage on a success.

attributes.description: (3rd-Level; V) A bolt of lightning 5 feet wide and 100 feet long arcs from the naga. Each creature in the area makes a DC 14 Dexterity saving throw  taking 28 (8d6) lightning damage on a failure or half damage on a success.

cb139314-9694-5b8e-852f-1e1013916927.name: Shield
cb139314-9694-5b8e-852f-1e1013916927.description: (1st-Level; V) When the naga is hit by an attack or targeted by magic missile, it gains a +5 bonus to AC (including against the triggering attack) and immunity to magic missile. These benefits last until the beginning of its next turn.

attributes.description: (1st-Level; V) When the naga is hit by an attack or targeted by magic missile, it gains a +5 bonus to AC (including against the triggering attack) and immunity to magic missile. These benefits last until the beginning of its next turn.

95798f4a-bc05-5e0d-9fa5-20b287de96a8.name: Spellcasting (Acolyte)
95798f4a-bc05-5e0d-9fa5-20b287de96a8.description:
The acolyte is a 2nd level spellcaster. Their spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 12 +4to hit with spell attacks). They have the following cleric spells prepared:

- **Cantrips** (at will): Light, Sacred Flame, Thaumaturgy
- **1st-Level** (3 slots): Bless, Cure Wounds, Sanctuary

ffa4a9fd-c992-5023-b483-4c9b7ced21bc.name: Bless
ffa4a9fd-c992-5023-b483-4c9b7ced21bc.description: (1st-Level; V, S, M, Concentration) Up to three creatures within 30 feet add a d4 to attack rolls and saving throws for 1 minute.

attributes.description: (1st-Level; V, S, M, Concentration) Up to three creatures within 30 feet add a d4 to attack rolls and saving throws for 1 minute.

a5c5f740-af71-5dd4-8933-dfcec93b9afb.name: Club
a5c5f740-af71-5dd4-8933-dfcec93b9afb.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 2 (1d4) bludgeoning damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 2 (1d4) bludgeoning damage.

e90ba5e9-ce1f-5c6e-9967-96d8a697883e.name: Cure Wounds
e90ba5e9-ce1f-5c6e-9967-96d8a697883e.description: (1st-Level; V, S) The acolyte touches a willing living creature  restoring 6 (1d8 + 2) hit points to it.

attributes.description: (1st-Level; V, S) The acolyte touches a willing living creature  restoring 6 (1d8 + 2) hit points to it.

b4eebc95-9cb1-5571-8dc8-368bf0928401.name: Sacred Flame
b4eebc95-9cb1-5571-8dc8-368bf0928401.description: (Cantrip; V, S) One creature the acolyte can see within 60 feet makes a DC 12 Dexterity saving throw  taking 4 (1d8) radiant damage on a failure. This spell ignores cover.

attributes.description: (Cantrip; V, S) One creature the acolyte can see within 60 feet makes a DC 12 Dexterity saving throw  taking 4 (1d8) radiant damage on a failure. This spell ignores cover.

9c5d1551-cdc0-5f75-a28c-b9f26a7db4f6.name: Far Thoughts
9c5d1551-cdc0-5f75-a28c-b9f26a7db4f6.description: The dragon is aware of any creature that uses a psionic ability or communicates telepathically within 100 miles of it. As an action, the dragon can psionically observe a creature, object, or location it is familiar with within 100 miles. While observing a subject in this way, the dragon can see, hear, and communicate telepathically, but it is blind and deaf in regard to its physical senses and does not require food or water. The dragon can psionically observe a subject indefinitely and can end this effect and return to its own senses as an action.

The dragon can psionically observe a subject indefinitely and can end this effect and return to its own senses as an action.

bfc9e437-556f-5d6c-935d-5bc284c59c81.name: Innate Spellcasting (Adult Amethyst Dragon)
bfc9e437-556f-5d6c-935d-5bc284c59c81.description:
The dragons spellcasting ability is Charisma (save DC 19). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components.
- **3/Day Each:** Calm Emotions, Charm Person, Mass Suggestion, Modify Memory

attributes.description:

db68afa4-cc19-5754-8874-4d77f0311e6f.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
db68afa4-cc19-5754-8874-4d77f0311e6f.description: When the dragon fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead. When it does, its scales dull briefly, and it can't use telepathy or psionic abilities until the end of its next turn.

attributes.description: When the dragon fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead. When it does, its scales dull briefly, and it can't use telepathy or psionic abilities until the end of its next turn.

79928aae-9b6d-51fa-9233-3d751017e048.name: Psionic Powers
79928aae-9b6d-51fa-9233-3d751017e048.description: The dragons psionic abilities are considered both magical and psionic.

attributes.description: The dragons psionic abilities are considered both magical and psionic.

82e2d6ba-0a96-544e-914a-1050f874a7bc.name: Assume Control
82e2d6ba-0a96-544e-914a-1050f874a7bc.description: When a creature charmed by the dragon begins its turn, the dragon telepathically commands the charmed creature until the end of the creatures turn. If the dragon commands the creature to take an action that would harm itself or an ally, the creature makes a DC 19 Wisdom saving throw. On a success, the creatures turn immediately ends.

78486c34-d6d1-5c2b-83ab-b239844cdc54.name: Bite (Adult Amethyst Dragon)
78486c34-d6d1-5c2b-83ab-b239844cdc54.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 20 (3d10 + 4) piercing damage plus 4 (1d8) force damage.

585abb82-0da3-5d01-acbc-3fe499dd2489.name: Captivating Harmonics
585abb82-0da3-5d01-acbc-3fe499dd2489.description: Each creature of the dragons choice within 90 feet makes a DC 16 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, it becomes psionically charmed by the dragon for 1 minute. A creature repeats the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

attributes.description: Each creature of the dragons choice within 90 feet makes a DC 16 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, it becomes psionically charmed by the dragon for 1 minute. A creature repeats the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

0e40f681-13d2-5960-8a34-9a3df5fd6294.name: Charm
0e40f681-13d2-5960-8a34-9a3df5fd6294.description: The dragon targets a creature within 60 feet, forcing it to make a DC 16 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, the creature is charmed by the dragon for 24 hours, regarding it as a trusted friend to be heeded and protected. Although it isnt under the dragons control, it takes the dragons requests or actions in the most favorable way it can. At the end of each of the targets turns and at the end of any turn during which the dragon or its companions harmed the target, it repeats the saving throw, ending the effect on a success.

9da3764a-72bd-52d2-b53d-a4110ab85ee7.description: The dragon psionically unleashes telekinetic energy in a 60-foot cone. Each creature in that area makes a DC 18 Constitution saving throw  taking 60 (11d10) force damage on a failed save or half damage on a success.

fc42f6c2-38ea-5114-8458-95cc77d400a6.description: The dragon targets a creature within 60 feet. If the target is concentrating on a spell, it must make a DC 19 Constitution saving throw or lose concentration.

a448c1e0-db32-5c98-a7ba-69e295b6d94a.name: Ambusher
a448c1e0-db32-5c98-a7ba-69e295b6d94a.description: When submerged in water, the dragon has advantage on Stealth checks. If the dragon hits a creature that can't see it with its bite, it can deal piercing damage and grapple the target simultaneously.

3efa78a9-bc68-58a3-a588-360a0d80236e.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day) (Adult Black Dragon)
3efa78a9-bc68-58a3-a588-360a0d80236e.description: When the dragon fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead. When it does, it sheds some of its scales, which turn to mud. If it has no more uses of this ability, its Armor Class is reduced to 17 until it finishes a long rest.

b79ea260-6155-56ad-a06a-9d97d4b88a50.description: After scoring a critical hit on its turn, the dragon can immediately make one claw attack.

2dd53abd-dd5a-5554-95e9-898b001098c1.name: Acid Breath
2dd53abd-dd5a-5554-95e9-898b001098c1.description: The dragon exhales sizzling acid in a 60-foot-long  5-foot-wide line. Each creature in that area makes a DC 19 Dexterity saving throw  taking 63 (14d8) acid damage on a failed save or half damage on a success. A creature that fails the save is blinded until the end of its next turn.

a0af7b2b-79c7-53f0-9b06-cbb8a6bd1d31.name: Acid Spit
a0af7b2b-79c7-53f0-9b06-cbb8a6bd1d31.description: The dragon targets a creature within 60 feet  forcing it to make a DC 19 Dexterity saving throw. The creature takes 22 (4d10) acid damage on a failure or half damage on a success. A creature that fails the save also takes 5 (1d10) ongoing acid damage. A creature can use an action to end the ongoing damage.

7594d55c-add7-5e09-9387-5120bf442c26.name: Bite (Adult Black Dragon)
7594d55c-add7-5e09-9387-5120bf442c26.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 22 (3d10 + 6) piercing damage plus 4 (1d8) acid damage. Instead of dealing piercing damage  the dragon can grapple the target (escape DC 20)  and a Large or smaller creature grappled in this way is restrained. While grappling a creature  the dragon can't bite or use Acid Spit against another target.

6370e256-f23d-52c2-858a-73b1a8f67099.description: The dragon evaluates one creature it can see within 60 feet. 0cc44dbd-d493-5fa0-9058-363cc352263b.name: Change Shape
0cc44dbd-d493-5fa0-9058-363cc352263b.description: The dragon magically takes the shape of a humanoid or beast or changes back into its true form. It reverts to its true form if it dies. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying is absorbed or borne by the new form (dragons choice). In the new form  the dragons stats are unchanged except for its size. It can't use Molten Spit  Breath Weapons  Tail Attack  or Wing Attack except in dragon form. In beast form  it can attack only with its bite and claws  if appropriate to its form. If the beast form is Large or smaller  the reach of these attacks is reduced to 5 feet. In humanoid form  it can attack only with its staff.

When it succeeds on a saving throw or the effect ends for it, it is immune to Roar for 24 hours.

999ba4f7-ed1b-5476-8be0-24aa636dd43e.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day) (Adult Bronze Dragon)
999ba4f7-ed1b-5476-8be0-24aa636dd43e.description: When the dragon fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead. When it does, some of its scales fall away and turn to sea foam. If it has no more uses of this ability, its Armor Class is reduced to 16 until it finishes a long rest.

bea94783-e113-5176-b3d5-268bdcfeeb61.name: Oracle of the Coast
bea94783-e113-5176-b3d5-268bdcfeeb61.description: The dragon can accurately predict the weather up to 7 days in advance and is never considered surprised while conscious. Additionally, by submerging itself in a body of water and spending 1 minute in concentration, it can cast Scrying, requiring no components. The Scrying orb appears in a space in the same body of water.

93f88360-140b-5536-8eeb-c606409eeb5c.name: Change Shape (Adult Bronze Dragon)
93f88360-140b-5536-8eeb-c606409eeb5c.description: The dragon magically takes the shape of a humanoid or beast  or changes back into its true form. It reverts to its true form if it dies. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying is absorbed or borne by the new form (dragons choice). In the new form  the dragons stats are unchanged except for its size. It can't use Lightning Pulse  Breath Weapons  Tail Attack  or Wing Attack except in dragon form. In beast form  it can attack only with its bite and claws  if appropriate to its form. If the beast form is Large or smaller  the reach of these attacks is reduced to 5 feet. In humanoid form  it can attack only with its trident.

3f0a14d3-699d-5b6c-b633-ea400e13f538.description: The dragon magically teleports to an unoccupied space it can see within 30 feet and creates two illusory duplicates in different unoccupied spaces within 30 feet. These duplicates have an AC of 11, and a creature that hits one with an attack can make a DC 16 Intelligence (Investigation) check, identifying it as a fake on a success. The duplicates disappear at the end of the dragons next turn but otherwise mimic the dragons actions perfectly, even moving according to the dragons will.

6be69200-f413-5cd7-828c-76cd01fcc053.description: The dragon can burrow through nonmagical, unworked earth and stone without disturbing it.

364ccacd-75e2-57b9-bc1b-b4b26f698cff.name: Essence Link
364ccacd-75e2-57b9-bc1b-b4b26f698cff.description: The essence dragon is spiritually linked to a specific area or landmark. The dragon gains no benefit from a long rest when more than 1 mile away from its linked area. If the dragon dies, the area it is linked to loses its vital essence until it forms a new essence dragon, which can take centuries. When a creature first enters an area that has lost its vital essence in this way, they gain a level of fatigue and a level of strife. This fatigue and strife can be removed only by completing a long rest outside the area.

80f48acd-2f0b-5b75-80dc-ae977ef561d7.name: Entomb
80f48acd-2f0b-5b75-80dc-ae977ef561d7.description: The dragon targets a creature on the ground within 60 feet, forcing it to make a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, the creature is magically entombed 5 feet under the earth. While entombed, the target is blinded, restrained, and can't breathe. A creature can use an action to make a DC 15 Strength check, freeing an entombed creature on a success.

674f0faa-9449-50e6-b75c-17555ac5001f.name: Rock Spire
674f0faa-9449-50e6-b75c-17555ac5001f.description: A permanent  25-foot-tall  5-foot-radius spire of rock magically rises from a point on the ground within 60 feet. A creature in the spires area when it appears makes a DC 19 Dexterity saving throw  taking 13 (3d8) piercing damage on a failure or half damage on a success. A creature that fails this saving throw by 10 or more is impaled at the top of the spire. A creature can use an action to make a DC 12 Strength check  freeing the implaced creature on a success. The impaled creature is also freed if the spire is destroyed. The spire is an object with AC 16  30 hit points and immunity to poison and psychic damage.

30510784-c25e-5c54-a89d-618490b4d14d.name: Shake the Foundation
30510784-c25e-5c54-a89d-618490b4d14d.description: The dragon causes the ground to roil, creating a permanent, 40-foot-radius area of difficult terrain centered on a point the dragon can see. If the dragon is bloodied, creatures in the area make a DC 20 Dexterity saving throw, falling prone on a failure.

43cef13b-3957-5cff-87ff-f599584a6c27.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day) (Adult Emerald Dragon)
43cef13b-3957-5cff-87ff-f599584a6c27.description: When the dragon fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead. When it does, its eyes flash red as it goes into a fit of rage. Until the end of its next turn, it makes melee attacks against the creature that triggered the saving throw with advantage and with disadvantage against all other creatures.

a1c6b5ca-48ef-54a8-aec9-9148c0cdcde1.name: Bite (Adult Emerald Dragon)

5e89689d-d914-5e86-9125-79f4548b44ad.name: Maddening Breath
5e89689d-d914-5e86-9125-79f4548b44ad.description: The dragon screams  stripping flesh from bones and reason from minds in a 60-foot cone. Each creature in that area makes a DC 18 Constitution saving throw  taking 71 (13d10) thunder damage on a failed save or half damage on a success. Creatures that fail this saving throw by 10 or more are also psionically confused until the end of their next turn.

93e0ab49-bcd6-53ea-923c-3246cac50050.name: Maddening Harmonics
93e0ab49-bcd6-53ea-923c-3246cac50050.description: Each creature of the dragons choice that can hear within 90 feet makes a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, a creature becomes psionically confused for 1 minute. A creature repeats the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

66ecfd8d-6e83-59b6-929b-f1095da21842.name: Pandorum
66ecfd8d-6e83-59b6-929b-f1095da21842.description: The dragon psionically targets one creature within 60 feet. The target makes a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw, becoming confused on a failure. While confused in this way, the target regards their allies as traitorous enemies. When rolling to determine its actions, treat a roll of 1 to 4 as a result of 8. The target repeats the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on a success.

d14e28df-0e84-507e-ae31-a675062dcec1.name: Paranoid Ranting
d14e28df-0e84-507e-ae31-a675062dcec1.description: The dragon psionically rants nonsense at a creature that can hear it within 60 feet. The target makes a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, the creature gains a randomly determined short-term mental stress effect or madness.

101c87e8-8d49-58e3-a082-c6e312bc90f0.name: Spiteful Retort
101c87e8-8d49-58e3-a082-c6e312bc90f0.description: When a creature the dragon can see damages the dragon, the dragon lashes out with a psionic screech. 389a7220-0ea7-52cf-b932-d8f2883e50ed.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day) (Adult Gold Dragon)
389a7220-0ea7-52cf-b932-d8f2883e50ed.description: When the dragon fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead. When it does, some of its scales melt away, forming pools of molten gold. If it has no more uses of this ability, its Armor Class is reduced to 17 until it finishes a long rest.

ffa46fe5-d035-5bb5-b01b-2b470b244262.name: Valor
ffa46fe5-d035-5bb5-b01b-2b470b244262.description: Creatures of the dragons choice within 30 feet gain a +2 bonus to saving throws and are immune to the charmed and frightened conditions.

7a14d261-a745-5ae7-9522-2141654b51d7.name: Bite (Adult Gold Dragon)
7a14d261-a745-5ae7-9522-2141654b51d7.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +18 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 32 (4d10 + 10) piercing damage plus 9 (2d8) fire damage.

fbe136cb-bb7d-53ae-8236-29659f63c244.name: Change Shape (Adult Gold Dragon)
fbe136cb-bb7d-53ae-8236-29659f63c244.description: The dragon magically takes the shape of a humanoid or beast  or changes back into its true form. It reverts to its true form if it dies. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying is absorbed or borne by the new form (dragons choice). In the new form  the dragons stats are unchanged except for its size. It can't use Molten Spit  Breath Weapons  Tail Attack  or Wing Attack except in dragon form. In beast form  it can attack only with its bite and claws  if appropriate to its form. If the beast form is Large or smaller  the reach of these attacks is reduced to 5 feet. In humanoid form  it can attack only with its greatsword.

1c555e79-900c-55a0-9566-3f7eb476ac06.name: Molten Breath (Adult Gold Dragon)
1c555e79-900c-55a0-9566-3f7eb476ac06.description: The dragon exhales molten gold in a 90-foot cone. Each creature in the area makes a DC 25 Dexterity saving throw  taking 88 (16d10) fire damage on a failed save or half damage on a success. A creature that fails the saving throw is covered in a shell of rapidly cooling gold  reducing its Speed to 0. A creature can use an action to break the shell  ending the effect.

c0374f11-9ed8-5a70-9212-1b42a627e808.name: Molten Spit (Adult Gold Dragon)
c0374f11-9ed8-5a70-9212-1b42a627e808.description: The dragon targets one creature within 60 feet  forcing it to make a DC 25 Dexterity saving throw. The creature takes 27 (5d10) fire damage on a failure or half on a success. Liquid gold pools in a 5-foot-square occupied by the creature and remains hot for 1 minute. A creature that ends its turn in the gold or enters it for the first time on a turn takes 22 (4d10) fire damage.

20171e83-97ab-5bbb-b9a3-7e43b8b99f41.name: Roar (Adult Gold Dragon)
20171e83-97ab-5bbb-b9a3-7e43b8b99f41.description: Each creature of the dragons choice within 120 feet that can hear it makes a DC 25 Charisma saving throw. On a failure, it is frightened for 1 minute. A creature repeats the saving throw at the end of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. When it succeeds on a saving throw or the effect ends for it, it is immune to Roar for 24 hours.

4e62e5a9-6061-5387-823b-75ef6b16f2d3.name: River Surge
4e62e5a9-6061-5387-823b-75ef6b16f2d3.description: The dragon generates a 20-foot-tall, 100-foot-wide wave on the surface of water within 90 feet. The wave travels up to 45 feet in any direction the dragon chooses and crashes down, carrying Huge or smaller creatures and vehicles with it. Vehicles moved in this way have a 25 percent chance of capsizing and creatures that impact a solid object take 21 (6d6) bludgeoning damage.

1e4beec2-687f-501d-8461-2634752848a1.name: Snap Back
1e4beec2-687f-501d-8461-2634752848a1.description: When a creature the dragon can see hits it with a melee weapon attack, the dragon makes a bite attack against the attacker.

0cf581fc-1966-53a0-b754-d8a0985c6d3c.name: Sudden Maelstrom
0cf581fc-1966-53a0-b754-d8a0985c6d3c.description: The dragon magically surrounds itself with a 60-foot-radius maelstrom of surging wind and rain for 1 minute. A creature other than the dragon that starts its turn in the maelstrom or enters it for the first time on a turn makes a DC 18 Strength saving throw. On a failed save, the creature is knocked prone and pushed 15 feet away from the dragon.

d4e4a0a0-e46c-57ea-9996-da0d6e0f08ed.name: Torrential Breath
d4e4a0a0-e46c-57ea-9996-da0d6e0f08ed.description: The dragon exhales water in a 60-foot-long  5-foot-wide line. Each creature in the area makes a DC 18 Dexterity saving throw  taking 56 (16d6) bludgeoning damage on a failed save or half damage on a success. A creature that fails the save is also knocked prone and is pushed up to 30 feet away. A creature that impacts a solid object takes an extra 10 (3d6) bludgeoning damage.

c0cbf7d7-c80b-5e99-9820-98055aa31b12.name: Whirlpool
c0cbf7d7-c80b-5e99-9820-98055aa31b12.description: A cylindrical, 15-foot-tall, 10-foot-radius whirlpool or waterspout magically appears in the water or air, centered on a point within 60 feet. Creatures in the area make a DC 18 Strength saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 17 (5d6) bludgeoning damage and is knocked prone and pushed up to 15 feet. On a failure, a creature takes half damage.

- **3/Day Each:**comprehend languages, Detect Thoughts, Telekinesis, wall of force

159e5426-a52d-584b-b067-6a749c4cdea6.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day) (Adult Sapphire Dragon)
159e5426-a52d-584b-b067-6a749c4cdea6.description: When the dragon fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead. When it does, its eyes dull as it briefly loses its connection to the future. Until the end of its next turn, it can't use Foretell, Prognosticate, or Prophesy Doom, and it loses its Predictive Harmonics trait.

9839b19a-43a9-509e-81e1-95ef5fe17b98.name: Predictive Harmonics
9839b19a-43a9-509e-81e1-95ef5fe17b98.description: The dragon is psionically aware of its own immediate future. The dragon cannot be surprised, and any time the dragon would make a roll with disadvantage, it makes that roll normally instead.

a0d2260a-b08d-505a-aa62-6f5e92a8623c.name: Bite (Adult Sapphire Dragon)
a0d2260a-b08d-505a-aa62-6f5e92a8623c.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 22 (3d10 + 6) piercing damage plus 4 (1d8) psychic damage.

2301d8ca-7ee4-5a66-95f4-b4ac4dc25ad4.name: Discognitive Breath
2301d8ca-7ee4-5a66-95f4-b4ac4dc25ad4.description: The dragon unleashes psychic energy in a 60-foot cone. Each creature in that area makes a DC 18 Intelligence saving throw  taking 60 (11d10) psychic damage and 11 (2d10) ongoing psychic damage on a failed save or half as much psychic damage and no ongoing psychic damage on a success. The ongoing damage ends if a creature falls unconscious. A creature can also use an action to ground itself in reality  ending the ongoing damage.

Each creature in that area makes a DC 18 Intelligence saving throw  taking 60 (11d10) psychic damage and 11 (2d10) ongoing psychic damage on a failed save or half as much psychic damage and no ongoing psychic damage on a success. The ongoing damage ends if a creature falls unconscious. A creature can also use an action to ground itself in reality  ending the ongoing damage.

282c81c0-0855-56f3-b797-5522c04f2baf.name: Foretell
282c81c0-0855-56f3-b797-5522c04f2baf.description: The dragon psionically catches a glimpse of a fast-approaching moment and plans accordingly. The dragon rolls a d20 and records the number rolled. Until the end of the dragons next turn, the dragon can replace the result of any d20 rolled by it or a creature within 120 feet with the foretold number. Each foretold roll can be used only once.

6ef0857a-ac51-5c37-8e34-0adc6541ff65.name: Prognosticate
6ef0857a-ac51-5c37-8e34-0adc6541ff65.description: The dragon psionically makes a prediction of an event up to 100 years in the future. This prediction has a 67 percent chance of being perfectly accurate and a 33 percent chance of being partially or wholly wrong. Alternatively  the dragon can choose to gain truesight to a range of 90 feet for 1 minute.

23412d3f-49b2-5477-9e47-686cdd214b93.name: Shatter Mind
23412d3f-49b2-5477-9e47-686cdd214b93.description: The dragon targets a creature within 60 feet, forcing it to make a DC 23 Intelligence saving throw. On a failure, the creature takes 22 (4d10) ongoing psychic damage. An affected creature repeats the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the ongoing psychic damage on a success. A creature can also use an action to ground itself in reality, ending the ongoing damage.

8d70d73d-43bd-569a-87f2-ce78036bb12f.description: Each creature of the dragons choice within 120 feet and aware of it must succeed on a DC 16 Wisdom saving throw or gain a level of strife. Once a creature has passed or failed this saving throw, it is immune to the dragons Corrupting Presence for the next 24 hours.

81c85b56-0b40-5181-a32a-91a7026a0e19.name: Grasp of Shadows
81c85b56-0b40-5181-a32a-91a7026a0e19.description: The dragon targets a creature within 60 feet  forcing it to make a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure  it is grappled by tendrils of shadow (escape DC 20) and restrained while grappled this way. The effect ends if the dragon is incapacitated or uses this ability again.

3288ef24-c395-55f4-a6de-8d34f81d8de1.description: A creature that can hear the dragon makes a DC 21 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, the creature takes 13 (3d8) psychic damage, and the dragon regains the same number of hit points.

eb3e0f5c-1e85-5eb9-bfc4-74f652371ce1.name: Lurk (Adult Shadow Dragon)
eb3e0f5c-1e85-5eb9-bfc4-74f652371ce1.description: If the dragon is in dim light or darkness, it magically becomes invisible until it attacks, causes a creature to make a saving throw, or enters an area of bright light. It can't use this ability if it has taken radiant damage since the end of its last turn.

e47fbc63-a36c-549c-895b-e1131222d619.name: Multiattack (Adult Shadow Dragon)
e47fbc63-a36c-549c-895b-e1131222d619.description: The dragon uses Grasp of Shadows  then attacks once with its bite and twice with its claws.

012dcb28-493b-51de-a9bc-46ae00cd576b.name: Slip Through Shadows
012dcb28-493b-51de-a9bc-46ae00cd576b.description: If the dragon is in dim light or darkness, it magically teleports up to 45 feet to an unoccupied space that is also in dim light or darkness. The dragon can't use this ability if it has taken radiant damage since the end of its last turn.

bce46daa-d0b3-5b2b-a9ce-d89d790b2e0a.name: Cloud Strider
bce46daa-d0b3-5b2b-a9ce-d89d790b2e0a.description: The dragon suffers no harmful effects from high altitudes. When flying at high altitude, the dragon can, after 1 minute of concentration, discorporate into clouds. In this form, it has advantage on Stealth checks, its fly speed increases to 300 feet, it is immune to all nonmagical damage, it has resistance to magical damage, and it can't take any actions except Hide. If it takes damage or descends more than 500 feet from where it transformed, it immediately returns to its corporeal form. It can revert to its true form as an action.

b62524aa-9e6f-54ca-ae11-7c0e010fc605.description: When the dragon fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead. When it does, some of its scales dissipate into clouds. If it has no more uses of this ability, its Armor Class is reduced to 17 until it finishes a long rest.

4df4998e-7521-5c46-a39b-686a3b2751cd.name: Change Shape (Adult Silver Dragon)
4df4998e-7521-5c46-a39b-686a3b2751cd.description: The dragon magically takes the shape of a humanoid or beast  or changes back into its true form. It reverts to its true form if it dies. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying is absorbed or borne by the new form (dragons choice). In the new form  the dragons stats are unchanged except for its size. It can't use Spit Frost  Breath Weapons  Tail Attack  or Wing Attack except in dragon form. In beast form  it can attack only with its bite and claws  if appropriate to its form. If the beast form is Large or smaller  the reach of these attacks is reduced to 5 feet. In humanoid form  it can attack only with its rapier.

be4a6d99-b064-5930-aa25-78a224a72808.name: Windstorm
be4a6d99-b064-5930-aa25-78a224a72808.description: Pounding winds surround the dragon in a 20-foot radius. A creature in this area attempting to move closer to the dragon must spend 2 feet of movement for every 1 foot closer it moves, and ranged attacks against the dragon are made with disadvantage. A creature that starts its turn in the windstorm makes a DC 20 Constitution saving throw, taking 5 (1d10) cold damage on a failure. The windstorm lasts until the start of the dragons next turn.

d46a2eb4-5fff-5c27-aec0-86f223853864.name: Cold Mastery
d46a2eb4-5fff-5c27-aec0-86f223853864.description: The dragons movement and vision is not hindered by cold, icy surfaces, snow, wind, or storms. Additionally, the dragon can choose to burrow through snow and ice without leaving a trace.

d4b8dd30-6731-508e-8b62-c38abddced20.name: Innate Spellcasting (Adult White Dragon)
d4b8dd30-6731-508e-8b62-c38abddced20.description:
The dragons spellcasting ability is Charisma (save DC 15). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components.
- **3/Day Each:** Dominate Beast, Fire Shield, Animal Friendship, Sleet Storm

7eb95a2c-954a-5328-a23f-19bf72cc1361.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day) (Adult White Dragon)
7eb95a2c-954a-5328-a23f-19bf72cc1361.description: When the dragon fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead. When it does, it sheds some of its scales, which turn to ice. If it has no more uses of this ability, its Armor Class is reduced to 16 until it finishes a long rest.

33d4fe97-d3b5-57ca-826e-5b41b5244774.name: Bite (Adult White Dragon)
33d4fe97-d3b5-57ca-826e-5b41b5244774.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 22 (3d10 + 6) piercing damage plus 4 (1d8) cold damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 22 (3d10 + 6) piercing damage plus 4 (1d8) cold damage.

4b52b691-657b-5af1-922a-77ad8b0af5c6.name: Cold Breath
4b52b691-657b-5af1-922a-77ad8b0af5c6.description: The dragon exhales a 60-foot cone of frost. Each creature in the area makes a DC 19 Constitution saving throw. On a failure  it takes 52 (15d6) cold damage  and its speed is reduced to 0 until the end of its next turn. On a success  it takes half damage.

ef091f07-2a6b-5564-9a42-b37550022dfc.name: Multiattack (Adult White Dragon)
ef091f07-2a6b-5564-9a42-b37550022dfc.description: The dragon attacks once with its bite and twice with its claws. In place of its bite attack  it can spit ice.

a1a0c5de-f952-5961-88c3-e997ab2cda40.name: Raging Storm
a1a0c5de-f952-5961-88c3-e997ab2cda40.description: For 1 minute, gusts of sleet emanate from the dragon in a 40-foot-radius sphere, spreading around corners. The area is lightly obscured and the ground is difficult terrain The first time a creature moves on its turn while in the area, it must succeed on a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw or fall prone (or fall if it is flying).

3daefd9a-e26e-5937-b52e-74798657b2b2.name: Roar (Adult White Dragon)
3daefd9a-e26e-5937-b52e-74798657b2b2.description: Each creature of the dragons choice within 120 feet that can hear it makes a DC 15 Charisma saving throw. On a failure, it is frightened for 1 minute. A creature repeats the saving throw at the end of its turn, ending the effect on itself on a success. When it succeeds on a saving throw or the effect ends for it, it is immune to Roar for 24 hours.

ec3edf87-5b5b-56fb-837f-6b3278c47086.name: Spit Ice
ec3edf87-5b5b-56fb-837f-6b3278c47086.description: The dragon targets a creature within 60 feet  forcing it to make a DC 19 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure  the target takes 16 (3d10) cold damage  and its speed is reduced to 0 until the end of its next turn. On a success  it takes half damage.

a68b1102-405e-54a4-85af-b97258df91d5.name: Tail (Adult White Dragon)

ce298ff0-22f4-5896-a7c9-9709cb49cf0b.name: Air Form
ce298ff0-22f4-5896-a7c9-9709cb49cf0b.description: The elemental can enter and end its turn in other creatures spaces and pass through an opening as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

b9279b99-1f70-5423-a391-0daf5217b473.name: Elemental Nature
b9279b99-1f70-5423-a391-0daf5217b473.description: An elemental doesnt require air, sustenance, or sleep.

4e5ed37e-d685-5b03-91b3-027eeb9a0153.name: Multiattack (Air Elemental)
4e5ed37e-d685-5b03-91b3-027eeb9a0153.description: The elemental makes two slam attacks.

attributes.description: The elemental makes two slam attacks.

16dd7976-9877-5b90-814e-5814f09bfebf.name: Slam (Air Elemental)
16dd7976-9877-5b90-814e-5814f09bfebf.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (3d6 + 4) bludgeoning damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (3d6 + 4) bludgeoning damage.

7aea2dbd-f8bf-5db5-88fb-a0a407515447.name: Whirlwind
7aea2dbd-f8bf-5db5-88fb-a0a407515447.description: The elemental takes the form of a whirlwind  flies up to half of its fly speed without provoking opportunity attacks  and then resumes its normal form. When a creature shares its space with the whirlwind for the first time during this movement  that creature makes a DC 15 Strength saving throw. On a failure  the creature is carried inside the elementals space until the whirlwind ends  taking 3 (1d6) bludgeoning damage for each 10 feet it is carried  and falls prone at the end of the movement. The whirlwind can carry one Large creature or up to four Medium or smaller creatures.

cd73b228-5098-51f6-9fb3-9c034b6dd2c2.name: Divine Grace
cd73b228-5098-51f6-9fb3-9c034b6dd2c2.description: If the empyrean makes a saving throw against an effect that deals half damage on a success, it takes no damage on a success and half damage on a failure. Furthermore, while wearing medium armor, the empyrean adds its full Dexterity bonus to its Armor Class (already included).

75c89f90-756a-5d33-b99c-e815f331ee0d.name: Innate Spellcasting (Aklea)
75c89f90-756a-5d33-b99c-e815f331ee0d.description:
The empyreans innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 23). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

- **At Will:** Charm Person, Command, Telekinesis
- **3/Day**:  Flame Strike, Hold Monster, Lightning Bolt
- **1/Day:** Commune, Greater Restoration, Heroes Feast, Plane Shift (self only, can't travel to or from the Material Plane)

63dd0943-4c10-58fb-9b91-5c714b9a7e63.name: Flame Strike (Aklea)
63dd0943-4c10-58fb-9b91-5c714b9a7e63.description: (5th-Level; V, S) A column of divine flame fills a 10-foot-radius  40-foot-high cylinder within 60 feet. Creatures in the area make a DC 23 Dexterity saving throw  taking 14 (4d6) fire damage and 14 (4d6) radiant damage on a failure or half damage on a success.

ca323262-6418-5b02-9fa5-f46bf809747e.description: (5th-Level; V, S, Concentration) One creature the empyrean can see within 60 feet makes a DC 23 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure  the target is paralyzed for 1 minute. The target repeats the saving throw at the end of each of its turns  ending the effect on a success.

b79174e7-ce7a-517b-8746-fcd342cedcbd.description: The empyrean magically changes its size between Gargantuan and Medium. While Medium, the empyrean has disadvantage on Strength checks. Its statistics are otherwise unchanged.

2d0639cb-7327-51aa-8162-30001d4127c8.description: So long as the alchemist has the required components and equipment, they are able to craft potions of up to legendary rarity and other magic items of up to very rare rarity.

98b44de6-6f15-516f-a643-0ca8b47ba2ff.description: Each of the werewolfs claw and bite attacks deals an additional 7 (2d6) necrotic damage, and the targets hit point maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the necrotic damage taken. b785c086-04d8-5b1b-ba0d-32debc4d2893.description: The werewolf has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of the werewolfs allies is within 5 feet of the creature and not incapacitated.

b95f00f6-b516-5bcf-82de-fb7cedb98e4f.name: Wolfsbane
b95f00f6-b516-5bcf-82de-fb7cedb98e4f.description: Lycanthropes are repelled by the wolfsbane flower. A lycanthrope in hybrid or beast form is poisoned while within 10 feet of a living or dried wolfsbane flower that it can smell. If wolfsbane is applied to a weapon or ammunition, lycanthropes are damaged by the weapon as if it were silver. An application of wolfsbane lasts for 1 hour.

2253846d-f05a-5265-8b7d-fc831e9bec28.name: Elite Recovery
2253846d-f05a-5265-8b7d-fc831e9bec28.description: The aboleth ends one negative effect currently affecting it. It can use this action as long as it has at least 1 hit point, even while unconscious or incapacitated.

a294bec8-707d-50f7-8ee3-8ab0b95f8e44.name: Look Upon My Works
a294bec8-707d-50f7-8ee3-8ab0b95f8e44.description: Each creature within 90 feet makes a DC 16 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, the creature sees a fragmentary vision of the aboleths memories, taking 33 (6d10) psychic damage. After taking the damage, the creature forgets the vision, but it may learn one piece of lore.

ba3cc7cc-ad86-5574-8323-e22a2eefaba3.name: Lunging Attack
ba3cc7cc-ad86-5574-8323-e22a2eefaba3.description: The aboleth moves up to its swim speed without provoking opportunity attacks and makes a tentacle attack.

351f51da-25fa-564d-8f29-fd950741017c.name: Innate Spellcasting (Ancient Amethyst Dragon)
351f51da-25fa-564d-8f29-fd950741017c.description:
The dragons spellcasting ability is Charisma (save DC 22). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components.
- **3/Day Each:** Calm Emotions, Charm Person, Mass Suggestion, Modify Memory
- **1/Day:** Plane Shift, Project Image

64284aff-71ff-558a-9f2c-035a7f103b76.name: Assume Control (Ancient Amethyst Dragon)
64284aff-71ff-558a-9f2c-035a7f103b76.description: When a creature charmed by the dragon begins its turn, the dragon telepathically commands the charmed creature until the end of the creatures turn. If the dragon commands the creature to take an action that would harm itself or an ally, the creature makes a DC 22 Wisdom saving throw. On a success, the creatures turn immediately ends.

fc31b393-8ca9-57e5-b477-4bfa5aa30abe.name: Bite (Ancient Amethyst Dragon)
fc31b393-8ca9-57e5-b477-4bfa5aa30abe.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +13 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 28 (4d10 + 6) piercing damage plus 9 (2d8) force damage.

ee604f64-cf36-5732-8e8f-6d11d0e92f7f.name: Captivating Harmonics (Ancient Amethyst Dragon)
ee604f64-cf36-5732-8e8f-6d11d0e92f7f.description: Each creature of the dragons choice within 120 feet makes a DC 18 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, it becomes psionically charmed by the dragon for 1 minute. A creature repeats the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

66fccd42-b7a0-5746-801e-5a192ec2a37e.name: Charm (Ancient Amethyst Dragon)
66fccd42-b7a0-5746-801e-5a192ec2a37e.description: The dragon targets a creature within 60 feet, forcing it to make a DC 18 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, the creature is charmed by the dragon for 24 hours, regarding it as a trusted friend to be heeded and protected. Although it isnt under the dragons control, it takes the dragons requests or actions in the most favorable way it can. At the end of each of the targets turns and at the end of any turn during which the dragon or its companions harmed the target, it repeats the saving throw, ending the effect on a success.

- **3/Day Each:**Fog Cloud, Pass Without Trace, Legend Lore, Speak with Dead
- **1/Day Each:** Create Undead, insect plague

563f185a-e9fd-5cd2-8ba4-c811bc0669df.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day) (Ancient Black Dragon)
563f185a-e9fd-5cd2-8ba4-c811bc0669df.description: When the dragon fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead. When it does, it sheds some of its scales, which turn to mud. If it has no more uses of this ability, its Armor Class is reduced to 20 until it finishes a long rest.

d050830d-48cb-5dca-a938-92b0acf99d0f.name: Acid Breath (Ancient Black Dragon)
d050830d-48cb-5dca-a938-92b0acf99d0f.description: The dragon exhales sizzling acid in a 90-foot-long  10-foot-wide line. Each creature in that area makes a DC 22 Dexterity saving throw  taking 85 (19d8) acid damage on a failed save or half damage on a success. A creature that fails the save is blinded until the end of its next turn.

77642765-b5e9-5056-bdf2-335e949eaf10.description: The dragon targets a creature within 60 feet  forcing it to make a DC 22 Dexterity saving throw. The creature takes 22 (4d10) acid damage on a failure or half damage on a success. A creature that fails the save also takes 11 (2d10) ongoing acid damage. A creature can use an action to end the ongoing damage.

c4fc9701-bd67-510f-bce1-971102631b45.name: Bite (Ancient Black Dragon)
c4fc9701-bd67-510f-bce1-971102631b45.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +15 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 30 (4d10 + 8) piercing damage plus 9 (2d8) acid damage. Instead of dealing piercing damage  the dragon can grapple the target (escape DC 23)  and a Huge or smaller creature grappled in this way is restrained. While grappling a creature  the dragon can't bite or use Acid Spit against another target.

3b5ecc3f-6707-5539-845c-51d49e88f0ab.description: The dragon creates a 40-foot-radius sphere of magical darkness originating from a point it can see within 120 feet. Darkvision can't penetrate this darkness. The darkness lasts for 1 minute or until the dragon uses this action again.

5481e561-152d-586c-89a4-c72b23633d05.description: The dragon can remain submerged in sand and gravel for up to 4 hours. It has advantage on Stealth checks made to hide in this way, and Large or smaller creatures within 20 feet of its hiding place when it emerges must succeed on a DC 24 Dexterity saving throw or be blinded until the end of its next turn.

1c388581-9411-50cf-a373-2554caab41ea.name: Change Shape (Ancient Bronze Dragon)
1c388581-9411-50cf-a373-2554caab41ea.description: The dragon magically takes the shape of a humanoid or beast, or changes back into its true form. It reverts to its true form if it dies. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying is absorbed or borne by the new form (dragons choice). In the new form, the dragons stats are unchanged except for its size. It can't use Lightning Pulse, Breath Weapons, Tail Attack, or Wing Attack except in dragon form. In beast form, it can attack only with its bite and claws, if appropriate to its form. If the beast form is Large or smaller, the reach of these attacks is reduced to 5 feet. In humanoid form, it can attack only with its trident.

0f3137c8-b61a-524a-80d8-6a4f66c107ba.name: Claws (Ancient Bronze Dragon)
0f3137c8-b61a-524a-80d8-6a4f66c107ba.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +16 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 22 (3d8 + 9) slashing damage.

a2fc245c-fba9-512d-849e-af0b80963d69.name: Foresight (Ancient Bronze Dragon)
a2fc245c-fba9-512d-849e-af0b80963d69.description: The dragon focuses on the many sprawling futures before it and predicts what will come next. Until the start of its next turn, it gains advantage on saving throws, and attacks against it are made with disadvantage.

102d6d51-bc41-556b-8058-efcad33fc001.name: Lightning Breath (Ancient Bronze Dragon)
102d6d51-bc41-556b-8058-efcad33fc001.description: The dragon exhales lightning in a 120-foot-long  10-foot-wide line. Each creature in the area makes a DC 23 Dexterity saving throw  taking 93 (16d10) lightning damage on a failed save or half damage on a success. A creature that fails the saving throw can't take reactions until the end of its next turn.

4a00cfe8-83ff-520c-a49c-e9f1a5e4e6e8.name: Lightning Pulse (Ancient Bronze Dragon)
4a00cfe8-83ff-520c-a49c-e9f1a5e4e6e8.description: The dragon targets one creature within 60 feet  forcing it to make a DC 23 Dexterity saving throw. The creature takes 22 (4d10) lightning damage on a failure or half damage on a success. If the initial target is touching a body of water  all other creatures within 20 feet of it and touching the same body of water must also make the saving throw against this damage.

f4585509-bfbf-5ffd-8e07-5b431584e637.name: Ocean Surge (Ancient Bronze Dragon)
f4585509-bfbf-5ffd-8e07-5b431584e637.description: The dragon exhales a torrent of seawater in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in the area makes a DC 23 Strength saving throw. A creature that fails is pushed 40 feet away from the dragon and knocked prone  while one that succeeds is pushed only 20 feet away and isnt knocked prone.

1f896a72-1b0d-592d-b090-d68c6d08221d.name: Roar (Ancient Bronze Dragon)
1f896a72-1b0d-592d-b090-d68c6d08221d.description: Each creature of the dragons choice within 120 feet that can hear it makes a DC 20 Charisma saving throw. On a failure, it is frightened for 1 minute. A creature repeats the saving throw at the end of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. When it succeeds on a saving throw or the effect ends for it, it is immune to Roar for 24 hours.

8ab3128e-1fda-5463-b1db-467b7f515d35.name: Flow Within the Mountain (Ancient Copper Dragon)
8ab3128e-1fda-5463-b1db-467b7f515d35.description: The dragon has advantage on Stealth checks made to hide in mountainous regions. By spending 1 minute in concentration while touching a natural stone surface, the dragon can magically merge into it and emerge from any connected stone surface within a mile.

fe5d4819-c09d-5eff-90cd-d3ffb79c6cd4.name: Innate Spellcasting (Ancient Copper Dragon)

- **1/Day:** Irresistible Dance, Mass Suggestion

aaa0675d-af32-5538-9918-657a1bd0ad4e.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day) (Ancient Copper Dragon)
aaa0675d-af32-5538-9918-657a1bd0ad4e.description: When the dragon fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead. When it does, some of its scales fall away and turn to stone. If it has no more uses of this ability, its Armor Class is reduced to 19 until it finishes a long rest.

98aa97c1-0349-535e-8e56-4d680ad96154.name: Slowing Breath (Ancient Copper Dragon)
98aa97c1-0349-535e-8e56-4d680ad96154.description: The dragon exhales toxic gas in a 90-foot cone. Each creature in the area makes a DC 22 Constitution saving throw  becoming slowed for 1 minute on a failure. A creature repeats the saving throw at the end of each of its turns  ending the effect on itself on a success.

919d1512-010f-5e8e-8943-8f853049fe36.name: Tricksters Gambit (Ancient Copper Dragon)
919d1512-010f-5e8e-8943-8f853049fe36.description: The dragon magically teleports to an unoccupied space it can see within 30 feet and creates two illusory duplicates in different unoccupied spaces within 30 feet. These duplicates have an AC of 11, and a creature that hits one with an attack can make a DC 19 Intelligence (Investigation) check, identifying it as a fake on a success. The duplicates disappear at the end of the dragons next turn but otherwise mimic the dragons actions perfectly, even moving according to the dragons will.

- **1/Day:** earthquake, Move Earth

d8fe8103-d951-5032-bde1-2d40e6ecc936.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day) (Ancient Earth Dragon)
d8fe8103-d951-5032-bde1-2d40e6ecc936.description: When the dragon fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead. When it does, it becomes more like rock. Its Speed, burrow speed, and flying speed are halved until the end of its next turn.

f3f301f9-0f98-5623-9c46-edfd140b9947.name: Bite (Ancient Earth Dragon)
f3f301f9-0f98-5623-9c46-edfd140b9947.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +15 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 35 (5d10 + 8) piercing damage. Instead of dealing piercing damage  the dragon can grapple the target (escape DC 23)  and a Huge or smaller creature grappled in this way is restrained. While grappling a creature  the dragon can't bite another target.

96db49e6-4ef6-5abf-8d09-7e684354ab04.name: Entomb (Ancient Earth Dragon)
96db49e6-4ef6-5abf-8d09-7e684354ab04.description: The dragon targets a creature on the ground within 60 feet, forcing it to make a DC 17 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, the creature is magically entombed 5 feet under the earth. While entombed, the target is blinded, restrained, and can't breathe. A creature can use an action to make a DC 17 Strength check, freeing an entombed creature on a success.

9d6e6c8c-aefb-530b-906a-42faf3e267e8.name: Rock Spire (Ancient Earth Dragon)
9d6e6c8c-aefb-530b-906a-42faf3e267e8.description: A permanent  25-foot-tall  5-foot-radius spire of rock magically rises from a point on the ground within 60 feet. A creature in the spires area when it appears makes a DC 21 Dexterity saving throw  taking 18 (4d8) piercing damage on a failure or half damage on a success. A creature that fails this saving throw by 10 or more is impaled and restrained at the top of the spire. A creature can use an action to make a DC 13 Strength check  freeing the impaled creature on a success. The impaled creature is also freed if the spire is destroyed. The spire is an object with AC 16  30 hit points  and immunity to poison and psychic damage.

85d568e0-599f-52a4-99b2-42b9f3108801.description: The dragon exhales scouring sand and stones in a 90-foot cone. Each creature in that area makes a DC 23 Dexterity saving throw  taking 70 (20d6) slashing damage on a failed save or half damage on a success. A creature that fails the save is also blinded until the end of its next turn.

fe9158a2-51b6-550a-9b67-140cc55affe2.name: Shake the Foundation (Ancient Earth Dragon)
fe9158a2-51b6-550a-9b67-140cc55affe2.description: The dragon causes the ground to roil, creating a permanent, 40-foot-radius area of difficult terrain centered on a point the dragon can see. If the dragon is bloodied, creatures in the area make a DC 23 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, the creature takes 21 (6d6) slashing damage and falls prone. On a success, the creature takes half damage.

fee47957-8a8f-5552-8bed-f703a8811d2d.name: Slam (Ancient Earth Dragon)

c4aa6bbb-0e68-521b-b0f0-5d3fed948936.name: Blood Toxicity (While Bloodied)
c4aa6bbb-0e68-521b-b0f0-5d3fed948936.description: The first time each turn a creature hits the dragon with a melee attack while within 10 feet of it, that creature makes a DC 22 Dexterity saving throw, taking 10 (3d6) poison damage on a failure.

fa37a8c1-db3c-588d-859f-3372a8b2c917.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day) (Ancient Green Dragon)
fa37a8c1-db3c-588d-859f-3372a8b2c917.description: When the dragon fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead. When it does, it sheds some of its scales, which turn into dry leaves and blow away. If it has no more uses of this ability, its Armor Class is reduced to 19 until it finishes a long rest.

a909b020-9682-5258-ab3d-1d85e9e87213.name: Poison Breath (Ancient Green Dragon)
a909b020-9682-5258-ab3d-1d85e9e87213.description: The dragon exhales poisonous gas in a 90-foot cone. Each creature in that area makes a DC 22 Constitution saving throw  taking 80 (23d6) poison damage on a failed save or half damage on a success. A creature with immunity to poison damage that fails the save takes no damage  but its poison immunity is reduced to resistance for the next hour.

055bc434-ce2d-546f-b377-24c108bfd1be.name: Spit Poison (Ancient Green Dragon)
055bc434-ce2d-546f-b377-24c108bfd1be.description: The dragon targets a creature within 60 feet  forcing it to make a DC 22 Dexterity saving throw. The creature takes 22 (4d10) poison damage on a failure or half damage on a success. A creature that fails the save is also poisoned for 1 minute. The creature repeats the saving throw at the end of each of its turns  taking 11 (2d10) poison damage on a failure and ending the effect on a success.

cec144da-4e08-5a06-8937-34f1a7f7326b.description: A creature that touches the dragon or hits it with a melee attack for the first time on a turn takes 14 (4d6) fire damage.

2faa6d71-1703-508e-898b-1f5a2e2944e0.name: Fire Breath (Ancient Red Dragon)
2faa6d71-1703-508e-898b-1f5a2e2944e0.description: The dragon exhales a blast of fire in a 90-foot cone. Each creature in that area makes a DC 25 Dexterity saving throw  taking 98 (28d6) fire damage on a failed save or half damage on a success. A creature that fails the saving throw also takes 11 (2d10) ongoing fire damage. While affected by this ongoing damage  it is frightened of the dragon. A creature can use an action to end the ongoing damage.

80859dac-d40d-58cd-88a3-022ca9a6ede3.name: Roar (Ancient Red Dragon)
80859dac-d40d-58cd-88a3-022ca9a6ede3.description: Each creature of the dragons choice within 120 feet that can hear it makes a DC 22 Charisma saving throw. On a failure, it is frightened for 1 minute. A creature repeats the saving throw at the end of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. When it succeeds on a saving throw or the effect ends for it, it is immune to Roar for 24 hours.

4556af9a-ddf4-52c6-9dd9-3d3aa1729696.name: Taskmaster
4556af9a-ddf4-52c6-9dd9-3d3aa1729696.description: When a creature within 60 feet fails an ability check or saving throw, the dragon roars a command to it. The creature can roll a d10 and add it to the result of the roll, possibly turning the failure into a success.

6f336f6e-bb70-5641-9983-a0e5c6dfc96a.description: The dragon beats its wings. Each creature within 15 feet makes a DC 25 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, it is pushed 10 feet away and knocked prone. The dragon can then fly up to half its fly speed.

1626bf8f-5228-55a5-a735-b5c808945a22.name: River Surge (Ancient River Dragon)
1626bf8f-5228-55a5-a735-b5c808945a22.description: The dragon generates a 20-foot-tall, 100-foot-wide wave on the surface of water within 120 feet. The wave travels up to 60 feet in any direction the dragon chooses and crashes down, carrying Huge or smaller creatures and vehicles with it. Vehicles moved in this way have a 25 percent chance of capsizing. Creatures that impact a solid object take 35 (10d6) bludgeoning damage.

0b5fd497-57f4-5e28-b84d-2e5dee38b5ba.name: Sudden Maelstrom (Ancient River Dragon)
0b5fd497-57f4-5e28-b84d-2e5dee38b5ba.description: The dragon magically surrounds itself with a 60-foot-radius maelstrom of surging wind and rain for 1 minute. A creature other than the dragon that starts its turn in the maelstrom or enters it for the first time on a turn makes a DC 20 Strength saving throw. On a failed save, the creature takes 28 (8d6) bludgeoning damage and is knocked prone and pushed 15 feet away from the dragon.

f100709f-1849-5938-8fba-2ee61d89dd6b.description: The dragon exhales water in a 90-foot-long  10-foot-wide line. Each creature in the area makes a DC 20 Dexterity saving throw  taking 66 (19d6) bludgeoning damage on a failed save or half damage on a success. A creature that fails the save is also knocked prone and is pushed up to 60 feet away. A creature that impacts a solid object takes an extra 21 (6d6) bludgeoning damage.

1c0f536b-3336-5636-9e8d-aefbb654fb0c.description: A cylindrical, 15-foot-tall, 10-foot-radius whirlpool or waterspout magically appears in the water or air, centered on a point within 60 feet. On a failure, a creature takes half damage.

8faf1d1d-27e5-523f-9915-72a983a6e5c1.description: The dragon unleashes psychic energy in a 90-foot cone. Each creature in that area makes a DC 21 Intelligence saving throw  taking 66 (12d10) psychic damage and 22 (4d10) ongoing psychic damage on a failed save or half damage and no ongoing psychic damage on a success. The ongoing damage ends if a creature falls unconscious. A creature can use an action to ground itself in reality  ending the ongoing damage.

4f9c4c10-2127-59cf-9302-65bc31bb9797.name: Prognosticate (Ancient Sapphire Dragon)
4f9c4c10-2127-59cf-9302-65bc31bb9797.description: The dragon psionically makes a prediction of an event up to 300 years in the future. This prediction has a 75 percent chance of being perfectly accurate and a 25 percent chance of being partially or wholly wrong. Alternatively  the dragon can choose to gain truesight to a range of 120 feet for 1 minute.

1387a0fa-ae26-5797-ba37-fee67f2e6572.name: Prophesy Doom
1387a0fa-ae26-5797-ba37-fee67f2e6572.description: When a language-using creature suffering ongoing psychic damage targets the dragon with an attack or spell, the dragon telepathically prophesies the attackers doom. The attacker makes a DC 20 Intelligence saving throw. On a failure, the target magically gains the doomed condition. It is aware that it will die due to some bizarre circumstance within 13 (2d12) hours. In addition to the normal means of removing the condition, this doom can be avoided by a spell that can predict the future, such as augury, contact other plane, or foresight. The dragon can end the effect as an action.

e19a3609-930b-5e9a-b8b3-b9c749e60164.description: Each creature of the dragons choice within 120 feet and aware of it must succeed on a DC 18 Wisdom saving throw or gain a level of strife. On a failure  it is grappled by tendrils of shadow (escape DC 23) and restrained while grappled this way. The effect ends if the dragon is incapacitated or uses this ability again.

799097e3-b3cd-548b-aee7-12218473be51.description: A creature that can hear the dragon makes a DC 23 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, the creature takes 18 (4d8) psychic damage, and the dragon regains the same number of hit points.

528c3311-a3b6-57af-8fcb-ace835d48cc1.description: When a creature the dragon can see hits it with a melee weapon attack, the dragon makes a claw attack against the attacker.

0031d30b-c090-5e2f-bac4-c303b80a7504.name: Slip Through Shadows (Ancient Shadow Dragon)
0031d30b-c090-5e2f-bac4-c303b80a7504.description: If the dragon is in dim light or darkness, it magically teleports up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space that is also in dim light or darkness. The dragon can't use this ability if it has taken radiant damage since the end of its last turn.

600be22a-4d52-5c3f-bffb-32b20f6c9ffe.name: Cloud Strider (Ancient Silver Dragon)
600be22a-4d52-5c3f-bffb-32b20f6c9ffe.description: The dragon suffers no harmful effects from high altitudes. When flying at high altitude, the dragon can, after 1 minute of concentration, discorporate into clouds. In this form, it has advantage on Stealth checks, its fly speed increases to 300 feet, it is immune to all nonmagical damage, it has resistance to magical damage, and it can't take any actions except Hide. If it takes damage or descends more than 500 feet from where it transformed, it immediately returns to its corporeal form. The dragon can revert to its true form as an action.

befee362-ca62-5c02-8163-5e65142cb328.description: For 1 minute, gusts of sleet emanate from the dragon in a 40-foot-radius sphere, spreading around corners. The area is lightly obscured, the ground is difficult terrain, and nonmagical flames are extinguished. The first time a creature other than the dragon moves on its turn while in the area, it must succeed on a DC 18 Dexterity saving throw or take 11 (2d10) cold damage and fall prone (or fall if it is flying).

When it succeeds on a saving throw or the effect ends for it, it is immune to Roar for 24 hours.

52d65dea-5704-50eb-8cd1-c9bd80a293ff.name: Improved War Magic
52d65dea-5704-50eb-8cd1-c9bd80a293ff.description: When the blademaster uses an action to cast a spell, they can make one weapon attack.

419afda9-f398-509b-8f7e-8081b9928de7.name: Longsword
419afda9-f398-509b-8f7e-8081b9928de7.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (1d8 + 7) slashing damage.

dd71df1b-c61d-5844-bfc8-411ea1be97a8.name: Meteor Swarm
dd71df1b-c61d-5844-bfc8-411ea1be97a8.description: (9th-Level; V, S) Scorching 40-foot-radius spheres of flame strike the ground at 4 different points chosen by the blademaster within 1 mile. The effects of a sphere reach around corners. Creatures and objects in the area make a DC 19 Dexterity saving throw  taking 49 (14d6) fire damage and 49 (14d6) bludgeoning damage on a failure or half damage on a success. A creature in more than one area is affected only once. Flammable unattended objects catch fire.

07a357a0-6774-5f6d-abde-6ddadcaf0ba7.name: Misty Step
07a357a0-6774-5f6d-abde-6ddadcaf0ba7.description: (2nd-Level; V) The blademaster teleports to an unoccupied space they can see within 30 feet. The blademaster can't cast this spell and a 1st-level or higher spell on the same turn.

a088b84f-7830-543e-ba27-0677d7140670.name: Multiattack (Arcane Blademaster)
a088b84f-7830-543e-ba27-0677d7140670.description: The arcane blademaster attacks four times and casts a cantrip.

attributes.description: The arcane blademaster attacks four times and casts a cantrip.

880097d1-931f-5f53-bdf2-c991c17681b5.name: Power Word Stun
880097d1-931f-5f53-bdf2-c991c17681b5.description: (8th-Level; V) The blademaster utters a powerful word that stuns one creature that has 150 hit points or less and is within 60 feet (if it has more hit points  it is instead rattled until the end of its next turn). The creature repeats the saving throw at the end of each of its turns  ending the effect on a success.

0f0fe3de-c1b8-52a5-ac79-8ebf791bd220.name: Shocking Grasp
0f0fe3de-c1b8-52a5-ac79-8ebf791bd220.description: (Cantrip; V, S) Melee Spell Attack: +11 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 18 (4d8) lightning damage  and the target can't take reactions until the start of its next turn.
