be79f43b-c735-5a4b-b44d-727890bbfcdf.name: Teleport
be79f43b-c735-5a4b-b44d-727890bbfcdf.description: (7th-Level; V) The blademaster teleports to a location they are familiar with on the same plane of existence.

attributes.description: (7th-Level; V) The blademaster teleports to a location they are familiar with on the same plane of existence.

d3ba8007-bd69-5885-b235-cef2283b6886.name: Unholy Star
d3ba8007-bd69-5885-b235-cef2283b6886.description: (7th-Level; V, S) A meteor explodes at a point the blademaster can see 100 feet directly above them. Each creature within 120 feet that can see the meteor (other than the blademaster) makes a DC 19 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure  it is blinded until the end of the blademasters next turn. Four fiery chunks of the meteor then plummet to the ground at different points chosen by the blademaster that are within range  to explode in 5-foot-radius areas. Each creature in an area makes a DC 19 Dexterity saving throw  taking 21 (6d6) fire damage and 21 (6d6) necrotic damage on a failed save or half damage on a successful one. A creature in more than one area is affected only once. Flammable unattended objects catch fire.

7f81ff68-32e9-59c8-bd34-c81afe1a5a24.name: Faerie Form
7f81ff68-32e9-59c8-bd34-c81afe1a5a24.description: The archfey can magically change its size between Large, Medium, and Tiny as an action. While Tiny, the bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage dealt by the archfeys attacks is halved. Additionally, it has disadvantage on Strength checks and advantage on Dexterity checks. While Large, the archfey has advantage on Strength checks. Its statistics are otherwise unchanged.

287d1e80-e5d0-5066-ad4b-b18a8615ef8c.name: Faerie Light
287d1e80-e5d0-5066-ad4b-b18a8615ef8c.description: As a bonus action, the archfey can cast dim light for 30 feet, or extinguish its glow.

bbb34565-8511-5c74-946b-3380837fe579.name: Innate Spellcasting (Archfey)
bbb34565-8511-5c74-946b-3380837fe579.description:
The archfeys spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 17). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

- **At Will:** Animal Messenger, Detect Evil and Good, Detect Magic, Disguise Self
- **3/Day Each:** Charm Person, Scrying, Zone of Truth,
- **1/Day Each:** Dream, Geas, Heroes Feast, Magic Circle, Polymorph (self only)

On a failed saving throw  the archfey chooses one of the following effects to magically impose on the target. Each effect lasts for 1 minute.

8b96b3d1-436a-570d-a2f9-e047ee9b94cc.description: The archfey makes two glittering scimitar attacks.

c1abd17e-2564-51a1-992b-e510a0964d4b.description: When the archfey is hit by a melee attack made by a creature it can see, it makes a glittering scimitar attack against the attacker.

1b84a211-0d3e-5dbf-9956-c21bb62e71d9.name: Summon Midnight
1b84a211-0d3e-5dbf-9956-c21bb62e71d9.description: Night magically falls over a 5-mile-diameter area  lasting for 1 hour. As an action  the archfey can end this effect.

attributes.description: Night magically falls over a 5-mile-diameter area  lasting for 1 hour. As an action  the archfey can end this effect.

6cfd83d7-0d40-5f63-8558-fee0ed2ea83d.name: The target falls asleep
6cfd83d7-0d40-5f63-8558-fee0ed2ea83d.description: This effect ends if the target takes damage or another creature uses an action to rouse it.

de4391f0-1832-5f24-b70b-03d98f00427a.name: The target is frightened
de4391f0-1832-5f24-b70b-03d98f00427a.description: This effect ends if the target is ever 60 feet or more from the archfey.

03a56859-4e25-5b07-9ffe-d4179c7094e2.name: The target is poisoned

4da03bfa-63a6-5733-9859-b20c9ba7a305.name: Vengeful Eye
4da03bfa-63a6-5733-9859-b20c9ba7a305.description: When the archfey is hit by a ranged attack or targeted with a spell by a creature within 60 feet, it uses Evil Eye on the attacker if they can see each other.

351749a7-1e22-5321-87ad-ae2d7d37b819.name: Weird
351749a7-1e22-5321-87ad-ae2d7d37b819.description: (9th-Level; V, S, Concentration) The archfey terrifies creatures with their own worst nightmares. Each creature within 30 feet of a point within 120 feet makes a DC 17 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure  the creature is frightened for 1 minute. At the end of each of the creatures turns  the creature takes 22 (4d10) psychic damage and then repeats the saving throw  ending the effect on itself on a success.

a86a3c26-cadf-525b-b83e-35061c39493c.name: Foresight
a86a3c26-cadf-525b-b83e-35061c39493c.description: When the foresight spell is active, the archmage can't be surprised and has advantage on ability checks, attack rolls, and saving throws. In addition, other creatures have disadvantage on attack rolls against the archmage.

attributes.description: When the foresight spell is active, the archmage can't be surprised and has advantage on ability checks, attack rolls, and saving throws. In addition, other creatures have disadvantage on attack rolls against the archmage.

b802410f-5475-5fac-8744-86abb484f115.name: Mind Blank
b802410f-5475-5fac-8744-86abb484f115.description: When the Mind Blank spell is active, the archmage is immune to psychic damage, any effect that would read their emotions or thoughts, divination spells, and the charmed condition.

attributes.description: When the Mind Blank spell is active, the archmage is immune to psychic damage, any effect that would read their emotions or thoughts, divination spells, and the charmed condition.

5d1a4f17-1df1-545a-a55d-33e631e33bc3.name: Spellcasting (Archmage)
5d1a4f17-1df1-545a-a55d-33e631e33bc3.description:
The archmage is an 18th level spellcaster. Their spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save DC 17 +9 to hit with spell attacks). The archmage can cast shield at level 1 and Alter Self at level 2 without expending a spell slot. They have the following wizard spells prepared:

- **Cantrips** (at will): Fire Bolt, Light, Mage Hand, Message, Prestidigitation
- **1st-Level** (4 slots): Detect Magic, Identify, Mage Armor, Shield
- **2nd-Level** (4 slots): Alter Self, Detect Thoughts, Suggestion
- **3rd-Level** (3 slots): Counterspell, Lightning Bolt, Sending
- **4th-Level** (3 slots): Confusion, Hallucinatory Terrain, Locate Creature
- **5th-Level** (3 slots): Cone of Cold, Mislead, Scrying
- **6th-Level** (1 slot): Globe of Invulnerability, True Seeing
- **7th-Level** (1 slot): Teleport
- **8th-Level** (1 slot): Mind Blank
- **9th-Level** (1 slot): Foresight

78173c52-b743-58c4-96bc-725bc586c146.description: (5th-Level; V, S, M) Frost blasts from the archmage in a 60-foot cone. Each creature in the area makes a DC 17 Constitution saving throw  taking 36 (8d8) cold damage on a failure or half damage on a success.

74660d84-0580-51ef-bbc9-47c66feda0e4.name: Confusion
74660d84-0580-51ef-bbc9-47c66feda0e4.description: (4th-Level; V, S, M, Concentration) Each creature within 10 feet of a point the archmage can see within 120 feet makes a DC 17 Wisdom saving throw  becoming rattled until the end of its next turn on a success. On a failure  a creature is confused for 1 minute. The target repeats the saving throw at the end of each of its turns  ending the effect on itself on a success.

a5d2a70a-3dcb-5a26-8ec3-c7633ec75104.name: Counterspell
a5d2a70a-3dcb-5a26-8ec3-c7633ec75104.description: (3rd-Level; S) When a creature the archmage can see within 60 feet casts a spell, the archmage attempts to interrupt it. If the creature is casting a 2nd-level spell or lower, the spell fails. If the creature is casting a 3rd-level or higher spell, the archmage makes an Intelligence check against a DC of 10 + the spells level. On a success, the spell fails, and the spellcasting creature can use its reaction to try to cast a second spell with the same casting time so long as it uses a spell slot level equal to or less than half the original spell slot. If the archmage casts counterspell with a higher spell slot, the interrupted spell fails if its level is less than that of counterspell.

If the archmage casts counterspell with a higher spell slot, the interrupted spell fails if its level is less than that of counterspell.

59af829c-03c0-5a1a-a161-bd68e4a74f73.name: Dagger (Archmage)
59af829c-03c0-5a1a-a161-bd68e4a74f73.description: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage.

c5b5804a-732f-5fc7-bcc6-f98a0726d579.description: (Cantrip; V, S) Ranged Spell Attack: +9 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. Hit: 22 (4d10) fire damage.

faf82c29-3220-5127-9bbf-9866aef31a07.name: Globe of Invulnerability (Archmage)
faf82c29-3220-5127-9bbf-9866aef31a07.description: (6th-Level; V, S, M, Concentration) A glimmering  10-foot-radius sphere appears around the archmage. It remains for 1 minute and doesnt move with the archmage. Any 5th-level or lower spell cast from outside the sphere can't affect anything inside the sphere  even if cast with a higher level spell slot. Targeting something inside the sphere or including the spheres space in an area has no effect on anything inside.

11d22725-b3f1-57a1-8a2e-3c688a29b641.name: Lightning Bolt (Archmage)
11d22725-b3f1-57a1-8a2e-3c688a29b641.description: (3rd-Level; V, S, M) A bolt of lightning 5 feet wide and 100 feet long arcs from the archmage. Each creature in the area makes a DC 17 Dexterity saving throw  taking 28 (8d6) lightning damage on a failure or half damage on a success.

attributes.description: (3rd-Level; V, S, M) A bolt of lightning 5 feet wide and 100 feet long arcs from the archmage. Each creature in the area makes a DC 17 Dexterity saving throw  taking 28 (8d6) lightning damage on a failure or half damage on a success.

aa7fe519-e39d-5471-8759-024b0e037bfd.name: Mislead
aa7fe519-e39d-5471-8759-024b0e037bfd.description: (5th-Level; S, Concentration) The archmage becomes invisible for 1 hour. At the same time  an illusory copy of the archmage appears in their space. The archmage can use an action to move the copy up to 60 feet and have it speak or gesture. The copy is revealed as an illusion with any physical interaction  as solid objects and creatures pass through it. The archmage can use a bonus action to switch between their copys senses or their own; while using their copys senses  the archmages body is blind and deaf. The invisibility  but not the duplicate  ends if the archmage casts another spell.

e94f64ac-d13c-552b-bd01-87e4022253dd.name: Shield (Archmage)

117187fb-cb9c-5c7b-bb07-a9618b36cc50.name: Anointed Healing
117187fb-cb9c-5c7b-bb07-a9618b36cc50.description: Whenever the archpriest casts a spell that restores hit points, that spell restores an extra 11 (2d10) hit points.

52413b63-6a4e-5892-b912-7128b65e749b.name: Magic Resistance (Archpriest)
52413b63-6a4e-5892-b912-7128b65e749b.description: The archpriest has advantage on saving throws against spells and magical effects.

d94c5eb9-f973-5740-a55d-cdf461e0aa01.description:
The archpriest is a 20th level spellcaster. Their spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 18 +10 to hit with spell attacks). The archpriest has the following cleric spells prepared.

- **Cantrips** (at will): Light, Mending, Sacred Flame, Spare the Dying, Thaumaturgy
- **1st-Level** (4 slots): Bane, Bless, Cure Wounds, Inflict Wounds
- **2nd-Level** (3 slots): Hold Person, Lesser Restoration, Spiritual Weapon
- **3rd-Level** (3 slots): Bestow Curse, Dispel Magic, Revivify
- **4th-Level** (3 slots): Banishment, Guardian of Faith, Stone Shape
- **5th-Level** (3 slots): Contagion, Flame Strike, Greater Restoration, Mass Cure Wounds
- **6th-Level** (2 slots): Blade Barrier, Planar Ally, True Seeing
- **7th-Level** (2 slots): Conjure Celestial, Divine Word, Fire Storm
- **8th-Level** (1 slot): Antimagic Field
- **9th-Level** (1 slot): Mass Heal

- **4th-Level** (3 slots): Banishment, Guardian of Faith, Stone Shape
- **5th-Level** (3 slots): Contagion, Flame Strike, Greater Restoration, Mass Cure Wounds
- **6th-Level** (2 slots): Blade Barrier, Planar Ally, True Seeing
- **7th-Level** (2 slots): Conjure Celestial, Divine Word, Fire Storm
- **8th-Level** (1 slot): Antimagic Field
- **9th-Level** (1 slot): Mass Heal

9fe78a63-cc66-51bf-b2b9-8fc64a3d309d.name: Divine Word
9fe78a63-cc66-51bf-b2b9-8fc64a3d309d.description:
(7th-Level; V) The archpriest utters a primordial imprecation that targets other creatures within 30 feet. A target suffers an effect based on its current hit points.

 - Fewer than 50 hit points: Deafened for 1 minute.
 - Fewer than 40 hit points: Blinded and Deafened for 10 minutes.
 - Fewer than 30 hit points: Stunned, Blinded, and Deafened for 1 hour.
 - Fewer than 20 hit points: instantly killed outright.

 Additionally, any celestial, elemental, fey, or fiend affected by this spell is immediately forced back to its home plane, and for 24 hours it is unable to return to the archpriest's current plane by any means less powerful than a *wish* spell. Such a creature does not suffer this effect if it is already on its plane of origin. The archpriest can't cast this spell and a 1st-level or higher spell on the same turn.

49e93590-56a6-5b37-b877-99bc8c34ca4c.name: Fire Storm
49e93590-56a6-5b37-b877-99bc8c34ca4c.description: (7th-Level; V, S) Flames roar from areas within 120 feet in a contiguous group of ten 10-foot cubes in an arrangement the archpriest chooses. Creatures in the area make a DC 18 Dexterity saving throw  taking 38 (7d10) fire damage on a failure or half damage on a success. The spell damages objects in the area and ignites flammable objects that arent being worn or carried.

e666a78b-63e4-5d6e-a3b1-d234e1caea1f.name: Holy Aura
e666a78b-63e4-5d6e-a3b1-d234e1caea1f.description: (8th-Level; V, S, M, Concentration) Holy radiance emanates from the archpriest and fills a 30-foot radius around them  targeting creatures in the area of the archpriests choice. Targets shed dim light in a 5-foot radius and have advantage on saving throws. Attacks made against a target have disadvantage. When a fiend or undead hits a target  the aura erupts into blinding light  forcing the attacker to succeed on a DC 18 Constitution saving throw or be blinded until the spell ends (up to 1 minute).

6f137db3-2be8-5d4c-b836-b24b44cfbbae.name: Mass Heal
6f137db3-2be8-5d4c-b836-b24b44cfbbae.description: (9th-Level; V, S) Healing energy erupts from the archpriest and restores up to 700 hit points amongst any number of creatures within 60 feet that are not constructs or undead. Creatures healed in this way are also cured of any diseases  and any effect causing them to be blinded or deafened. In addition  on subsequent turns within the next minute the archpriest can use a bonus action to distribute any unused hit points.

344c3349-8762-527b-96a5-91176c4f6b3b.description: If defeated in combat, the banshee returns on the anniversary of its death. It can be permanently put to rest only by finding and casting Remove Curse on its grave or by righting whatever wrong was done to it.

fdc3e535-cc78-5b0f-9937-9be5d091723e.description: The banshee shrieks. All living creatures within 30 feet of it that can hear it make a DC 14 Constitution saving throw. On a failure  a creature takes 11 (2d6 + 4) psychic damage. If the creature is cursed by the banshee  it drops to 0 hit points instead.

At the beginning of the basilisks next turn  if still restrained  the target repeats the saving throw. On a success  the effect ends. On a failure  the target is petrified. This petrification can be removed with greater restoration or similar magic or with basilisk venom.

Each time the devil hits the wounded target with this attack  the ongoing damage increases by 5 (1d10). A creature can spend an action to make a DC 12 Medicine check  ending the ongoing damage on a success. At least 1 hit point of magical healing also ends the ongoing damage.

e6f428e2-376c-5a39-b504-40f8284e307d.description: If a creature targets the bulette with a melee attack using a nonmagical weapon and rolls a natural 1 on the attack roll, the weapon breaks.

be6eeb22-a924-520d-84c6-160941602230.name: Bite (Bulette)
be6eeb22-a924-520d-84c6-160941602230.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 30 (4d12 + 4) piercing damage.

b262f6eb-f9d2-552a-8e29-aba8b47eefd9.name: Burrow
b262f6eb-f9d2-552a-8e29-aba8b47eefd9.description: The bulette burrows under the ground without provoking opportunity attacks  moves up to its burrow speed  and then resurfaces in an unoccupied space. If it is within 5 feet of a creature  it then makes a bite attack.

87ea1b12-b495-5928-8832-f2bfb85b697c.name: Hard Carapace
87ea1b12-b495-5928-8832-f2bfb85b697c.description: After taking damage from an attack, the bulette lies down and closes its eyes, protecting all vulnerable spots. Until the beginning of its next turn, its AC becomes 21 and it has advantage on saving throws.

f371ef70-8e04-54c8-93ae-fdf9279cd477.name: Jaw Clamp
f371ef70-8e04-54c8-93ae-fdf9279cd477.description: When an attacker within 5 feet of the bulette misses it with a melee attack, the bulette makes a bite attack against the attacker. On a hit, the attacker is grappled (escape DC 15). Until this grapple ends, the grappled creature is restrained, and the only attack the bulette can make is a bite against the grappled creature.

92ce30c7-7c4d-5aa9-88ce-a4ee1f7b10be.name: Leap
92ce30c7-7c4d-5aa9-88ce-a4ee1f7b10be.description: The bulette leaps up to half its Speed horizontally and half its Speed vertically without provoking opportunity attacks  and can land in a space containing one or more creatures. Each creature in its space when it lands makes a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw  taking 18 (4d6 + 4) bludgeoning damage and being knocked prone on a failure. On a success  the creature takes half damage and is pushed 5 feet to a space of its choice. If that space is occupied  the creature is knocked prone.

90092edc-72d7-5edb-af51-f96af0b4f667.name: Terrifying Howl
90092edc-72d7-5edb-af51-f96af0b4f667.description: The bunyip unleashes a terrifying howl. Each creature of its choice within 120 feet that can see and hear it makes a DC 17 Wisdom saving throw, becoming frightened for 1 minute on a failure. A creature repeats the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creatures saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the bunyips Terrifying Howl for the next 24 hours.

e5021397-aebd-51cb-b04a-912570929012.name: Command (Cambion)
e5021397-aebd-51cb-b04a-912570929012.description: The cambion gives an order to an ally within 60 feet that can hear it. If the ally has a reaction available, it can use it to follow the cambions order, either taking an action or moving up to its Speed.

5b01e7a9-8e62-5592-b7c8-7b02932e6b1b.name: Fell Charm
5b01e7a9-8e62-5592-b7c8-7b02932e6b1b.description: The cambion targets one creature within 30 feet. The target makes a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, it is magically charmed by the cambion for 1 day. The effect ends if the cambion or a cambions ally harms the target, or if the cambion commands it to take a suicidal action. While charmed, the target regards the cambion as a trusted friend and is an ally of the cambion. If the target makes a successful saving throw or the effect ends, the target is immune to this cambions Fell Charm for 24 hours.

48aff862-ea3d-5ed8-b357-39a51026e0fb.name: Fiery Escape
48aff862-ea3d-5ed8-b357-39a51026e0fb.description: The cambion magically creates a fiery portal to the realm of its fiendish parent. The portal appears in an empty space within 5 feet. The portal lasts until the end of the cambions next turn or until it passes through the portal. No one but the cambion can pass through the portal; anyone else that enters its space takes 14 (4d6) fire damage.

b0aa7091-36cd-5ae9-9ef4-2a13db4d1cb6.description: The cambion magically changes its form to that of any humanoid creature it has seen before, or back into its true form. While shapeshifted, its statistics are unchanged except that it has no armor or equipment, can't use its black iron blade, and can fly only if it is in a form with wings. It reverts to its true form if it dies.

fc2fbecd-5c19-5ab1-99a4-3190a84ab561.description: The troll regains 10 hit points at the start of its turn. If the troll takes radiant damage or is exposed to sunlight, this trait doesnt function on its next turn. The troll is petrified if it starts its turn with 0 hit points and doesnt regenerate.

0aa8c2a5-009f-5f69-9f4b-5c9e02686e8a.name: Severed Limbs
0aa8c2a5-009f-5f69-9f4b-5c9e02686e8a.description: If the troll is dealt a critical hit with a slashing weapon, one of its extremities is severed. The extremity has AC 15, 10 hit points, a Speed of 10, and the trolls Regeneration trait. The troll controls the severed extremity and perceives through it with the appropriate senses (for instance, it sees through the eyes of its severed head). As a bonus action, the troll can reattach the extremity. While the troll is missing the extremity, its maximum hit points are reduced by 10. Roll d6 to determine the severed extremity:

f9b86989-4e30-5fe2-8dee-2e9bd91d9faa.name: Relentless Tracker

5f1277e8-5e1a-5308-8814-14c1de3c7a4e.name: Animate Chain
5f1277e8-5e1a-5308-8814-14c1de3c7a4e.description: One inanimate, unattended chain within 60 feet sprouts blades and magically animates under the devils control for 1 hour. It has AC 20 and 20 hit points, a Speed of 0, and immunity to psychic, piercing, poison, and thunder damage. When the devil uses Multiattack, the devil may command the chain to make one Chain attack against a target within 15 feet of it. If the chain is reduced to 0 hit points, it can't be reanimated.

487ac918-3ccc-5da6-9252-2f07574af559.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) slashing damage. If the target is a creature  it is grappled (escape DC 16) and restrained. Until the grapple ends  this chain can only attack the grappled target.

6b30199b-3783-5af1-9dd6-9c6671d9a460.description: When damaged by a creature within 30 feet that can see the devil, the devil momentarily assumes the magical illusory form of one of the attackers enemies or loved ones, alive or dead. The illusory figure may speak words that only the attacker can hear. The attacker makes a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, it takes 9 (2d8) psychic damage and is frightened until the end of its next turn.The attacker is then immune to this effect for the next 24 hours.

c0a6a425-98f3-55d2-ac14-1cac2fe402e5.name: Pincer
c0a6a425-98f3-55d2-ac14-1cac2fe402e5.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one Large or smaller target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) bludgeoning damage. A pincer that is being used to grapple a creature can be used only to attack that creature.

f5dab86a-f085-5e09-aea5-4e36926e69c6.description: When the guardian starts its turn while bloodied , roll a d6. On a 6, the guardian goes berserk. While berserk, the guardian attacks the nearest creature it can see. If it can’t reach a creature, it attacks an object. The guardian stays berserk until it is destroyed or restored to full hit points.

The target dies if its hit point maximum is reduced to 0. A greater restoration spell or similar magic removes the reduction.

When the cloaker is dealt damage while grappling  it takes half the damage (rounded down) and the other half is dealt to the grappled target. The cloaker can have only one creature grappled at once.

The giants spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 15). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

- **At Will:** Detect Magic, Fog Cloud, light,
- **3/Day Each:** feather fall, fly, Misty Step, Telekinesis
- **1/Day Each:** Control Weather, Gaseous Form

7ea33a6f-17c8-5845-9d99-94d7b7769e10.name: Bite (Cockatrice)

Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage  and the target makes a DC 11 Constitution saving throw against being petrified. On a failure  the target is restrained as it begins to turn to stone. A lesser restoration spell ends this effect. If still restrained  the creature must repeat the saving throw at the end of its next turn. On a success  the effect ends. On a failure  the creature is petrified for 24 hours.

The mob can move through any opening large enough for one Medium creature.

bc8e9618-7811-5f4c-b8d1-56e66a5a5f80.description: A 15-foot radius area of magical darkness emanates from the unicorn  spreading around corners and moving with it. The darkness aura lasts for 10 minutes or until the unicorn takes damage. The aura doesnt hinder the unicorns sight.

1aa6371d-30ef-5303-a011-79e1d91ffcb8.description:
The couatls spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 14). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

- **At Will:** Detect Evil and Good, Detect Magic,
- **3/Day Each:** Create Food and Water, Detect Thoughts, Lesser Restoration
- **1/Day Each:** Dream, Greater Restoration, Scrying

On a failure  it is poisoned for 24 hours. The target is unconscious until the poisoned condition ends or a creature uses an action to shake the target awake.

70ba750e-37d4-5c1e-9054-9e77995735e0.name: Shapeshift (Couatl)
70ba750e-37d4-5c1e-9054-9e77995735e0.description: The couatl magically changes its form to resemble that of a humanoid or beast  or back into its true form. It reverts to its true form if it dies. If its form is humanoid  it is equipped with clothing and a weapon. While shapeshifted  its statistics are the same except that it can't use Constrict and Shielding Wing and it may gain a swim speed of 60 or lose its fly speed if appropriate to its new form. If its a beast  it can use its bite attack. If its a humanoid  it may make a weapon attack  which functions identically to its bite attack.

c3387c07-134d-5ec0-886d-5ac99dc060e6.description: While on the Ethereal Plane  the hag magically touches a sleeping creature that is under the night hags Curse and is not protected by a magic circle or protection from evil and good spell or similar magic. As long as the touch persists  the target has terrible nightmares. If the nightmares last for 1 hour  the target gains no benefit from the rest  and its hit point maximum is reduced by 5 (1d10) until the curse ends. If this effect reduces the targets hit points maximum to 0  the target dies and the hag captures its soul. The reduction to the targets hit point maximum lasts until removed by greater restoration or similar magic.

The reduction to the targets hit point maximum lasts until removed by greater restoration or similar magic.

284f7f7b-51e0-520b-9f92-c221d3b3bb39.name: Planar Travel
284f7f7b-51e0-520b-9f92-c221d3b3bb39.description: The hag magically enters the Ethereal Plane from the Material Plane  or vice versa. Alternatively  the hag is magically transported to the Material Plane  Hell  or the Abyss  arriving within 10 miles of its desired destination.

attributes.description: The hag magically enters the Ethereal Plane from the Material Plane  or vice versa. Alternatively  the hag is magically transported to the Material Plane  Hell  or the Abyss  arriving within 10 miles of its desired destination.

21cf947f-6270-5541-b21d-396919e8f49a.name: Shapeshift (Coven Night Hag)
21cf947f-6270-5541-b21d-396919e8f49a.description: The hag magically polymorphs into a Small or Medium humanoid. Equipment it is carrying isnt transformed. It retains its claws in any form. It has no true form and remains in its current form when it dies.

attributes.description: The hag magically polymorphs into a Small or Medium humanoid. Equipment it is carrying isnt transformed. It retains its claws in any form. It has no true form and remains in its current form when it dies.

2ad180f7-2e6b-5136-8219-d6c5397282eb.name: Sleep Touch
2ad180f7-2e6b-5136-8219-d6c5397282eb.description: Melee Spell Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: The target falls asleep for 4 hours or until it takes damage or is shaken awake. Once the hag successfully hits a target  it can't make this attack again until it finishes a long rest.

attributes.description: Melee Spell Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: The target falls asleep for 4 hours or until it takes damage or is shaken awake. Once the hag successfully hits a target  it can't make this attack again until it finishes a long rest.

f0615424-4b2e-5b72-9bf5-7157dd408ceb.name: Steal Magic
f0615424-4b2e-5b72-9bf5-7157dd408ceb.description: When a creature the hag can see within 60 feet casts a spell using a 3rd-level or lower spell slot, the hag attempts to steal its power. The caster makes a DC 14 saving throw using its spellcasting ability. On a failure, the spell fails, and the hag gains 5 (1d10) temporary hit points per level of the spell slot used.

The caster makes a DC 14 saving throw using its spellcasting ability. On a failure, the spell fails, and the hag gains 5 (1d10) temporary hit points per level of the spell slot used.

7e4c2e43-2e5e-50a5-8e39-07ef2f68936c.name: Curse (Coven Sea Hag)
7e4c2e43-2e5e-50a5-8e39-07ef2f68936c.description: A creature that makes a bargain with the hag is magically cursed for 30 days. While it is cursed, the target automatically fails saving throws against the hags Scrying and Geas spells, and the hag can cast Control Weather centered on the creature.

attributes.description: A creature that makes a bargain with the hag is magically cursed for 30 days. While it is cursed, the target automatically fails saving throws against the hags Scrying and Geas spells, and the hag can cast Control Weather centered on the creature.

64df8f8f-6d04-5620-946f-28ec113f6116.name: Innate Spellcasting (Coven Sea Hag)
64df8f8f-6d04-5620-946f-28ec113f6116.description:
The hags innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 13). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

- **At Will:** dancing lights, Disguise Self
- **1/Day:** Control Weather, Geas, Scrying

The hags innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 13). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

- **At Will:** dancing lights, Disguise Self

95750835-12d4-58d2-8c31-dd435bff36a5.name: Claws (Coven Sea Hag)
95750835-12d4-58d2-8c31-dd435bff36a5.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) slashing damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) slashing damage.

da126795-041d-5404-91d7-cd33bfe23a5a.name: Death Glare (Gaze)
da126795-041d-5404-91d7-cd33bfe23a5a.description: One frightened creature within 30 feet makes a DC 11 Wisdom saving throw. On a failed saving throw  the creature drops to 0 hit points. On a success  the creature takes 7 (2d6) psychic damage.

attributes.description: One frightened creature within 30 feet makes a DC 11 Wisdom saving throw. On a failed saving throw  the creature drops to 0 hit points. On a success  the creature takes 7 (2d6) psychic damage.

079b2ff5-29a5-5d21-8c32-da605a2aaa6e.name: Horrific Transformation
079b2ff5-29a5-5d21-8c32-da605a2aaa6e.description: The hag briefly takes on a terrifying form or reveals its true form. Each creature within 30 feet that can see the hag makes a DC 11 Wisdom saving throw. A creature under the hags curse automatically fails this saving throw. On a failure, the creature is frightened until the end of its next turn. If a creatures saving throw is successful, it is immune to the hags Horrific Transformation for 24 hours.

555ac978-0ce3-5e80-a16f-7557d9f07724.name: Lightning Blast
555ac978-0ce3-5e80-a16f-7557d9f07724.description: An 80-foot-long  5-foot-wide lightning bolt springs from the hags extended claw. Each creature in the area makes a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw  taking 21 (6d6) lightning damage on a failed save or half damage on a success.

d93968a6-5f63-5ff9-8cda-028d40945024.name: Multiattack (Coven Sea Hag)
d93968a6-5f63-5ff9-8cda-028d40945024.description: The hag attacks twice with its claws.

attributes.description: The hag attacks twice with its claws.

cb233004-bc8e-526c-8188-f6d6105c5027.name: Curse (Coven Winter Hag)
cb233004-bc8e-526c-8188-f6d6105c5027.description: A creature that accepts a gift from the hag is magically cursed for 30 days. While it is cursed, the target automatically fails saving throws against the hags Charm Person, Geas, and Scrying spells, and the hag can cast Control Weather centered on the creature.

attributes.description: A creature that accepts a gift from the hag is magically cursed for 30 days. While it is cursed, the target automatically fails saving throws against the hags Charm Person, Geas, and Scrying spells, and the hag can cast Control Weather centered on the creature.

05198e5c-578b-5621-8a83-d43df8b0291c.name: Icy Travel
05198e5c-578b-5621-8a83-d43df8b0291c.description: The hag is not hindered by cold weather, icy surfaces, snow, wind, or storms. Additionally, the hag and her allies leave no trace when walking on snow or ice.

attributes.description: The hag is not hindered by cold weather, icy surfaces, snow, wind, or storms. Additionally, the hag and her allies leave no trace when walking on snow or ice.

0aedc7ee-0b2d-507d-8628-3e17689ea455.name: Innate Spellcasting (Coven Winter Hag)
0aedc7ee-0b2d-507d-8628-3e17689ea455.description:
The hags innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 15). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

- **At Will:** Charm Person, dancing lights, Invisibility, Minor Illusion, Passwall (ice only)
- **1/Day:** Control Weather (extreme cold), Geas, Scrying
- **1/Day Each:** Cone of Cold, Wall of Ice

6505a23a-b6ec-557a-b204-346f8f42ef0e.name: Claws (Coven Winter Hag)

de19245d-ebdd-59fd-825e-335d9c9c29dc.name: Cone of Cold (Coven Winter Hag)
de19245d-ebdd-59fd-825e-335d9c9c29dc.description: (5th-Level; V, S) Frost blasts from the hag in a 60-foot cone. Each creature in the area makes a DC 15 Constitution saving throw  taking 36 (8d8) cold damage on a failure or half damage on a success.

attributes.description: (5th-Level; V, S) Frost blasts from the hag in a 60-foot cone. Each creature in the area makes a DC 15 Constitution saving throw  taking 36 (8d8) cold damage on a failure or half damage on a success.

bb1b5785-a710-5f5b-bb88-88c2486707e5.name: Ice Bolt
bb1b5785-a710-5f5b-bb88-88c2486707e5.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +7 to hit, range 60 ft., one creature. Hit: 15 (2d10 + 4) cold damage  and the target makes a DC 15 Constitution saving throw. A creature under the hags curse automatically fails this saving throw. On a failure  the creature is restrained as it begins to turn to ice. At the end of the creatures next turn  the creature repeats the saving throw. On a success  the effect ends. On a failure  the creature is petrified into ice. This petrification can be removed with greater restoration or similar magic.

1169319e-f80c-5f6b-8c44-e92ce32aeb8b.name: Ice Shield
1169319e-f80c-5f6b-8c44-e92ce32aeb8b.description: The hag adds 3 to its AC against one melee attack that would hit it made by a creature it can see. If the attack misses, the attacker takes 14 (4d6) cold damage.

b09bd3a2-1d85-59b0-86b5-c9c747a2a64a.name: Invisibility (Coven Winter Hag)
b09bd3a2-1d85-59b0-86b5-c9c747a2a64a.description: (2nd-Level; V, S, Concentration) The hag is invisible for 1 hour. The spell ends if the hag attacks or casts a spell.

attributes.description: (2nd-Level; V, S, Concentration) The hag is invisible for 1 hour. The spell ends if the hag attacks or casts a spell.

b9085995-1d7a-5bee-9519-d173ab6b2df7.name: Multiattack (Coven Winter Hag)
b9085995-1d7a-5bee-9519-d173ab6b2df7.description: The hag attacks with its claws and uses Ice Bolt.

attributes.description: The hag attacks with its claws and uses Ice Bolt.

fbb68dfe-709d-5111-9ec9-a5f3974e6f2d.name: Shapeshift (Coven Winter Hag)
fbb68dfe-709d-5111-9ec9-a5f3974e6f2d.description: The hag magically polymorphs into a Small or Medium humanoid or back into its true form. Its statistics are the same in each form. Equipment it is carrying isnt transformed. It retains a streak of white hair in any form. It returns to its true form if it dies.

5430d971-9488-55dd-acb5-b6255c0a45c5.name: Wall of Ice
5430d971-9488-55dd-acb5-b6255c0a45c5.description: (6th-level; V, S, Concentration) The hag magically creates a wall of ice on a solid surface it can see within 120 feet. The wall is flat  1 foot thick  and can be up to 50 feet long and 20 feet high. The wall lasts for 10 minutes. Each 10-foot section has AC 12  30 hit points  vulnerability to fire damage  and immunity to cold  poison  and psychic damage. Destroying a 10-foot section of wall leaves behind a sheet of frigid air in the space the section occupied. A creature moving through the sheet of frigid air for the first time on a turn makes a Constitution saving throw  taking 17 (5d6) cold damage on a failed save or half damage on a success.

52528aa3-7873-5d1e-be28-c69bb944ffb3.name: Amphibious (Crab)
52528aa3-7873-5d1e-be28-c69bb944ffb3.description: The crab can breathe air and water.

2af2ec56-3793-581a-863a-5d3ad9d662a0.name: Claws (Crab)
2af2ec56-3793-581a-863a-5d3ad9d662a0.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1 bludgeoning damage. If this damage would reduce a Small or larger target to 0 hit points  the target takes no damage from this attack.

0ab5555c-1829-5902-b21b-0507c82856c3.name: Command Bodyguard
0ab5555c-1829-5902-b21b-0507c82856c3.description: When the boss would be hit by an attack, they command an ally within 5 feet to use its reaction to switch places with the boss. The ally is hit by the attack instead of the boss.

b574475f-ea4a-5225-98f3-57539c1ca913.name: Mark for Death
b574475f-ea4a-5225-98f3-57539c1ca913.description: The boss targets a creature within 30 feet that can see or hear them. For 1 minute or until the boss threatens a different target  the target takes an extra 7 (2d6) damage whenever the boss hits it with a weapon attack.

51e1db8b-0f29-5ae1-8ca4-675b34d54b81.description: The boss attacks three times with their shortsword.

70899f69-30b6-52c0-a17e-ea3ea58c96e2.name: Offhand Dagger
70899f69-30b6-52c0-a17e-ea3ea58c96e2.description: When missed by an attack, the boss makes a dagger attack.

68413644-adb3-545b-a0ff-f72cc69fd957.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) piercing damage.

fd3b0072-75a3-5957-b0e3-f63094dcba53.name: Hold Breath (Crocodile)
fd3b0072-75a3-5957-b0e3-f63094dcba53.description: The crocodile can hold its breath for 15 minutes.

attributes.description: The crocodile can hold its breath for 15 minutes.

be98507b-fb96-51e8-9850-4175eb88282d.name: Bite (Crocodile)
be98507b-fb96-51e8-9850-4175eb88282d.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d10+2) piercing damage and the target is grappled (escape DC 12). Until this grapple ends  the target is restrained and the crocodile can't bite a different target.

ad23fdfd-a52d-573b-b717-0d6ccdceda97.name: Crush
ad23fdfd-a52d-573b-b717-0d6ccdceda97.description: The crusher moves up to its Speed in a straight line. While doing so  it can attempt to enter Large or smaller creatures spaces. Whenever the crusher attempts to enter a creatures space  the creature makes a DC 17 Dexterity or Strength saving throw (the creatures choice). If the creature succeeds at a Strength saving throw  the crushers movement ends for the turn. If the creature succeeds at a Dexterity saving throw  the creature may use its reaction  if available  to move up to half its Speed without provoking opportunity attacks. The first time on the crushers turn that it enters a creatures space  the creature is knocked prone and takes 50 (10d8 + 5) bludgeoning damage. A creature is prone while in the crushers space.

34344009-b88d-58f0-939c-a2b66bf9a737.description: The crusher takes the Dash action.

93eb3362-de1e-5bf9-8f04-676adb393b74.name: Ram
93eb3362-de1e-5bf9-8f04-676adb393b74.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 23 (4d8 + 5) bludgeoning damage. If the crusher moves at least 20 feet straight towards the target before the attack  the attack deals an extra 18 (4d8) bludgeoning damage.

7d1ab0bb-9761-5ee9-bf99-6ea7a7d975a6.name: Fanatic
7d1ab0bb-9761-5ee9-bf99-6ea7a7d975a6.description: The cult fanatic has advantage on saving throws against being charmed or frightened.

6ea2e68b-8a3f-581c-b97d-217f5962960d.name: Spellcasting (Cult Fanatic)
6ea2e68b-8a3f-581c-b97d-217f5962960d.description:
The cult fanatic is a 4th level spellcaster. Their spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 12 +4 to hit with spell attacks). They have the following cleric spells prepared:

- **Cantrips** (at will): Light, Sacred Flame, Thaumaturgy
- **1st-Level** (4 slots): Ceremony, Command, Detect Evil and Good, Inflict Wounds
- **2nd-Level** (3 slots): Blindness/Deafness, Hold Person

67ad00f5-bcd8-5a03-baca-a5c6160df5a4.name: Blindness/Deafness
67ad00f5-bcd8-5a03-baca-a5c6160df5a4.description: (2nd-Level; V) One creature the cult fanatic can see within 30 feet makes a DC 12 Constitution saving throw. On a failure  the creature is blinded or deafened (cult fanatics choice) for 1 minute. The creature repeats the saving throw at the end of each of its turns  ending the effect on a success.

1746da7b-e382-5f0e-b74f-7c65f22d7702.name: Command (Cult Fanatic)
1746da7b-e382-5f0e-b74f-7c65f22d7702.description: (1st-Level; V) One non-undead creature the cult fanatic can see within 60 feet that can hear and understand them makes a DC 12 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure  the target uses its next turn to grovel (falling prone and then ending its turn).

3f15cc27-dc11-5802-8b3e-bbb7fdbacf5f.description: The cultist has advantage on saving throws against being charmed or frightened by creatures not in their cult.

33d98979-fd59-503f-a4ae-0a8a55132caf.name: Panicked Rage

e82c873b-20e5-54a6-906a-7aab5f61e090.name: Echolocation (Darkmantle)
e82c873b-20e5-54a6-906a-7aab5f61e090.description: The darkmantle can't use blindsight while deafened.

attributes.description: The darkmantle can't use blindsight while deafened.

d4f47328-039c-59d6-b9da-ae65b3287b66.name: False Appearance (Darkmantle)
d4f47328-039c-59d6-b9da-ae65b3287b66.description: While motionless, the darkmantle is indistinguishable from rock.

attributes.description: While motionless, the darkmantle is indistinguishable from rock.

bae90726-53e3-5aa0-b04c-9ff392829218.name: Crush (Darkmantle)
bae90726-53e3-5aa0-b04c-9ff392829218.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage  and the target is grappled (escape DC 13). If the darkmantle made the attack with advantage  it attaches to the targets head  and the target is blinded and can't breathe. While grappling  the darkmantle can only attack the grappled creature but has advantage on its attack roll. The darkmantles speed becomes 0  and it moves with its target.

da2bc921-f392-576e-8589-7045cefa28ce.name: Darkness Aura (Darkmantle)
da2bc921-f392-576e-8589-7045cefa28ce.description: A 15-foot radius area of magical darkness emanates from the darkmantle  spreading around corners and moving with it. Darkvision and natural light can't penetrate it. If the darkness overlaps with an area of light created by a 2nd-level spell or lower  the spell creating the light is dispelled. The darkness aura lasts for 10 minutes or until the darkmantle takes damage.

1e8e0d01-4d20-596f-979c-953ac435e056.name: Multiattack (Darkmantle)
1e8e0d01-4d20-596f-979c-953ac435e056.description: The darkmantle uses Darkness Aura and makes a crush attack.

attributes.description: The darkmantle uses Darkness Aura and makes a crush attack.

e78d9543-e199-50e7-9406-e5d965f53fb6.name: Ethereal and Material
e78d9543-e199-50e7-9406-e5d965f53fb6.description: The dead mans fingers lives simultaneously on the Ethereal and Material Planes. Its senses extend into both planes, and it can touch and be touched by creatures on both planes.

attributes.description: The dead mans fingers lives simultaneously on the Ethereal and Material Planes. Its senses extend into both planes, and it can touch and be touched by creatures on both planes.

766b2950-ad74-5ae3-856c-39ed25543bf8.name: Ethereal Shift
766b2950-ad74-5ae3-856c-39ed25543bf8.description: When a creature on the Material Plane touches the dead mans fingers or hits it with a melee attack, the creature is magically transported to the Ethereal Plane. The creature can see and hear into both the Ethereal and Material Plane but is unaffected by creatures and objects on the Material Plane. It can be seen as a ghostly form by creatures on the Material Plane. It can move in any direction, with each foot of movement up or down costing 2 feet of movement.

attributes.description: When a creature on the Material Plane touches the dead mans fingers or hits it with a melee attack, the creature is magically transported to the Ethereal Plane. The creature can see and hear into both the Ethereal and Material Plane but is unaffected by creatures and objects on the Material Plane. It can be seen as a ghostly form by creatures on the Material Plane. It can move in any direction, with each foot of movement up or down costing 2 feet of movement.

4bb3bc41-ca33-5ac8-8262-cc40326df74a.name: Flammable
4bb3bc41-ca33-5ac8-8262-cc40326df74a.description: After taking fire damage, the dead mans fingers catches fire and takes ongoing 11 (2d10) fire damage if it isnt already suffering ongoing fire damage. It can spend an action or bonus action to extinguish this fire.

attributes.description: After taking fire damage, the dead mans fingers catches fire and takes ongoing 11 (2d10) fire damage if it isnt already suffering ongoing fire damage. It can spend an action or bonus action to extinguish this fire.

958c76dd-721f-591d-a337-e1092447b556.name: Ethereal Spores
958c76dd-721f-591d-a337-e1092447b556.description: Each creature within 30 feet makes a DC 15 Constitution saving throw  taking 31 (9d6) necrotic damage on a failed save or half damage on a success. A creature reduced to 0 hit points by this damage dies. If a creature killed by this attack remains on the Ethereal Plane for 24 hours  its corpse disintegrates  and a new dead mans fingers sprouts from its place.

8804993e-3189-54f3-b32c-4bee010188df.name: Telekinetic Pull
8804993e-3189-54f3-b32c-4bee010188df.description: One creature within 90 feet makes a DC 15 Strength saving throw. On a failure, it is magically pulled up to 60 feet straight towards the dead mans fingers.

f9e84dc9-0ddb-53f1-aaf0-3bcf42735b11.name: Tendril (Ethereal or Material Plane)
f9e84dc9-0ddb-53f1-aaf0-3bcf42735b11.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 20 ft., one creature. Hit: 10 (1d10 + 5) bludgeoning damage plus 10 (3d6) poison damage. A target on the Material Plane is subject to the Ethereal Shift trait.

c280de51-fcdb-5d8a-820f-eee8edbba1a4.name: Two Heads
c280de51-fcdb-5d8a-820f-eee8edbba1a4.description: The death dog has advantage on Perception checks and on saving throws made to resist being blinded, charmed, deafened, frightened, stunned, or knocked unconscious, and it can't be flanked.

attributes.description: The death dog has advantage on Perception checks and on saving throws made to resist being blinded, charmed, deafened, frightened, stunned, or knocked unconscious, and it can't be flanked.

75c58d05-6a65-5fa5-9f95-e28267c4161e.name: Bite (Death Dog)
75c58d05-6a65-5fa5-9f95-e28267c4161e.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6+2) piercing damage. If the target is a creature  it makes a DC 12 Constitution saving throw. On a failure  it becomes infected with a disease. Until this disease is cured  the target is poisoned. While diseased  the target makes a DC 12 Constitution saving throw every 24 hours  reducing its hit point maximum by 5 (1d10) on a failure and ending the disease on a success. This hit point maximum reduction lasts until the disease is cured. The target dies if its hit point maximum is reduced to 0.

97e7f455-e3e8-578e-895e-63f5d5c41632.description: The deep dwarf can innately cast enlarge/reduce (self only, enlarge only) and Invisibility (self only) once per long rest without using material components, using Intelligence for their spellcasting ability.

c77e6d2f-b2f6-50fb-ad41-0f67b99bdcfa.description: The soldier has advantage on saving throws against illusions and to resist being charmed or paralyzed.

bd7b9c1b-79e2-5739-a317-4187cbf6311f.description: (2nd-Level; V, S, Concentration) The soldier and their equipment grow to Large size for 1 minute. They have advantage on Strength checks and Strength saving throws  and their attacks deal an extra 2 (1d4) damage (included in their War Pick attack).

8ae3d03a-b349-580e-85ab-c00f419eb576.description: (2nd-Level; V, S, Concentration) The soldier is invisible for 1 hour. The spell ends if the soldier attacks or casts a spell.

83443294-5b98-5411-989b-9bbaf8569a19.name: Tactical Movement
83443294-5b98-5411-989b-9bbaf8569a19.description: Until the end of the soldiers turn, their Speed is halved and their movement doesnt provoke opportunity attacks.

af64959c-12d0-5ebe-8903-d2a789dddb41.name: War Pick (Deep Dwarf Soldier)
af64959c-12d0-5ebe-8903-d2a789dddb41.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d8 + 2) piercing damage  or 11 (2d8 + 2) piercing damage if within 5 feet of an ally that is not incapacitated  plus 2 (1d4) damage when Enlarged.

5b54e575-2ec4-5156-aee2-e197abddb04b.description: The scout has advantage on Stealth checks made to hide in rocky terrain.

df129750-e0a8-53c9-8913-a8f0dbcb5e3d.description: The deep gnome can innately cast blindness/deafness (blindness only), Disguise Self, and nondetection once per long rest without using material components, using Intelligence for their spellcasting ability.

2de0056e-2f3f-57dc-8566-d85f31189c7f.name: Deep Gnome Resistance

218431dc-b5db-5f3d-88ce-e4234b13d9b5.name: Keen Hearing and Sight
218431dc-b5db-5f3d-88ce-e4234b13d9b5.description: The scout has advantage on Perception checks that rely on hearing or sight.

attributes.description: The scout has advantage on Perception checks that rely on hearing or sight.

38ce2819-7849-56b6-b04a-f47095d7851f.name: Blindness (Deep Gnome Scout)
38ce2819-7849-56b6-b04a-f47095d7851f.description: (2nd-Level; V) A creature within 30 feet makes a DC 10 Constitution saving throw. On a failure  the target is blinded for 1 minute. It repeats the saving throw at the end of each of its turns  ending the effect on a success.

attributes.description: (2nd-Level; V) A creature within 30 feet makes a DC 10 Constitution saving throw. On a failure  the target is blinded for 1 minute. It repeats the saving throw at the end of each of its turns  ending the effect on a success.

4e11cd2e-b0e2-547d-9e8e-14a9c721463d.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d8 + 2) piercing damage.

c507ccd3-e7e1-5bc3-9b0e-a06c42576568.name: Keen Smell (Deer)
c507ccd3-e7e1-5bc3-9b0e-a06c42576568.description: The deer has advantage on Perception checks that rely on smell.

6b014dde-dbcf-5599-b6f9-62fb5b209b74.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1 piercing damage.

416f3ccb-3870-5cb7-846b-18ae1eb65e85.name: Headbutt (Deer)
416f3ccb-3870-5cb7-846b-18ae1eb65e85.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 2 (1d4) piercing damage.

5106bf2a-d187-59d9-b6b1-4e20c92d6d44.name: Avoidance
5106bf2a-d187-59d9-b6b1-4e20c92d6d44.description: If the demilich makes a saving throw against an effect that deals half damage on a success, it takes no damage on a success and half damage on a failure.

attributes.description: If the demilich makes a saving throw against an effect that deals half damage on a success, it takes no damage on a success and half damage on a failure.

6d423d51-0a04-58ab-bb27-b588ea9add53.name: Legendary Resistance (5/Day)
6d423d51-0a04-58ab-bb27-b588ea9add53.description: If the demilich fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead. When it does so, one of the five tiny warding gems set on its forehead or teeth shatters.

attributes.description: If the demilich fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead. When it does so, one of the five tiny warding gems set on its forehead or teeth shatters.

2c219e63-0512-5c32-aafa-d69aca6ca601.name: Undead Nature (Demilich)
2c219e63-0512-5c32-aafa-d69aca6ca601.description: A demilich doesnt require air, sustenance, or sleep.

attributes.description: A demilich doesnt require air, sustenance, or sleep.

823a61af-c91c-5ccf-b23c-9283e24fcfad.name: Cranial Transposition
823a61af-c91c-5ccf-b23c-9283e24fcfad.description: The dust surrounding the demilich falls to the ground. The demilich and a nonmagical, unattended skull within 30 teleport, switching places. Until the demilich moves or attacks, it is indistinguishable from a nonmagical skull, and the dust composing the demilichs wraithlike body doesnt reform around it.

attributes.description: The dust surrounding the demilich falls to the ground. The demilich and a nonmagical, unattended skull within 30 teleport, switching places. Until the demilich moves or attacks, it is indistinguishable from a nonmagical skull, and the dust composing the demilichs wraithlike body doesnt reform around it.

24d604a1-d94d-5258-8359-570ea57197ee.name: Devour Soul
24d604a1-d94d-5258-8359-570ea57197ee.description: The demilich targets one creature within 120 feet  forcing it to make a DC 17 Wisdom saving throw. On a success  or if all the large soul gems on the demilichs skull are occupied  the creature takes 40 necrotic damage  and the demilich regains the same number of hit points. If the target fails its saving throw and there is at least one unoccupied soul gem on the demilichs skull  the demilich regains 40 hit points  and the target dies instantly. Its soul is trapped in a soul gem on the demilichs skull  visible as a tiny  creature-shaped mote of light. While its soul is trapped  a creature can't be restored to life by any means. A soul that remains in a soul gem for 30 days is destroyed forever. If the demilich is defeated and a soul gem crushed  the creature is restored to life if its body is within 100 miles. A creature that succeeds on a saving throw against this effect is immune to it for 24 hours.

A creature that succeeds on a saving throw against this effect is immune to it for 24 hours.

1a78cc0e-d454-5204-99ce-2ff46198e600.name: Dust Storm
1a78cc0e-d454-5204-99ce-2ff46198e600.description: The dust of the demilichs body swirls in a 30-foot radius around the demilich. Each creature in the area makes a DC 17 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, the creature takes 21 (6d6) necrotic damage and is blinded until the end of its next turn. The demilich then moves up to its speed.

d6857a1b-d77d-5660-8e62-89aff93ca74a.name: Ringing Laugh
d6857a1b-d77d-5660-8e62-89aff93ca74a.description: Each creature within 60 feet that can hear the demilich makes a DC 17 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, a creature is frightened until the end of its next turn.

attributes.description: Each creature within 60 feet that can hear the demilich makes a DC 17 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, a creature is frightened until the end of its next turn.

0a2bf049-e209-5d44-9a13-7d10cf693684.name: Telekinesis
0a2bf049-e209-5d44-9a13-7d10cf693684.description: The demilich targets a Huge or smaller creature or an object weighing up to 1,000 pounds within 60 feet. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 17 Strength saving throw. Otherwise, the demilich moves the target up to 30 feet in any direction, including up. If another creature or object stops the targets movement, both take 10 (3d6) bludgeoning damage. At the end of this movement, the target falls if it is still in the air, taking falling damage as normal.

4fdeb677-674e-523b-b037-4b8df1c3ef0f.name: Immortal Nature

The deva can choose to magically heal 60 hit points of damage and end any blindness  curse  deafness  disease  or poison on the target. Alternatively  the deva can choose to deal 60 radiant damage to the target.

The target repeats the saving throw at the end of each of its turns  ending the effect on a success.

5d3d52ab-7c9e-59aa-b144-d4fdc19ab74d.description:
The divis innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 14). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

- **At Will:** Alter Self (can assume Medium or Large form), Detect Magic, Stone Shape
- **3/Day Each:** Creation, Move Earth, Passwall, Tongues
- **1/Day Each:** Conjure Elemental (earth elemental only), Plane Shift (to Elemental Plane of Earth only)

12c15fee-ffa0-5284-bde1-31beb0394999.description: Amid deafening rumbling  the ground shakes in a 10-foot radius around a point on an earth or stone surface within 90 feet. The area becomes difficult terrain. Each non-elemental creature in the area makes a DC 18 Constitution saving throw  taking 24 (7d6) thunder damage and falling prone on a failure or taking half damage on a success.

ebc0b003-e48a-5662-af4c-d6d8ae583063.description: A permanent stone wall magically rises from an earth or stone surface within 60 feet. The wall is 6 inches thick and can be up to 20 feet high and 30 feet long. If it appears in a creatures space, the creature can choose which side of the wall to move to. Each 10-foot-by-10-foot section of the wall is an object with AC 18 and 30 hit points.

93a40fd4-6431-5343-834c-a6a0528d5de3.description: The djinni magically becomes a Huge, semi-substantial creature of billowing cloud. In this form, it gains resistance to nonmagical damage, and its scimitar attacks gain a reach of 10 feet. The effect ends after 1 minute, when the djinni is incapacitated, or if the djinn becomes bloodied.

1da07bd2-1297-5b93-8aca-36702f2ddf1a.name: Whirlwind (Djinni)
1da07bd2-1297-5b93-8aca-36702f2ddf1a.description: A magical, 5-foot-wide, 30-foot-tall whirlwind appears in a space the djinni can see within 60 feet. The whirlwind may appear in another creatures space. If the whirlwind appears in another creatures space, or when it enters a creatures space for the first time on a turn, the creature makes a DC 18 Strength check, becoming restrained by the whirlwind on a failure. The whirlwind may restrain one creature at a time. A creature within 5 feet of the whirlwind (including the restrained creature) can use an action to make a DC 18 Strength check, freeing the restrained creature on a success. A freed creature can move to an unoccupied space within 5 feet of the whirlwind.

8e29f7d7-4123-51fe-997b-bb5453bdd766.description: The doppelganger changes its form to that of any Small or Medium humanoid creature it has seen before, or back into its true form. While shapeshifted, its statistics are the same. Any equipment is not transformed. It reverts to its true form if it dies.

The cult fanatic is a 4th level spellcaster. Their spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 12 +4to hit with spell attacks). They have the following cleric spells prepared:

- **Cantrips** (at will): Light, Sacred Flame, Thaumaturgy
- **1st-Level** (4 slots): Ceremony, Command, Detect Evil and Good, Inflict Wounds
- **2nd-Level** (3 slots): Blindness/Deafness, Hold Person

c2e8f612-02b3-51f5-8db8-a5cf67ac7e85.description:
The dragon turtles spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 17). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no components:
- **3/Day Each:** Control Weather, Water Breathing, Zone of Truth

a4d2cb94-0597-5dc6-895f-c8a0ac32649e.name: Bite (Dragon Turtle)
a4d2cb94-0597-5dc6-895f-c8a0ac32649e.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +13 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 52 (7d12 + 7) piercing damage. If the target is a creature  it is grappled (escape DC 21). Until this grapple ends  the dragon turtle can't bite a different creature  and it has advantage on bite attacks against the grappled creature.

dda59556-a4ed-5276-b451-a3c4a3b425a3.name: Lightning Storm
dda59556-a4ed-5276-b451-a3c4a3b425a3.description: Hundreds of arcs of lightning crackle from the dragon turtle. Each creature within 90 feet makes a DC 17 Dexterity saving throw  taking 35 (10d6) lightning damage on a failure or half damage on a success.

5f070986-194c-5081-a316-576939c1eb62.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +13 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 46 (6d12 + 7) bludgeoning damage. This attack deals double damage against objects  vehicles  and constructs.

3750f7e0-1de5-525c-9b22-ed2d463246f2.name: Retract
3750f7e0-1de5-525c-9b22-ed2d463246f2.description: When the dragon turtle takes 50 damage or more from a single attack or spell, it retracts its head and limbs into its shell. It immediately regains 20 hit points. While retracted, it is blinded; its Speed is 0; it can't take reactions; it has advantage on saving throws; attacks against it have disadvantage; and it has resistance to all damage. The dragon turtle stays retracted until the beginning of its next turn.

58dcf45e-cabc-590c-ac8f-79aa4adc3f93.name: Elemental Nature (Drainpipe Gargoyle)

951ae42b-803a-5b69-9035-c895fa0c00ef.description: The gargoyle spits a steam of water 5 feet wide and 30 feet long. Each creature in the area makes a DC 12 Strength saving throw  taking 10 (3d6) bludgeoning damage and being pushed up to 15 feet from the gargoyle on a failure. On a success  a creature takes half damage.

fcdf6dda-b687-57d1-b906-a9013d024a80.description: The dread knight and allies within 30 feet have advantage on saving throws against spells and other magic effects and against features that turn undead. Other creatures of the dread knights choice within 30 feet have disadvantage on saving throws against spells and other magic effects.

7d3f8a7e-6045-5d05-98a3-d60b86617eab.description: The dread knight ends all spell effects created by a 5th-level or lower spell slot on a creature, object, or point within 30 feet.

9e06b5c6-2845-50e3-ae10-45e78c819170.name: Cursed Greatsword
9e06b5c6-2845-50e3-ae10-45e78c819170.description: The dread knight makes a cursed greatsword attack.

d2ebac78-d89c-5e3c-be88-cc709861d3e4.name: Fire Blast (Dread Knight)
d2ebac78-d89c-5e3c-be88-cc709861d3e4.description: A fiery mote streaks from the dread knights finger to a point within 120 feet and blossoms into a 20-foot-radius sphere of black fire which spreads around corners. Each creature within the area makes a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw  taking 63 (18d6) fire damage on a failed saving throw or half damage on a success. This damage ignores fire resistance and treats immunity to fire damage as fire resistance.

f2c98af7-516f-5f03-acd7-d060434602e6.name: Ice Wall
f2c98af7-516f-5f03-acd7-d060434602e6.description: The dread knight magically creates a wall of ice on a solid surface it can see within 60 feet. The wall is flat  1 foot thick  and can be up to 50 feet long and 15 feet high. The wall lasts for 1 minute or until destroyed. Each 10-foot section has AC 12  30 hit points  vulnerability to fire damage  and immunity to cold  necrotic  poison  and psychic damage.

10dc4310-c8ef-544f-8404-6847d9571599.name: Soul Wrack

2047b15d-b132-5053-b60c-67abe797b374.name: Summon Fiendish Steed
2047b15d-b132-5053-b60c-67abe797b374.description: A fell nightmare or wyvern magically appears in an empty space within 5 feet. The steed follows the dread knights commands and acts on its turn. It may attack on the turn on which it is summoned. It remains until the dread knight dismisses it as an action or it is killed.

5b4b9ded-6086-5d32-bdfa-d54b8f797987.name: Legion
5b4b9ded-6086-5d32-bdfa-d54b8f797987.description: The dread knights sword is a +3 greatsword that grants a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls when it attacks with its cursed greatsword. A humanoid killed by damage from this sword rises the next dusk as a zombie. While attuned to the sword, the dread knight can use a bonus action to command zombies created in this way.

566f16a6-0981-5f4b-8ca7-1fc22559b9b6.name: Regeneration (Dread Troll)
566f16a6-0981-5f4b-8ca7-1fc22559b9b6.description: The troll regains 10 hit points at the start of its turn. If the troll takes acid or fire damage, this trait doesnt function on its next turn. The troll dies only if it starts its turn with 0 hit points and doesnt regenerate.

9a2e4ca6-bf72-52d6-bdaa-c500a4b77b71.description: The drop bear takes no damage from falling 40 feet or fewer and deals an extra 7 (2d6) damage when it hits with an attack after falling at least 20 feet. A creature that takes this extra damage is knocked prone.

97507a1d-8221-5058-92e2-6eefd2ef748a.name: Spellcasting (Druid)
97507a1d-8221-5058-92e2-6eefd2ef748a.description:
The druid is a 4th level spellcaster. Their spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 12 +4to hit with spell attacks). They have the following druid spells prepared:

- **Cantrips** (at will): Druidcraft, Produce Flame, Shillelagh
- **1st-Level** (4 slots): Entangle, Longstrider, Speak with Animals, Thunderwave
- **2nd-Level** (3 slots): Animal Messenger, Barkskin

1a8ebff0-443c-5b3c-93a7-c7642df54675.name: Beast Form (Druid)
1a8ebff0-443c-5b3c-93a7-c7642df54675.description: The druid magically transforms into a Large or smaller beast or back into their true form. While in beast form  they retain their game statistics can't cast spells  and can't speak. The druids Speed increases by 10 feet  and when appropriate to their beast form they gain climb  fly  or swim speeds of 40 feet. Any equipment the druid is wearing or wielding merges into their new form.

9f81d37c-f4fc-5886-bb0b-ffb976703303.name: Entangle
9f81d37c-f4fc-5886-bb0b-ffb976703303.description: (1st-Level; V, S, Concentration) Vines erupt in a 20-foot square centered on a spot on the ground within 120 feet. The area is difficult terrain for 1 minute. Each creature in the area when the spell is cast makes a DC 12 Strength saving throw. On a failure  it is restrained by vines. A creature restrained in this way can use its action to make a Strength check (DC 12)  freeing itself on a success.

b9fab893-cf36-59dd-bcbd-36e72e06d074.description: Once per turn, the dryad can use 10 feet of movement to enter a living tree and emerge from another living tree within 60 feet. Both trees must be at least Large.

c9f10bd8-8bbc-5d9a-a1d4-aa3d8f3d8f53.name: Entangling Plants
c9f10bd8-8bbc-5d9a-a1d4-aa3d8f3d8f53.description: Plants magically erupt from the ground in a 20-foot radius around a point up to 120 feet from the dryad. A creature can use its action to make a DC 12 Strength check  freeing itself or a creature within 5 feet on a success. Additionally  the area is difficult terrain for 1 minute.

A creature can use its action to make a DC 12 Strength check  freeing itself or a creature within 5 feet on a success. Additionally  the area is difficult terrain for 1 minute.

7670b4e0-4564-5335-b885-4c70ee9dbd7b.name: Fey Charm
7670b4e0-4564-5335-b885-4c70ee9dbd7b.description: A humanoid or beast within 30 feet makes a DC 13 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure  it is magically charmed. While charmed in this way  the target regards the dryad as a trusted ally and is disposed to interpret the dryads requests and actions favorably. The creature can repeat this saving throw if the dryad or the dryads allies harm it  ending the effect on a success. Otherwise  the effect lasts 24 hours. If the creature succeeds on a saving throw against Fey Charm or the effect ends for it  it is immune to Fey Charm for 24 hours.

ef450663-aa7e-503e-ad51-fb2e11ef6b53.name: Riposte (Duelist)
ef450663-aa7e-503e-ad51-fb2e11ef6b53.description: When the duelist is missed by a melee attack by an attacker they can see within 5 feet, the duelist makes a rapier attack against the attacker with advantage.

b942f917-9a9b-5cb4-8104-5e3ef8a86f1e.name: Death Burst
b942f917-9a9b-5cb4-8104-5e3ef8a86f1e.description: When the mephit dies, it explodes into dust. Each creature within 5 feet makes a DC 10 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, the creature is blinded until the end of its next turn.

01f125c8-ed6f-5253-a8f7-4914e53f71fb.name: Elemental Nature (Dust Mephit)

d98a313a-854f-560e-b84e-479003a1eea2.description: The mephit exhales a 15-foot cone of dust. Each creature in the area makes a DC 10 Constitution saving throw. On a failure  the creature is blinded for 1 minute. It repeats the saving throw at the end of each of its turns  ending the effect on itself on a success.

ee646ac6-102b-51d8-a80e-7cf8cefebf07.description: The dragon breathes scouring sand and stones in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area makes a DC 12 Dexterity saving throw  taking 10 (3d6) slashing damage on a failed save or half damage on a success.

eb700241-ad9b-58ec-9547-98647ce07f9e.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one Large or smaller creature. Until this grapple ends  the elemental can't burrow or use Earths Embrace and its slam attacks are made with advantage against the grappled target.

2dedf72b-6040-5a93-a6b6-51b2406e969f.name: Innate Spellcasting (Efreeti)
2dedf72b-6040-5a93-a6b6-51b2406e969f.description:
The efreetis innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 15). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

- **At Will:** Alter Self (can assume Medium or Large form), Detect Magic,
- **3/Day Each:** Creation, Gaseous Form, Major Image, Tongues
- **1/Day Each:** Conjure Elemental (fire elemental only), Plane Shift (to Elemental Plane of Fire only)

9a881aa9-2000-59d3-ae3d-e6e61ffa7017.name: Brass Sword
9a881aa9-2000-59d3-ae3d-e6e61ffa7017.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d8 + 6) slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) fire damage.

f5bd14f1-72a5-5563-851e-f02c7a3f6590.name: Fiery Wall
f5bd14f1-72a5-5563-851e-f02c7a3f6590.description: An opaque wall of magical flame rises from the ground within 60 feet. The wall is 6 inches thick and can be up to 20 feet high and 30 feet long. Each creature within the wall when it appears makes a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw, taking 18 (4d8) fire damage on a failed save or half damage on a success. A creature also takes 18 (4d8) fire damage when it enters the wall for the first time on a turn or ends its turn there. The wall disappears when the efreet is killed or incapacitated, or when it uses an action to dismiss it.

32ff0808-3dde-5a41-b81e-cdc5e32dd4e1.description: The efreeti makes two brass sword attacks or hurls flame twice. The efreeti can replace one attack with a kick.

1b459de3-02ae-5ae5-9af5-f9f27ce7b30a.name: Multiattack (Elder Black Pudding)
1b459de3-02ae-5ae5-9af5-f9f27ce7b30a.description: The pudding makes two pseudopod attacks. The pudding can't use Multiattack after it splits for the first time.

26e20aeb-b661-56ec-8645-fd0a142afce2.name: Blood Frenzy
26e20aeb-b661-56ec-8645-fd0a142afce2.description: While bloodied, the vampire can take 3 legendary actions instead of 1.

attributes.description: While bloodied, the vampire can take 3 legendary actions instead of 1.

c97c643e-4956-50ec-8998-82d2ad60818e.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day) (Elder Vampire)
c97c643e-4956-50ec-8998-82d2ad60818e.description: When the vampire fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead. When it does so, it visibly grows older. Its original appearance is restored when it finishes a long rest.

attributes.description: When the vampire fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead. When it does so, it visibly grows older. Its original appearance is restored when it finishes a long rest.

081e465e-6c71-5426-870c-981dc8a9d3a4.name: Misty Recovery
081e465e-6c71-5426-870c-981dc8a9d3a4.description: When the vampire drops to 0 hit points, instead of falling unconscious, it turns into mist as if it had used the Mist Form legendary action. It can't revert to its vampire form, and it must reach its resting place within 2 hours or be destroyed. Once in its resting place, it reverts to vampire form and is paralyzed for 1 hour, at which time it regains 1 hit point. While paralyzed in this way, it can be destroyed by fire damage, radiant damage, damage from a magical weapon, or a wooden stake driven through the heart, but it is otherwise immune to damage.

eed3bb6a-fa26-5fe7-877d-f298e78e7797.name: Regeneration (Elder Vampire)
eed3bb6a-fa26-5fe7-877d-f298e78e7797.description: The vampire regains 20 hit points at the start of its turn if it has at least 1 hit point and hasnt taken radiant damage since its last turn.

attributes.description: The vampire regains 20 hit points at the start of its turn if it has at least 1 hit point and hasnt taken radiant damage since its last turn.

38cf672d-3e71-58f0-944d-f4a9b3725631.name: Resting Place
38cf672d-3e71-58f0-944d-f4a9b3725631.description: Every vampires lair contains a resting place, usually a coffin or sarcophagus, where the vampire must rest for at least an hour each day to recuperate its powers. This resting place is sprinkled with soil from its mortal homeland. If this soil is scattered or is subjected to a Bless, Hallow, or similar spell, the vampire is destroyed when reduced to 0 hit points.

8ead0401-6cc9-54d4-82a5-5cd928c04095.name: Spider Climb (Elder Vampire)
8ead0401-6cc9-54d4-82a5-5cd928c04095.description: The vampire can climb even on difficult surfaces and upside down on ceilings.

38619a18-a0eb-54fa-acbc-8c644f3d6c17.name: Vampire Weaknesses
38619a18-a0eb-54fa-acbc-8c644f3d6c17.description: Vampires most common weaknesses are sunlight and running water. When the vampire ends its turn in contact with one of its weaknesses (such as being bathed in sunlight or running water), it takes 20 radiant damage. While in contact with its weakness, it can't use its Regeneration trait or its Mist Form or Shapechange actions.

bbf1bdbe-1199-54b1-b31a-edab5c74dd5b.name: Bite (Elder Vampire)
bbf1bdbe-1199-54b1-b31a-edab5c74dd5b.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target that is grappled, incapacitated, restrained, willing, or unaware of the vampires presence. Hit: 10 (1d10 + 5) piercing damage plus 21 (6d6) necrotic damage. The targets hit point maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the necrotic damage dealt, and the vampire regains this number of hit points. The reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest. If the target is reduced to 0 hit points by this attack, it dies and rises the following night as a vampire spawn in the vampires thrall. Before the target first rises as a vampire spawn, a bless, gentle repose, or similar spell cast on the body prevents this transformation.

86704bde-e990-5856-918c-de65e18e6b40.name: Charm (Elder Vampire)
86704bde-e990-5856-918c-de65e18e6b40.description: The vampire targets a creature within 30 feet  forcing it to make a DC 16 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure  the target is charmed by the vampire for 24 hours. While charmed it regards the vampire as a trusted friend and is a willing target for the vampires bite. The target repeats the saving throw each time it takes damage  ending the effect on itself on a success. If the targets saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it  it is immune to this vampires Charm for 24 hours.

b260e757-3a73-57bb-b2c7-a575abd34c24.name: Hissing Scuttle

58eb7668-07e1-5aa2-a2cb-490136e35a18.name: Mist Form
58eb7668-07e1-5aa2-a2cb-490136e35a18.description: The vampire transforms into a mist or back into its true form. As mist, the vampire has a flying speed of 30, can't speak, can't take actions or manipulate objects, is immune to nonmagical damage from weapons, and has advantage on saving throws and Stealth checks. It can pass through a space as narrow as 1 inch without squeezing but can't pass through water. Anything its carrying transforms with it.

d05dafc1-e878-51aa-ba91-178a51a2996f.name: Shapechange
d05dafc1-e878-51aa-ba91-178a51a2996f.description: The vampire transforms into the shape of a Medium or smaller beast or back into its true form. While transformed, it has the beasts size and movement modes. It can't use reactions or legendary actions, and can't speak. Otherwise, it uses the vampires statistics. Anything its carrying transforms with it.

0e59870d-7ef9-59b1-8cf3-53caf2912dc8.name: Lasso
0e59870d-7ef9-59b1-8cf3-53caf2912dc8.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: The target is entangled by the lasso. While entangled  it can't move more than 15 feet away from the erinyes. The entanglement ends if the erinyes releases the lasso or becomes incapacitated  or if the lasso is destroyed. The lasso is an object with AC 12 and 20 HP and is immune to piercing  poison  psychic  and thunder damage. The entanglement also ends if the target or a creature within 5 feet of it uses an action to succeed on a DC 16 Athletics or Acrobatics check to remove the lasso. The erinyes can't make a lasso attack while a creature is entangled.

- **50 years old, 1/Day**: Hallucinatory Terrain

4bae55ab-0171-5bdb-b89c-3474743f6acb.name: Column of Flame
4bae55ab-0171-5bdb-b89c-3474743f6acb.description: Flame erupts in a 10-foot-radius  30-foot-tall cylinder centered on a point the solar can see within 60 feet of it. Each creature in the area makes a DC 21 Dexterity saving throw  taking 21 (6d6) fire damage and 21 (6d6) radiant damage of a failure  or half as much damage on a success.

Each creature in the area makes a DC 21 Dexterity saving throw  taking 21 (6d6) fire damage and 21 (6d6) radiant damage of a failure  or half as much damage on a success.

08ae4ff4-803a-57d3-bfa1-a28c9d1f3501.name: Deafening Command
08ae4ff4-803a-57d3-bfa1-a28c9d1f3501.description: The solar speaks an echoing command. Each creature of the solars choice within 30 feet that can hear the solar and understands a language makes a DC 24 Charisma saving throw. Each creature that succeeds on the saving throw takes 21 (6d6) thunder damage. Each creature that fails its saving throw immediately takes a certain action, depending on the solars command. This is a magical charm effect.

7f831176-a788-5bac-932b-7c16cf5f0848.name: Forceful Parry
7f831176-a788-5bac-932b-7c16cf5f0848.description: When a creature misses the solar with a melee attack, the solars parrying sword sparks with energy. The attacker takes 21 (6d6) lightning damage and makes a DC 24 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, it is pushed 10 feet away and falls prone.

6c0327fa-0f3d-5250-824b-5db6c1c8234f.name: Heal (Fallen Solar)
6c0327fa-0f3d-5250-824b-5db6c1c8234f.description: The solar touches a creature other than itself, magically healing 60 hit points of damage and ending any blindness, curse, deafness, disease, or poison on the target.

d5df97ac-77a9-54b5-bd9f-83b1fce2d60b.name: Holy Sword

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +16 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 23 (4d6 + 9) slashing damage plus 21 (6d6) radiant damage.

90fdbda1-5a74-52bf-aae6-d58cbac44e5e.name: Multiattack (Fallen Solar)
90fdbda1-5a74-52bf-aae6-d58cbac44e5e.description: The solar attacks twice with its holy sword.

709a93bd-9967-5a31-96e8-6437ae181307.name: Teleport (Fallen Solar)
709a93bd-9967-5a31-96e8-6437ae181307.description: The solar magically teleports up to 120 feet to an empty space it can see.

687950b3-0c97-593c-8212-0a5d5d470cd4.description: The nightmare radiates an Evil aura.

attributes.description: The nightmare radiates an Evil aura.

4ef10297-e645-5d60-8def-ba53ff3fe839.name: Fiery Hooves
4ef10297-e645-5d60-8def-ba53ff3fe839.description: The nightmare sheds bright light in a 10-foot radius and dim light for an additional 10 feet. The nightmare leaves charred hoofprints.
