82db292f-8ebe-5559-8831-1c13ae955632.name: Fiery Trail
82db292f-8ebe-5559-8831-1c13ae955632.description: When the nightmare moves along the ground, it can choose to leave behind a trail of fire 10 feet wide and 10 feet tall, which lasts until the beginning of the nightmares next turn. A creature that begins its turn in the fire or enters it for the first time on a turn takes 10 (3d6) fire damage. The trail ignites flammable objects.

72929f57-8792-5578-96b2-9e9a7a15e227.name: Fire Resistance
72929f57-8792-5578-96b2-9e9a7a15e227.description: The nightmare can grant fire resistance to a rider.

0e8afa13-c399-54e6-b3d5-1d60f7ebacc5.description: The nightmare gains telepathy with a range of 120 feet. It can telepathically communicate with the fiend that trained it over any distance as long as they are on the same plane of existence.

2cab740f-aca7-587e-95ef-46ed71f6468b.name: Ethereal Shift

c3ba4380-22af-54ba-b6c5-83632ad2314c.name: Hooves (Fell Nightmare)
c3ba4380-22af-54ba-b6c5-83632ad2314c.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) bludgeoning damage plus 7 (2d6) fire damage. If the horse moves at least 20 feet straight towards the target before the attack  the target makes a DC 14 Strength saving throw  falling prone on a failure. The nightmare can move through the space of a prone creature as long as it does not end its turn there.

c15e6cc7-5c9c-5d71-8c9c-4732a656c30f.name: Faerie Form (Fey Knight)
c15e6cc7-5c9c-5d71-8c9c-4732a656c30f.description: The knight can magically change its size between Medium and Tiny as an action. While tiny, the bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage dealt by the knights attacks is halved. Additionally, it has disadvantage on Strength checks and advantage on Dexterity checks. Its statistics are otherwise unchanged.

d60196bd-76a0-5896-bfac-666fb3d54322.name: Faerie Light (Fey Knight)
d60196bd-76a0-5896-bfac-666fb3d54322.description: As a bonus action, the knight can cast dim light for 30 feet, or extinguish its glow.

374b2507-7de8-5b9e-9806-daf65d70363f.name: Fey Glamour
374b2507-7de8-5b9e-9806-daf65d70363f.description: The knight targets one humanoid within 30 feet. The target makes a DC 13 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure  it is magically charmed by the knight for 1 day. If the knight or one of the knights allies harms the target  the target repeats the saving throw  ending the effect on itself on a success. If a targets saving throw is successful  or if the effect ends for it  the creature is immune to this knights Fey Charm for a year and a day.

b775b7aa-691f-5734-a9ba-ab3608de2063.name: Natures Shield
b775b7aa-691f-5734-a9ba-ab3608de2063.description: When the knight would be hit by an attack while the knight is within 5 feet of a tree or other large plant, the knights AC magically increases by 3 against that attack as the plant interposes branches or vines between the knight and the attacker.

3a3c2c47-f7c1-507d-ac8a-af0c20038ead.description: A creature that ends its turn within 5 feet of the fire elemental takes 5 (1d10) fire damage. A creature that touches the elemental or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 5 (1d10) fire damage. The elemental sheds bright light in a 30-foot radius and dim light for an additional 30 feet.

9a48115e-b1d5-504c-8de6-ee01543b7167.description: The elemental takes 6 (1d12) cold damage if it enters a body of water or starts its turn in a body of water, is splashed with at least 5 gallons of water, or is hit by a water elementals slam attack.

91b61dec-2e89-5619-af51-8e0c8822eae8.description: The elemental moves up to half its Speed without provoking opportunity attacks. It can enter the spaces of hostile creatures but not end this movement there. When a creature shares its space with the elemental for the first time during this movement  the creature is subject to the elementals Fiery Aura and the elemental can make a slam attack against that creature.

29867396-cd17-566a-832e-8b9b41f4a624.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 28 (6d6 + 7) slashing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature  it makes a DC 19 Strength saving throw. On a failure  it is pushed up to 10 feet away from the giant and knocked prone.

f070e238-a33e-5a45-9e94-a33066f67698.description: When hit by a melee attack by a Medium or smaller creature the giant can see within 10 feet, the giant kicks its attacker. 98ca29fd-b057-5ff5-b0b3-029cccc46b96.description: The greatswords of each fire giant of the giants choice within 30 feet magically kindle into flame. For the next minute  each of their greatsword attacks deal an extra 7 (2d6) fire damage.

While berserk, the guardian attacks the nearest creature it can see. If it can't reach a creature, it attacks an object. The guardian stays berserk until it is destroyed or restored to full hit points.

3f679f09-033f-5b3b-bbf9-8e17438fba19.description: The flumph can breathe air and water.

e37a0517-9b71-593b-89be-32de378a4831.description: As a bonus action, the flumph can cast dim light for 30 feet, or extinguish its glow. The flumph can change the color of the light it casts at will.

ec60950e-9d9d-5b05-86b7-a855fdf3f5df.name: Telepathic Spy
ec60950e-9d9d-5b05-86b7-a855fdf3f5df.description: The flumph can perceive any telepathic messages sent or received within 60 feet, and can't be surprised by creatures with telepathy. The flumph is also immune to divination and to any effect that would sense its emotions or read its thoughts, except for the Telepathic Spy feature of another flumph.

9e387ae5-271f-5bdc-84bc-ff4f1790b387.description: If a flumph is knocked prone, it lands upside down and is incapacitated. At the end of each of its turns, it can make a DC 10 Dexterity saving throw, flipping itself over and ending the incapacitated condition on a success.

d74d39d2-3c0a-540e-9e8f-dd2de8dcc892.description: The snake doesnt provoke opportunity attacks when it flies out of a creatures reach.

3ba2ac7b-6b7a-5e3a-9913-2a249c18f832.name: Eye Vulnerability
3ba2ac7b-6b7a-5e3a-9913-2a249c18f832.description: A creature can target the fomorians eye with an attack. This attack is made with disadvantage. If the attack hits and deals at least 10 damage, creatures affected by the fomorians Charming and Mesmerizing Gaze are freed from those effects.

45adebec-4db5-59d4-a7f1-158fc4098dd1.name: Immortal Nature (Fomorian)
45adebec-4db5-59d4-a7f1-158fc4098dd1.description: A titan doesnt require air, sustenance, or sleep.

attributes.description: A titan doesnt require air, sustenance, or sleep.

54bc63c9-11dd-59a0-afa8-d5d03d103fc0.name: Charming Gaze
54bc63c9-11dd-59a0-afa8-d5d03d103fc0.description: A creature within 60 feet makes a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, the creature is magically charmed by the fomorian. The creature repeats the saving throw every 24 hours and whenever it takes damage. On a successful saving throw or if the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to any fomorians Charming Gaze for the next 24 hours.

30c143e8-357b-5567-93bc-e22a77a600c2.name: Immortal Form (Fomorian)
30c143e8-357b-5567-93bc-e22a77a600c2.description: While in its lair, the fomorian magically changes into a specific Medium humanoid resembling a human or back to its true form. Apart from its size, its statistics are unchanged. The fomorian reverts to its true form when it dies, is incapacitated, or leaves its lair.

6b338f14-4082-5198-99a7-4c62f79584fb.name: Mesmerizing Gaze
6b338f14-4082-5198-99a7-4c62f79584fb.description: A creature within 60 feet makes a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, the creature is magically restrained. The creature repeats the saving throw at the end of its next turn, ending the effect on itself on a success and becoming paralyzed on a failure. While the fomorian is not in line of sight, a paralyzed creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on a success. On a successful saving throw or if the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to any fomorians Mesmerizing Gaze for 24 hours.

b7ef55a5-3b80-5fb4-9327-10fb4921757a.name: Multiattack (Fomorian)
b7ef55a5-3b80-5fb4-9327-10fb4921757a.description: The fomorian attacks twice with its warhammer.

54f4912e-e851-5a39-b482-11bcd6eb9d52.name: Forest Ways
54f4912e-e851-5a39-b482-11bcd6eb9d52.description: The illusionist can communicate with Small and Tiny beasts, and can innately cast Blur, Disguise Self, and Major Image once each per long rest with no material components.

attributes.description: The illusionist can communicate with Small and Tiny beasts, and can innately cast Blur, Disguise Self, and Major Image once each per long rest with no material components.

9cfe5f72-e2db-540e-b9f8-5d4c0cb46bda.name: Spellcasting (Forest Gnome Illusionist)
9cfe5f72-e2db-540e-b9f8-5d4c0cb46bda.description:
The mage is a 9th level spellcaster. Their spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save DC 14 +6 to hit with spell attacks). They have the following wizard spells prepared:

- **Cantrips** (at will): Fire Bolt, Light, Mage Hand, Prestidigitation
- **1st-Level** (4 slots): Detect Magic, Identify, Mage Armor, Shield
- **2nd-Level** (3 slots): Alter Self, Misty Step
- **3rd-Level** (3 slots): Hypnotic Pattern, Counterspell, Fireball
- **4th-Level** (3 slots): Dimension Door, Greater Invisibility
- **5th-Level** (1 slot): Cone of Cold

059e74f6-a8a7-50cf-a963-4b9b4d939079.name: Cone of Cold (Forest Gnome Illusionist)
059e74f6-a8a7-50cf-a963-4b9b4d939079.description: (5th-Level; V, S, M) Frost blasts from the mage in a 60-foot cone. Each creature in the area makes a DC 17 Constitution saving throw  taking 36 (8d8) cold damage on a failure or half damage on a success.

attributes.description: (5th-Level; V, S, M) Frost blasts from the mage in a 60-foot cone. Each creature in the area makes a DC 17 Constitution saving throw  taking 36 (8d8) cold damage on a failure or half damage on a success.

8fa4e27d-5746-51f7-852b-237711364019.name: Counterspell (Forest Gnome Illusionist)
8fa4e27d-5746-51f7-852b-237711364019.description: (3rd-Level; S) When a creature the mage can see within 60 feet casts a spell, the mage attempts to interrupt it. If the creature is casting a 2nd-level spell or lower, the spell fails. If the creature is casting a 3rd-level or higher spell, the mage makes an Intelligence check against a DC of 10 + the spells level. On a success, the spell fails, and the spellcasting creature can use its reaction to try to cast a second spell with the same casting time so long as it uses a spell slot level equal to or less than half the original spell slot. If the mage casts counterspell with a higher spell slot, the interrupted spell fails if its level is less than that of counterspell.

9ba5afa2-5166-58fd-92be-e0ef269ab2bf.description: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage.

8152292d-da23-5034-a724-7176c44444e6.description: (4th-Level; V) The mage teleports to a location within 500 feet. They can bring along one willing Medium or smaller creature within 5 feet. If a creature would teleport to an occupied space  it takes 14 (4d6) force damage  and the spell fails.

50fc20cd-9798-50f8-8b65-346672a28bd3.name: Fire Bolt (Forest Gnome Illusionist)

f1e39d35-6618-59b2-986f-708e83072437.name: Fireball
f1e39d35-6618-59b2-986f-708e83072437.description: (3rd-Level; V, S, M) Fire streaks from the mage to a point within 120 feet and explodes in a 20-foot radius  spreading around corners. Each creature in the area makes a DC 14 Dexterity saving throw  taking 21 (6d6) fire damage on a failed save or half damage on a success.

a5b41b73-453b-5434-927a-7f67a530e6a3.name: Greater Invisibility
a5b41b73-453b-5434-927a-7f67a530e6a3.description: (4th-Level; V, S, Concentration) The mage or a creature they touch is invisible for 1 minute.

68eace65-711e-5769-88d9-ea150e46bf31.name: Hypnotic Pattern (Forest Gnome Illusionist)
68eace65-711e-5769-88d9-ea150e46bf31.description: (3rd-Level; S, M, Concentration) A swirling pattern of light appears at a point within 120 feet. Each creature within 10 feet of the pattern that can see it makes a DC 17 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure  the creature is charmed for 1 minute. While charmed  the creature is incapacitated and its Speed is 0. The effect ends on a creature if it takes damage or if another creature uses an action to shake it out of its daze.

ae67bd57-0210-5519-b56e-a1418eb34083.name: Flawed Spellcasting
ae67bd57-0210-5519-b56e-a1418eb34083.description: The gods innate spellcasting ability is Wisdom (save DC 17).The god can try to cast Flame Strikeor Spirit Guardians at will with no material component. When the god tries to cast the spell, roll 1d6. On a 1, 2, or 3 on the die, the spell visibly fails and has no effect. The gods action for the turn is not wasted, but it can't be used to cast a spell.

f12d68d6-7b75-5a20-8932-9f792070e4e7.description: When the god fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead. When it does so, it seems to flicker and shrink, as if it is using up its essence.

5f622c72-480f-5131-b27b-ad92f2901db6.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d8 + 5) damage (damage type based on the form of the weapon or implement) plus 3 (1d6) radiant damage.

e7cc76de-bafc-54d2-b613-0c6596b607f8.description: (5th-Level; V, S) A 10-foot-radius  40-foot-high column of divine flame appears centered on a point the god can see within 60 feet. Each creature in the area makes a DC 17 Dexterity saving throw  taking 14 (4d6) fire damage and 14 (4d6) radiant damage on a failed save  or half damage on a success.

102c61c9-2f13-59e9-ab1c-dadaf03c01e4.name: Spirit Guardians
102c61c9-2f13-59e9-ab1c-dadaf03c01e4.description: (3rd-Level; V, S, Concentration) Spirits of former divine servants surround the god in a 10-foot radius for 10 minutes. The god can choose creatures they can see to be unaffected by the spell. Other creatures treat the area as difficult terrain  and when a creature enters the area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there  it makes a DC DC 17 Wisdom saving throw  taking 10 (3d6) radiant damage on a failed save or half damage on a success.

912560a6-4aaa-5b91-b1ef-aa0e467f999b.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, range 60/240 ft., one target. Hit: 37 (9d6 + 6) bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature  it makes a DC 18 Strength saving throw  falling prone on a failure. In lieu of a rock  the giant can throw a grappled Medium or smaller creature up to 40 feet. On a hit  the target and the thrown creature both take 19 (4d6 + 5) bludgeoning damage. On a miss  only the thrown creature takes the damage. The thrown creature falls prone in an unoccupied space 5 feet from the target.

d911f4ca-628e-5e60-8c9a-a652d13d2c68.description: A creature that enters the cubes space is subjected to the saving throw and consequences of its Engulf attack.

88ead6ed-6d98-512d-aeca-e649caf1e5b5.name: Sunlight Sensitivity (Gelatinous Cube)
88ead6ed-6d98-512d-aeca-e649caf1e5b5.description: While in sunlight, the cube has disadvantage on attack rolls.

b664ed2c-2bac-526b-bf7e-94539b5fe8cc.name: Transparent
b664ed2c-2bac-526b-bf7e-94539b5fe8cc.description: While the cube is motionless, creatures unaware of its presence must succeed on a DC 15 Perception check to spot it.

8d7bce2c-8f56-5329-ada6-40a7432360e6.name: Engulf
8d7bce2c-8f56-5329-ada6-40a7432360e6.description: The cube moves up to its Speed. While doing so  it can enter Large or smaller creatures spaces. Whenever the cube enters a creatures space  the creature makes a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw. If the creature is unaware of the cubes presence  it makes its saving throw against Engulf with disadvantage. On a success  the creature may use its reaction  if available  to move up to half its Speed without provoking opportunity attacks. If the creature doesnt move  it is engulfed by the cube.

85115fdb-1b19-5031-bf4e-d8a176855ba3.name: Stench
85115fdb-1b19-5031-bf4e-d8a176855ba3.description: A creature that starts its turn within 5 feet of the ghast makes a DC 10 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, it is poisoned until the start of its next turn. On a success, it is immune to any ghasts Stench for 24 hours.

43abb944-ad0b-5594-ab5c-90b109102cb8.name: Paralyzing Claw
43abb944-ad0b-5594-ab5c-90b109102cb8.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) slashing damage. If the target is a living creature  it makes a DC 10 Constitution saving throw. On a failure  the target is paralyzed for 1 minute. The target repeats the saving throw at the end of its turns  ending the effect on itself on a success. If the targets saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it  it is immune to any Paralyzing Claw for 24 hours.

4ed118db-88db-5de8-bea7-3b11e27caed5.description: The ghost can move through creatures and objects. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

68dc4559-4afc-5740-b491-59efe9dfe59e.name: Unquiet Spirit (Ghost)
68dc4559-4afc-5740-b491-59efe9dfe59e.description: If defeated in combat, the ghost returns in 24 hours. It can be put to rest permanently only by finding and casting Remove Curse on its remains or by resolving the unfinished business that keeps it from journeying to the afterlife.

3e9aa851-5eb6-51c0-bc65-45757d781fd9.name: Ethereal Jaunt
3e9aa851-5eb6-51c0-bc65-45757d781fd9.description: The ghost magically shifts from the Material Plane to the Ethereal Plane or vice versa. If it wishes  it can be visible to creatures on one plane while on the other.

aae99bb5-180e-594f-93ed-e29bca8d5baf.name: Horrifying Visage
aae99bb5-180e-594f-93ed-e29bca8d5baf.description: If the ghost takes damage from an attack or spell, it uses Horrifying Visage.

attributes.description: If the ghost takes damage from an attack or spell, it uses Horrifying Visage.

07b3f934-6e64-535c-965c-aed0d1b7b3da.name: Possession
07b3f934-6e64-535c-965c-aed0d1b7b3da.description: One humanoid within 5 feet makes a DC 13 Charisma saving throw. On a failure  it is possessed by the ghost. The possessed creature is unconscious. The ghost enters the creatures body and takes control of it. The ghost can be targeted only by effects that turn undead  and it retains its Intelligence  Wisdom  and Charisma. It grants its host body immunity to being charmed and frightened. It otherwise uses the possessed creatures statistics and actions instead of its own. It doesnt gain access to the creatures memories but does gain access to proficiencies  nonmagical class features and traits  and nonmagical actions. It can't use limited-used abilities or class traits that require spending a resource. The possession ends after 24 hours  when the body drops to 0 hit points  when the ghost ends it as a bonus action  or when the ghost is turned or affected by dispel evil and good or a similar effect. Additionally  the possessed creature repeats its saving throw whenever it takes damage. When the possession ends  the ghost reappears in a space within 5 feet of the body. A creature is immune to this ghosts Possession for 24 hours after succeeding on its saving throw or after the possession ends.

3f4acf5f-af7a-5664-965f-fd31bf256bd3.name: Swallow
3f4acf5f-af7a-5664-965f-fd31bf256bd3.description: The frog makes a bite attack against a Small or smaller creature it is grappling. If the attack hits and the frog has not swallowed another creature  the target is swallowed and the grapple ends. A swallowed creature has total cover from attacks from outside the frog  it is blinded and restrained  and it takes 5 (2d4) acid damage at the beginning of each of the frogs turns. If the frog dies  the target is no longer swallowed.

If the poison damage reduces the target to 0 hit points  the target is made stable but poisoned for 1 hour  even if it regains hit points  and it is paralyzed while poisoned in this way.

While grappling a target  a pincer can't attack a different target. If the same creature is grappled by both of the glabrezus pincers  it must escape from each of them separately.

On a failure  the creature is petrified. This petrification can be removed with greater restoration or similar magic.

On a failure  a creature is restrained as it begins to turn to stone. At the beginning of the gorgons next turn  the creature repeats the saving throw. On a success  the effect ends. On a failure  the creature is petrified. This petrification can be removed with greater restoration or similar magic.

175e695e-ae8b-55eb-9298-a0f477de9ec8.name: Trample Underfoot (Gorgon)
175e695e-ae8b-55eb-9298-a0f477de9ec8.description: The gorgon attacks a prone creature with its hooves.

attributes.description: The gorgon attacks a prone creature with its hooves.

36fe629d-2a8d-56d7-9381-20e8a5bad531.name: Amorphous (Gray Ooze)
36fe629d-2a8d-56d7-9381-20e8a5bad531.description: The ooze can pass through an opening as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

attributes.description: The ooze can pass through an opening as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

52a3f775-4c93-5f5d-9b71-b5aeb0e2f68b.name: Corrosive Body (Gray Ooze)
52a3f775-4c93-5f5d-9b71-b5aeb0e2f68b.description: A creature or a metal object that touches the ooze takes 5 (2d4) acid damage. A nonmagical weapon made of metal that hits the black pudding corrodes after dealing damage, taking a permanent -1 penalty to damage rolls per hit. If this penalty reaches -5, the weapon is destroyed. Metal nonmagical ammunition is destroyed after dealing damage.

5b05489c-4996-5f88-a647-ee2df25a43bf.name: Sunlight Sensitivity (Gray Ooze)
5b05489c-4996-5f88-a647-ee2df25a43bf.description: While in sunlight, the ooze has disadvantage on attack rolls.

c652bf3a-6585-56df-867e-764ac6a85066.name: Pseudopod (Gray Ooze)
c652bf3a-6585-56df-867e-764ac6a85066.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 3 (1d4 + 1) bludgeoning damage plus 5 (2d4) acid damage. Nonmagical metal armor worn by the target corrodes  taking a permanent -1 penalty to its AC protection per hit. If the penalty reduces the armors AC protection to 10  the armor is destroyed.

559b4c7b-6b42-58b3-b329-00bedff2f46e.name: Concentrated Acid (1/Day)
559b4c7b-6b42-58b3-b329-00bedff2f46e.description: When the dragon is first bloodied, it immediately recharges its breath weapon, if its not already available. For the next minute, the dragons acid becomes immensely more corrosive, ignoring acid resistance and treating acid immunity as acid resistance.

- **3/Day Each:**Fog Cloud, Pass Without Trace, Legend Lore, Speak with Dead
- **1/Day Each:**Create Undead, insect plague, time stop

5bf69afd-058f-5c9d-b3ba-ccf3a58aab72.name: High Voltage (1/Day)
5bf69afd-058f-5c9d-b3ba-ccf3a58aab72.description: When the dragon is first bloodied, it immediately recharges its breath weapon, if its not already available. After doing so, the air around it becomes electrically charged. A creature that starts its turn within 15 feet of the dragon or moves within 15 feet of it for the first time on a turn makes a DC 24 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, it takes 11 (2d10) lightning damage and can't take reactions until the start of its next turn. Creatures in metal armor or wielding metal weapons have disadvantage on this saving throw.

A creature that touches the dragon or hits it with a melee attack for the first time on a turn takes 10 (3d6) fire damage.

45c722db-f228-5643-b8fc-a18b1f669c9d.name: Venomous Resurgence (1/Day)
45c722db-f228-5643-b8fc-a18b1f669c9d.description: When the dragon is first bloodied, it immediately recharges its breath weapon, if its not already available. After doing so, it emanates a green gas that extends in a 15-foot radius around it. When a creature enters this area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, it makes a DC 22 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, a creature with resistance to poison damage loses it, and a creature without resistance or immunity to poison damage becomes vulnerable to poison damage instead. Either effect lasts until the start of the creatures next turn.

d89b5a4a-b309-5767-9b66-5b24d3d3b592.description: When the dragon is first bloodied, it immediately recharges its breath weapon, if its not already available. Its inner flame erupts, burning brightly in its eyes and mouth. After taking damage from its Searing Heat ability, a creature with resistance to fire damage loses it, and a creature with immunity to fire damage reduces it to resistance. Either effect lasts until the start of the creatures next turn.

- **At Will:** Detect Evil and Good, Detect Magic, Minor Illusion, Spare the Dying
- **3/Day Each:** Dispel Magic, Identify, Lesser Restoration, Remove Curse, Scrying Tongues, Zone of Truth,
- **1/Day Each:** contact other plane, flame strike, Freedom of Movement, Greater Restoration, Legend Lore, Heroes Feast

8ff5f77f-3422-547d-9354-b39ac7997a9d.description: The sphinx is immune to divination and to any effect that would sense its emotions or read its thoughts. Insight checks made to determine the sphinxs intentions are made with disadvantage.

60b4ec38-7aea-5711-afc3-d26fac9e6910.name: Legendary Resistance (1/Day)
60b4ec38-7aea-5711-afc3-d26fac9e6910.description: Each greater sphinx wears a piece of jewelry, such as a crown, headdress, or armlet. When the greater sphinx fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead. When it does so, its jewelry shatters. The sphinx can create a new piece of jewelry when it finishes a long rest.

65f215da-0c88-5f94-b58a-344d193be529.name: Demiplane
65f215da-0c88-5f94-b58a-344d193be529.description: The creatures appear in empty spaces of the sphinxs choice on a demiplane. The demiplane can be up to one square mile in size. The demiplane can appear to be inside, outside, or underground, and can contain terrain, nonmagical objects, and magical effects of the sphinxs choosing. The sphinx may populate it with creatures and hazards with a total Challenge Rating equal to or less than the sphinxs Challenge Rating.

4a0e5bc7-4159-5e47-a797-208d3bd4eb27.name: Dispel Magic
4a0e5bc7-4159-5e47-a797-208d3bd4eb27.description: (3rd-Level; V, S) The sphinx scours the magic from one creature  object  or magical effect within 120 feet that it can see. A spell ends if it was cast with a 3rd-level or lower spell slot. For spells using a 4th-level or higher spell slot  the sphinx makes a Wisdom ability check (DC 10 + the spells level) for each one  ending the effect on a success.

4783bf23-3b28-5cb3-b30c-d15f660866ce.name: Flame Strike (Greater Sphinx)
4783bf23-3b28-5cb3-b30c-d15f660866ce.description: (5th-Level; V, S) A column of divine flame fills a 10-foot-radius  40-foot-high cylinder within 60 feet. Creatures in the area make a DC 18 Dexterity saving throw  taking 14 (4d6) fire damage and 14 (4d6) radiant damage on a failure or half damage on a success.

baf4adc2-a48d-5b28-a78d-260e2a10629b.description: The sphinx targets up to eight willing creatures it can see within 300 feet. The targets are magically transported to a different place, plane of existence, demiplane, or time. This effect ends after 24 hours or when the sphinx takes a bonus action to end it. When the effect ends, the creatures reappear in their original locations, along with any items they acquired on their jaunt. While the effect lasts, the sphinx can communicate telepathically with the targets. The sphinx chooses one of the following destinations:

fbd3ade3-6618-5dcc-96d6-15a258d31368.description: The squad is composed of 5 or more guards. If it is subjected to a spell, attack, or other effect that affects only one target, it takes any damage but ignores other effects. It can share its space with Medium or smaller creatures or objects. The squad can move through any opening large enough for one Medium creature without squeezing.

f6091c37-8477-52b5-81a8-acdbc11df263.name: Rejuvenation
f6091c37-8477-52b5-81a8-acdbc11df263.description: If it dies, the naga gains a new body in 1d6 days, regaining all its hit points. This trait can be removed with a wish spell.

2cc51f04-9a58-57bc-b364-f1b98bcfb66a.name: Spellcasting (Guardian Naga)
2cc51f04-9a58-57bc-b364-f1b98bcfb66a.description:
The naga is an 11th level spellcaster. Its spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 16). The naga has the following cleric spells prepared which it can cast with only vocalized components:


- **Cantrips** (at will): Mending, Thaumaturgy
- **1st-Level** (4 slots): Command, Cure Wounds
- **2nd-Level** (3 slots): Calm Emotions, Hold Person
- **3rd-Level** (3 slots) Clairvoyance, Create Food and Water
- **4th-Level** (3 slots): Divination, freedom of movement
- **5th-Level** (2 slots): Flame Strike, Geas
- **6th-Level** (1 slot): forbiddance

327c21f8-060a-5af6-ad5e-2acb34af3039.name: Fire Breath (Half-Red Dragon Veteran)
327c21f8-060a-5af6-ad5e-2acb34af3039.description: The veteran exhales a blast of fire that fills a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area makes a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw  taking 24 (7d6) fire damage on a failed save or half damage on a success. A creature who fails the saving throw also suffers 5 (1d10) ongoing fire damage. At the end of each of its turns  it can repeat the saving throw  ending the ongoing damage on a success. This fire can also be put out in typical ways  such as immersion in water  and a creature who uses an action to drop prone can put out the fire with a DC 10 Dexterity saving throw.

ed247f75-f3ed-5004-b803-41362d43721f.description: The assassin exhales a shadowy maelstrom of anguish in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area makes a DC 12 Wisdom saving throw  taking 22 (4d8) necrotic damage on a failed save or half damage on a success.

1a7b14a2-ffe7-5033-a559-5310379ab11f.name: Luring Song
1a7b14a2-ffe7-5033-a559-5310379ab11f.description: The harpy sings a magical song. Each humanoid and giant within 300 feet that can hear it makes a DC 12 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, a creature becomes charmed until the harpy fails to use its bonus action to continue the song. While charmed by the harpy, a creature is incapacitated and ignores other harpy songs. On each of its turns, the creature moves towards the harpy by the most direct route, not avoiding opportunity attacks or hazards. The creature repeats its saving throw whenever it is damaged and before it enters damaging terrain such as lava. If a saving throw is successful or the effect ends on it, it is immune to any harpys song for the next 24 hours.

fea6fdd7-409f-581d-a53c-016a6d7fd5d0.description: Magical darkness spreads from a point within 30 feet  filling a 15-foot-radius sphere and spreading around corners. 8a73a232-fea1-5b5c-9f40-5bfbd7d36ac0.description: When hit by a melee attack, the hezrou emits a cloud of foul-smelling poison gas in a 20-foot radius. A creature can repeat this saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success

A swallowed creature has total cover from attacks from outside the hezrou  it is blinded and restrained  and it takes 17 (5d6) ongoing acid damage while swallowed.

ac3726b3-5ad4-5391-a02e-652aa48feb24.name: Spellcasting (High Priest)
ac3726b3-5ad4-5391-a02e-652aa48feb24.description:
The priest is an 11th level spellcaster. Their spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 15 +7 to hit with spell attacks). They have the following cleric spells prepared:

- **Cantrips** (at will): Light, Sacred Flame, Thaumaturgy
- **1st-Level** (4 slots): Ceremony, Detect Evil and Good, Healing Word
- **2nd-Level** (3 slots): Augury, Hold Person, Zone of Truth
- **3rd-Level** (3 slots): Daylight, Remove Curse
- **4th-Level** (3 slots): Divination, Guardian of Faith, Revivify
- **5th-Level** (2 slots): Flame Strike, Greater Restoration, Raise Dead
- **6th-Level** (1 slots): Heal

413bad8f-ad93-5217-ae68-3c63702e7d45.name: Flame Strike (High Priest)
413bad8f-ad93-5217-ae68-3c63702e7d45.description: (5th-Level; V, S, M) A column of divine flame fills a 10-foot-radius  40-foot-high cylinder within 60 feet. Creatures in the area make a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw  taking 14 (4d6) fire damage and 14 (4d6) radiant damage on a failure or half damage on a success.

f9e1cf55-cc91-5515-89f5-cbe58483dc37.name: Guardian of Faith
f9e1cf55-cc91-5515-89f5-cbe58483dc37.description: (4th-Level; V) A Large  indistinct spectral guardian appears in an unoccupied space within 30 feet and remains for 8 hours. Creatures of the priests choice that move to a space within 10 feet of the guardian for the first time on a turn make a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw  taking 20 radiant or necrotic damage (high priests choice) on a failed save or half damage on a success. The spell ends when the guardian has dealt 60 total damage.

83237a81-5852-536a-aaa7-0b03d395e976.name: Rock (Hill Giant)
83237a81-5852-536a-aaa7-0b03d395e976.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, range 60/240 ft., one target. Hit: 26 (6d6 + 5) bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature  it makes a DC 16 Strength saving throw  falling prone on a failure. In lieu of a rock  the giant can throw a grappled Medium or smaller creature up to 30 feet. On a hit  the target and the thrown creature both take 15 (3d6 + 5) bludgeoning damage. On a miss  only the thrown creature takes the damage. The thrown creature falls prone in an unoccupied space 5 feet from the target.

063e2642-ede7-594f-a4bc-90ced0ce7eee.name: Body Slam (Hill Giant Chief)
063e2642-ede7-594f-a4bc-90ced0ce7eee.description: The giant jumps up to 15 feet horizontally without provoking opportunity attacks and falls prone in a space containing one or more creatures. Each creature in its space when it lands makes a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw, taking 19 (3d8 + 6) bludgeoning damage and falling prone on a failure. On a success, the creature takes half damage and is pushed 5 feet to an unoccupied space of its choice. If that space is occupied, the creature falls prone.

fb3c321f-94a7-5d7a-b849-a6dfb99f80d2.name: Muddy Ground
fb3c321f-94a7-5d7a-b849-a6dfb99f80d2.description: Areas of unworked earth within 60 feet magically become swampy mud for 1 minute or until the giant dies. These areas become difficult terrain. Prone creatures in the area when the mud appears or that fall prone in the area make a DC 15 Strength saving throw. On a failure, the creatures Speed drops to 0 as it becomes stuck in the mud. A creature can use its action to make a DC 15 Strength check, freeing itself on a success.

If it takes damage or a creature uses an action to shake it awake  it wakes up  and the poisoned effect ends.

5b13ce9e-cba7-5207-8a2b-ab803ec63a7c.name: Band
5b13ce9e-cba7-5207-8a2b-ab803ec63a7c.description: The band is composed of 5 or more horde demons. If it is subjected to a spell, attack, or other effect that affects only one target, it takes any damage but ignores other effects. It can share its space with Medium or smaller creatures or objects. The band can move through any opening large enough for one Medium creature without squeezing.

ecf87017-faeb-5c90-bbb9-29210718b55c.name: Mob Attack
ecf87017-faeb-5c90-bbb9-29210718b55c.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 50 (10d6 + 15) slashing damage  or half damage if the band is bloodied.

006c5145-1ed2-52b4-8474-0b584175c292.name: Amorphous (Horde of Shadows)

07cb4fdd-c9b2-5cbe-97a1-d6df216b63f7.description: The horde is composed of 5 or more shadows. If it is subjected to a spell, attack, or other effect that affects only one target, it takes any damage but ignores other effects. It can share its space with Medium or smaller creatures or objects.

4c2e206e-9bb8-5887-ad8a-8f5a8d1c0183.description: While in sunlight, the horde has disadvantage on attack rolls, ability checks, and saving throws.

14b5f32f-5905-5ca5-807e-ddfa5dfd156d.name: Undead Nature (Horde of Shadows)
14b5f32f-5905-5ca5-807e-ddfa5dfd156d.description: The horde doesnt require air, sustenance, or sleep.

attributes.description: The horde doesnt require air, sustenance, or sleep.

8dcedbe6-ac17-516f-afd2-f2db44728880.name: Claw (Horde of Shadows)
8dcedbe6-ac17-516f-afd2-f2db44728880.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 16 (4d6 + 2) necrotic damage  and the target makes a DC 12 Constitution saving throw. On a failure  the target is cursed until it finishes a short or long rest or is the subject of remove curse or a similar spell. While cursed  the target makes attack rolls  Strength checks  and Strength saving throws with disadvantage. If the target dies while cursed  a new undead shadow rises from the corpse in 1d4 hours  the corpse no longer casts a natural shadow  and the target can't be raised from the dead until the new shadow is destroyed.

93990de3-7f70-555a-9620-e5b6e73ddfd4.name: Hurl Flame (Horned Devil)
93990de3-7f70-555a-9620-e5b6e73ddfd4.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +7 to hit, range 150 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (3d6) fire damage. If the target is an unattended flammable object or a creature  it catches fire  taking 5 (1d10) ongoing fire damage. A creature can use an action to extinguish this fire.

26eeea5f-367f-5787-b78b-d459d2c77523.name: Inferno
26eeea5f-367f-5787-b78b-d459d2c77523.description: The devil waves its fork  igniting a trail of roaring flame. Any creature within 10 feet of the devil makes a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw  taking 49 (14d6) fire damage on a failure or half damage on a success.

36e99bd3-0eb0-5123-816e-6b4f8d9b7d54.name: Multiattack (Horned Devil)
36e99bd3-0eb0-5123-816e-6b4f8d9b7d54.description: The devil makes two attacks with its fork and one with its tail. It can replace any melee attack with Hurl Flame.

b4cf2e4b-f1d6-548c-ac15-b133b855a4f3.name: Pin (Horned Devil)
b4cf2e4b-f1d6-548c-ac15-b133b855a4f3.description: When a creature misses the devil with a melee attack, the devil makes a fork attack against that creature. On a hit, the target is impaled by the fork and grappled (escape DC 17). Until this grapple ends, the devil can't make fork attacks or use Inferno, but the target takes 7 (2d6) piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) fire damage at the beginning of each of its turns.

b4656481-6ae0-59ff-910d-f06a26f1b259.name: Tail (Horned Devil)
b4656481-6ae0-59ff-910d-f06a26f1b259.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (1d10 + 5) piercing damage. If the target is a creature other than an undead or construct  it makes a DC 17 Constitution saving throw. On a failure  it receives an infernal wound and takes 11 (2d10) ongoing piercing damage. Each time the devil hits the wounded target with this attack  the ongoing damage increases by 11 (2d10). A creature can spend an action to make a DC 12 Medicine check  ending the ongoing damage on a success. At least 1 hit point of magical healing also ends the ongoing damage.

52727d40-88a6-5e3e-abf1-02569d2157b3.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day) (Hydra)
52727d40-88a6-5e3e-abf1-02569d2157b3.description: When the hydra fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead. When it does so, its heads lose coordination. It is rattled until the end of its next turn.

ea2c59eb-bad4-5aff-9805-3bd993823831.description: While the hydra has more than one head, it has advantage on Perception checks and on saving throws against being blinded, charmed, deafened, frightened, stunned, and knocked unconscious, and it can't be flanked.

3553bf6c-aa6b-56c7-a2b1-c3a1b5923699.name: Reactive Heads (Hydra)
3553bf6c-aa6b-56c7-a2b1-c3a1b5923699.description: For each head it has, the hydra can take one reaction per round, but not more than one per turn.

53787088-da74-5928-90bd-eb09756dbc49.name: Regenerating Heads
53787088-da74-5928-90bd-eb09756dbc49.description: The hydra has five heads. Whenever the hydra takes 25 or more damage in one turn, one of its heads dies. If all of its heads die, the hydra dies. At the end of its turn, it grows 2 heads for each head that was killed since its last turn, unless it has taken fire damage since its last turn.

cd1284e4-0174-583e-b203-6e85a812c021.name: Toxic Secretions
cd1284e4-0174-583e-b203-6e85a812c021.description: Water within 1 mile of the hydras lair is poisoned. A creature other than the hydra that is immersed in the water or drinks the water makes a DC 17 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, the creature is poisoned for 24 hours. On a success, the creature is immune to this poison for 24 hours.

5fa0b0da-3d69-5d2b-8761-222504e12139.description: The hydra bites once with each of its heads.

attributes.description: The hydra bites once with each of its heads.

84fe94bb-a63f-548d-bb3b-c2a3c787716a.name: Rush
84fe94bb-a63f-548d-bb3b-c2a3c787716a.description: The hydra moves or swims up to half its Speed without provoking opportunity attacks. If this movement would pass through the space of creatures that are not incapacitated or prone, each creature makes a DC 17 Strength saving throw. On a failure, the creature is knocked prone and the hydra can enter its space without treating it as difficult terrain. On a success, the hydra can't enter the creatures space, and the hydras movement ends. If this movement ends while the hydra is sharing a space with a creature, the creature is pushed to the nearest unoccupied space.

When one of the hydras heads is killed while it is grappling a creature, the creature that killed the head can choose one creature to free from the grapple.

8ebf4a56-7447-58aa-8ed5-c3f013593f52.description: When a creature within 60 feet that the devil can see hits it with a ranged attack or includes it in a spells area, the creature makes a DC 16 Constitution saving throw. f0292f4f-5022-5a8a-b669-e58118f7cce0.description: The devil magically creates a wall of ice on a solid surface it can see within 60 feet. The wall is flat  1 foot thick  and can be up to 50 feet long and 15 feet high. The wall lasts for 1 minute or until destroyed. Each 10-foot section has AC 12  30 hit points  vulnerability to fire damage  and immunity to cold  necrotic  poison  and psychic damage.

bff9c136-4d30-518f-a6ea-65f7f7152e49.name: Tunneler
bff9c136-4d30-518f-a6ea-65f7f7152e49.description: The worm can tunnel through earth and solid rock, leaving behind a 10-foot-diameter tunnel.

attributes.description: The worm can tunnel through earth and solid rock, leaving behind a 10-foot-diameter tunnel.

7adf55bb-2cf3-54ad-bd62-13d9f141785c.name: Bite (Ice Worm)
7adf55bb-2cf3-54ad-bd62-13d9f141785c.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +14 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 25 (3d10 + 9) piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature  it makes a DC 19 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure  the target is swallowed. A swallowed creature is blinded and restrained  it has total cover from attacks from outside the worm  and it takes 24 (7d6) acid damage at the start of each of the worms turns.

ba8e907e-580c-5f4c-b33b-60f979fe7a81.name: Tail Stinger
ba8e907e-580c-5f4c-b33b-60f979fe7a81.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +14 to hit, reach 10 ft., one creature. Hit: 19 (3d6 + 9) piercing damage  and the target makes a DC 19 Constitution saving throw  taking 42 (12d6) poison damage on a failed save or half damage on a success.

63388e9d-f678-555a-9f15-04a04380feb8.name: Devils Sight (Imp)
63388e9d-f678-555a-9f15-04a04380feb8.description: The imps darkvision penetrates magical darkness.

be952251-06ef-557b-8a30-d2eb46693f0d.name: Lawful Evil (Imp)
be952251-06ef-557b-8a30-d2eb46693f0d.description: The imp radiates a Lawful and Evil aura.

attributes.description: The imp radiates a Lawful and Evil aura.

d07fa5da-63a1-5048-a7c1-1867a66cf6f2.name: Magic Resistance (Imp)
d07fa5da-63a1-5048-a7c1-1867a66cf6f2.description: The imp has advantage on saving throws against spells and magical effects.

attributes.description: The imp has advantage on saving throws against spells and magical effects.

64a0173f-6648-51ed-bc30-d96223eeaf1d.name: Ventriloquism
64a0173f-6648-51ed-bc30-d96223eeaf1d.description: The imp can perfectly imitate any voice it has heard. It can make its voice appear to originate from any point within 30 feet.

attributes.description: The imp can perfectly imitate any voice it has heard. It can make its voice appear to originate from any point within 30 feet.

aae5f020-1129-54b9-92c4-8de0a734a496.name: Invisibility (Imp)
aae5f020-1129-54b9-92c4-8de0a734a496.description: The imp magically turns invisible, along with any equipment carried. This invisibility ends if the imp makes an attack, falls unconscious, or dismisses the effect.

attributes.description: The imp magically turns invisible, along with any equipment carried. This invisibility ends if the imp makes an attack, falls unconscious, or dismisses the effect.

a77b2b14-73be-5b00-96be-f8cb977464fd.name: Shapeshift (Imp)
a77b2b14-73be-5b00-96be-f8cb977464fd.description: The imp magically changes its form into a rat (speed 20 ft.)  raven (20 ft.  fly 60 ft.)  or spider (20 ft.  climb 20 ft.) or back into its true form. Its statistics are the same in each form except for its movement speeds. Equipment it carries is not transformed. It reverts to its true form if it dies.

f615d435-96d7-5f95-bfb5-af5816433f5b.name: Sting (Bite While Shapeshifted)
f615d435-96d7-5f95-bfb5-af5816433f5b.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) poison damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) poison damage.

3b4ac1c6-089e-5814-9778-e7bd6340a34c.name: Familiar
3b4ac1c6-089e-5814-9778-e7bd6340a34c.description: The imp can communicate telepathically with its master while they are within 1 mile of each other. When the imp is within 10 feet of its master, its master shares its Magic Resistance trait.

attributes.description: The imp can communicate telepathically with its master while they are within 1 mile of each other. When the imp is within 10 feet of its master, its master shares its Magic Resistance trait.

d2561d20-efb0-5caa-8024-a9679b777f9e.name: Body Thief
d2561d20-efb0-5caa-8024-a9679b777f9e.description: The intellect devourer enters the nose and mouth of an incapacitated humanoid within 5 feet. The target must be Small or larger  have a brain  and have an Intelligence of 4 or higher. The intellect devourer eats the targets brain and takes control of the target. The intellect devourer leaves the body if the target is reduced to 0 hit points  if the target is affected by dispel evil and good or another effect that ends possession  or voluntarily as a bonus action. A creature killed by the intellect devourer can be restored to life by resurrection or similar magic.

The target must be Small or larger  have a brain  and have an Intelligence of 4 or higher. The intellect devourer eats the targets brain and takes control of the target. The intellect devourer leaves the body if the target is reduced to 0 hit points  if the target is affected by dispel evil and good or another effect that ends possession  or voluntarily as a bonus action. A creature killed by the intellect devourer can be restored to life by resurrection or similar magic.

6abbd6b8-1a1c-5088-b405-f9f6399121ee.name: Ego Whip
6abbd6b8-1a1c-5088-b405-f9f6399121ee.description: The intellect devourer targets a creature with a brain within 60 feet. The target makes a DC 13 Intelligence saving throw. On a failure  it takes 14 (4d6) psychic damage and is rattled for 1 minute. If it is already rattled by Ego Whip  it is also stunned. The target repeats the saving throw at the end of each of its turns  ending both effects on a success.

14eced42-db54-5f39-9f61-77a96ed7e5a8.name: Elemental Nature (Invisible Stalker)
14eced42-db54-5f39-9f61-77a96ed7e5a8.description: An invisible stalker doesnt require air, sustenance, or sleep.

attributes.description: An invisible stalker doesnt require air, sustenance, or sleep.

f84ab091-1d81-59d8-9e78-9fa615ab04c5.name: Invisibility
f84ab091-1d81-59d8-9e78-9fa615ab04c5.description: The stalker is invisible. Creatures that see invisible creatures see the stalker as a vague humanoid outline.

attributes.description: The stalker is invisible. Creatures that see invisible creatures see the stalker as a vague humanoid outline.

778883fc-cf95-5873-9044-9caa2809e3af.name: Wind Tracker
778883fc-cf95-5873-9044-9caa2809e3af.description: If given a quarry by a summoner, the stalker knows the direction and distance to the quarry as long as they are on the same plane of existence and not sealed from each other by a barrier that doesnt allow air to pass.

attributes.description: If given a quarry by a summoner, the stalker knows the direction and distance to the quarry as long as they are on the same plane of existence and not sealed from each other by a barrier that doesnt allow air to pass.

7df02a91-7204-52ec-a594-c0433a350c62.name: Gust (Invisible Stalker)
7df02a91-7204-52ec-a594-c0433a350c62.description: The stalker briefly turns into a gust of wind and moves up to its Speed without provoking opportunity attacks. It is able to pass through an opening as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

attributes.description: The stalker briefly turns into a gust of wind and moves up to its Speed without provoking opportunity attacks. It is able to pass through an opening as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

04f29a0d-bfee-5a01-b920-4f2bbbebda75.name: Multiattack (Invisible Stalker)
04f29a0d-bfee-5a01-b920-4f2bbbebda75.description: The stalker makes two melee attacks.

f7a092af-5f0a-5955-acc5-fa590770722b.name: Slam (Invisible Stalker)
f7a092af-5f0a-5955-acc5-fa590770722b.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d8 + 3) bludgeoning damage. On a critical hit  the target is pushed up to 15 feet and knocked prone.

6cc84096-6689-50ea-b729-c089c75f7bcb.description: When the guardian is subjected to fire damage, it instead regains hit points equal to the fire damage dealt.

attributes.description: When the guardian is subjected to fire damage, it instead regains hit points equal to the fire damage dealt.

d82ef73c-8244-5393-b1e6-18d4c3f0863d.name: Deflection
d82ef73c-8244-5393-b1e6-18d4c3f0863d.description: When missed by a ranged attack by a creature the guardian can see, the guardian redirects the attack against a creature within 60 feet that it can see. The original attacker must reroll the attack against the new target.

d9789a9a-fb13-5d8f-b6c7-fe16f38fa00b.name: Multiattack (Iron Guardian)
d9789a9a-fb13-5d8f-b6c7-fe16f38fa00b.description: The guardian makes two sword attacks.

cd203cbb-1f1d-5d62-9bea-a6736c380309.name: Poison Breath (Iron Guardian)
cd203cbb-1f1d-5d62-9bea-a6736c380309.description: The guardian exhales poisonous gas in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in the area makes a DC 18 Constitution saving throw  taking 45 (10d8) poison damage on a failure or half damage on a success.

attributes.description: The guardian exhales poisonous gas in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in the area makes a DC 18 Constitution saving throw  taking 45 (10d8) poison damage on a failure or half damage on a success.

ba93a1ec-e074-5088-a876-c6109f706e93.name: Sword
ba93a1ec-e074-5088-a876-c6109f706e93.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 29 (4d10 + 7) slashing damage.

0e191f55-671a-5ac7-b2eb-26c656f551c2.name: Keen Hearing and Smell (Jackal)
0e191f55-671a-5ac7-b2eb-26c656f551c2.description: The jackal has advantage on Perception checks that rely on hearing and smell.

e8c75533-6ad5-5c84-a562-7776d9d848b6.description: If the jackalope is subjected to an effect that allows it to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, the jackalope instead takes no damage if it succeeds on the saving throw, and only half damage if it fails.

16233ae7-e2bb-5ff4-9a9d-fdd69562ec67.description: The jackalope can imitate sounds it hears frequently, such as a simple phrase or an animal noise. Recognizing the sounds as imitation requires a DC 14 Insight check.

d8f0c1ed-5137-5160-84c6-c2148a93cfe7.name: Gore (Jackalope)
d8f0c1ed-5137-5160-84c6-c2148a93cfe7.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8+4) piercing damage. If the jackalope moves at least 20 feet straight towards the target before the attack  the attack deals an extra 7 (2d6) piercing damage.

46ffe269-aabc-5aa7-997e-0f613388777b.description: When an attacker the jackalope can see hits it with an attack, the jackalope halves the attacks damage against it.

1c6a55f0-7be5-53b2-93a3-4fa0d594ea1e.name: Chaotic Evil (Jackalwere)
1c6a55f0-7be5-53b2-93a3-4fa0d594ea1e.description: The jackalwere radiates a Chaotic and Evil aura.

d4cc9237-9727-5212-a55d-adc49a3b941b.name: Keen Hearing and Smell (Jackalwere)

888f6eda-35da-5314-989f-6860049fc586.name: Pack Tactics (Jackalwere)
888f6eda-35da-5314-989f-6860049fc586.description: The jackalwere has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of the jackalweres allies is within 5 feet of the creature and not incapacitated.

attributes.description: The jackalwere has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of the jackalweres allies is within 5 feet of the creature and not incapacitated.

af9a832b-8dfe-5600-bc44-6726f7374f23.name: Truth Aversion
af9a832b-8dfe-5600-bc44-6726f7374f23.description: The jackalwere must succeed on a DC 14 Wisdom saving throw to make a true statement. On a failure, it tells an unpremeditated lie.

attributes.description: The jackalwere must succeed on a DC 14 Wisdom saving throw to make a true statement. On a failure, it tells an unpremeditated lie.

00cf7f58-f998-52aa-8caf-a4097dd490d0.name: Combat
00cf7f58-f998-52aa-8caf-a4097dd490d0.description:
The jackalwere shifts to hybrid form and uses Sleep Gaze on an unsuspecting target.
It then fights with its scimitar, staying next to at least one ally. A jackalwere is fearless when facing enemies armed with mundane weapons, but it retreats if it is outnumbered by enemies capable of bypassing its resistances.

It then fights with its scimitar, staying next to at least one ally. A jackalwere is fearless when facing enemies armed with mundane weapons, but it retreats if it is outnumbered by enemies capable of bypassing its resistances.

c4fe6dde-8897-5f1c-93ee-7b2a0b1c7fe2.name: Shapeshift (Jackalwere)
c4fe6dde-8897-5f1c-93ee-7b2a0b1c7fe2.description: The jackalwere magically changes its form, along with its equipment, to that of a specific Medium humanoid or a jackal-human hybrid or its true form, which is a Small jackal. While shapeshifted, its statistics are otherwise unchanged. It reverts to its true form if it dies.

attributes.description: The jackalwere magically changes its form, along with its equipment, to that of a specific Medium humanoid or a jackal-human hybrid or its true form, which is a Small jackal. While shapeshifted, its statistics are otherwise unchanged. It reverts to its true form if it dies.

cf94ee83-a6cb-5554-a3e6-4f0de206bc3f.name: Sleep Gaze
cf94ee83-a6cb-5554-a3e6-4f0de206bc3f.description: One creature within 30 feet of the jackalwere makes a DC 10 Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save  the target is magically charmed. At the beginning of the jackalweres next turn  the target repeats the saving throw. On a success  the effect ends. On a failure  the creature falls unconscious for 10 minutes. Both the charmed and unconscious conditions end if the target takes damage or a creature within reach of the target uses an action to shake the target back to its senses. If the target successfully saves against Sleep Gaze  it is immune to Sleep Gaze for 24 hours. Undead and creatures immune to charm arent affected by it.

7c71d416-c0d8-5992-bd66-d734bbaa008c.name: Multiattack (Jackalwere Pack Leader)

bd688f9a-03d4-5759-a296-5c2d368a35bb.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (2d6 + 2) slashing damage.

f84bb61d-5f6e-5627-b2d3-51774aaa86d1.description: The kech moves up to half its Speed without provoking opportunity attacks. It can then attempt to hide.

d686f794-0a91-5c7c-bf6c-c2c04b311da4.name: Strangle (Kech)
d686f794-0a91-5c7c-bf6c-c2c04b311da4.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 10 ft., one Medium or smaller creature that is surprised  grappled by the kech  or that can't see the kech. Hit: 9 (2d6 + 2) bludgeoning damage  and the target is pulled 5 feet towards the kech and grappled (escape DC 12). Until this grapple ends  the kech automatically hits with the Strangle attack and the target can't breathe.

3ebd9ce6-bd83-5654-bb12-dce0c9e1f9ec.description: The khalkos can detect the presence of creatures within 30 feet that have an alignment trait, and knows the alignment of such creatures.

d91a36ac-0d85-571d-baa1-38f5bd001ca8.description: The khalkoss spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save DC 16). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no components:

a6e1627d-6068-54e9-9514-c51b92b4f575.name: Brain Jab
a6e1627d-6068-54e9-9514-c51b92b4f575.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one incapacitated creature with a brain and an Intelligence of 6 or higher. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) piercing damage, and the target becomes diseased with brain larvae. Once the khalkos has used this attack successfully, it can't use it again for 24 hours.

4e0721f8-9adb-50a0-8f6d-e67df12e74fc.name: Chaos Pheromones
4e0721f8-9adb-50a0-8f6d-e67df12e74fc.description: The khalkos emits a cloud of pheromones in a 20-foot radius. The cloud spreads around corners. Each non-khalkos creature in the area makes a DC 14 Intelligence saving throw. Creatures with an alignment trait make this save with disadvantage. On a failure  the creature is confused for 1 minute. It repeats the saving throw at the end of each of its turns  ending the effect on itself on a success. If the creature makes its saving throw or the condition ends for it  it is immune to Chaos Pheromones for the next 24 hours.

14c4b743-dcbe-50c8-9f44-753205f137f1.description: When the khalkos is hit by an attack made by a creature that it can see or sense with its Detect Alignment trait, it gains a +4 bonus to AC against the triggering attack.

743345d4-c53e-5021-b680-d992f24184be.name: Chaos Pheromones (Khalkos Spawn)
743345d4-c53e-5021-b680-d992f24184be.description: The khalkos emits a cloud of pheromones into the air in a 10-foot radius. The cloud spreads around corners. Each non-khalkos creature in the area makes a DC 12 Intelligence saving throw. On a failure  the creature is confused for 1 minute. It repeats the saving throw at the end of each of its turns  ending the effect on itself on a success. If the creature makes its saving throw or the condition ends for it  it is immune to the chaos pheromones of khalkos spawn for the next 24 hours.

Until this grapple ends  the whale can't bite another target and it has advantage on bite attacks against the creature it is grappling.

85a67846-eb19-5e05-b1fe-1111beab61a5.name: Innate Spellcasting (King Fomor)
85a67846-eb19-5e05-b1fe-1111beab61a5.description:
The empyreans innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 23). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

- **At Will:** Charm Person, Command, Telekinesis
- **3/Day**: flame strike, Hold Monster, Lightning Bolt
- **1/Day** Commune, Greater Restoration, Heroes Feast, Plane Shift (self only, can't travel to or from the Material Plane)

fc9b9d62-d255-57a6-8aee-9c9555ad308a.name: Burning Gaze
fc9b9d62-d255-57a6-8aee-9c9555ad308a.description: A line of fire 5 feet wide and 60 feet long blasts from King Fomors eye. Each creature in the area makes a DC 23 Constitution saving throw, taking 35 (10d6) fire damage and 35 (10d6) radiant damage on a failure or half damage on a success. When King Fomor is bloodied, his Burning Gazes shape is a 60-foot cone instead of a line.

7b2fd2a3-b819-525f-8b77-173ae1543266.description: King Fomor ends one negative effect currently affecting him. He can do so as long as he has at least 1 hit point, even while unconscious or incapacitated.

02c85880-d2b5-5a33-b86c-1d8fc5969be4.description: The knight inspires creatures of their choice within 30 feet that can hear and understand them. For the next minute inspired creatures gain an expertise die (1d4) on attack rolls and saving throws. A creature can benefit from only one Knightly Inspiration at a time and the knight cannot target themselves.

998787f2-7ea8-58d6-bd3d-47a22651f432.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d12 + 3) piercing damage. If the knight moves at least 20 feet straight towards the target before the attack  they deal an extra 6 (1d12) piercing damage and the target makes a DC 13 Strength saving throw falling prone on a failure. This attack is made at disadvantage against targets within 5 feet.

4dc466f6-0f25-5af7-a042-b4cd9a688d41.name: Bite (Kraken)
4dc466f6-0f25-5af7-a042-b4cd9a688d41.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +18 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 36 (4d12 + 10) piercing damage. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature grappled by the kraken  the target is swallowed. A swallowed creature is blinded and restrained  its Speed is 0  it has total cover from attacks from outside the kraken  and it takes 42 (12d6) acid damage at the start of each of the krakens turns.

The kraken uses Fling.

1687d9ff-3d2a-557a-8099-9b11653f7d54.name: Ink Cloud (Kraken)
1687d9ff-3d2a-557a-8099-9b11653f7d54.description: While underwater  the kraken exudes a cloud of ink in a 90-foot-radius sphere. The ink extends around corners  and the area is heavily obscured until the end of the krakens next turn or until a strong current dissipates the cloud. Each non-kraken creature in the area when the cloud appears makes a DC 24 Constitution saving throw. On a failure  it takes 27 (5d10) poison damage and is poisoned for 1 minute. On a success  it takes half damage. A poisoned creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns. ending the effect on a success.

4d554340-841e-59d4-bb16-a9813687170a.name: Lightning
4d554340-841e-59d4-bb16-a9813687170a.description: If the kraken is outside and the weather is stormy  three lightning bolts crack down from the sky  each of which strikes a different target within 120 feet of the kraken. A target makes a DC 24 Dexterity saving throw  taking 28 (8d6) lightning damage or half damage on a save.

During this movement, it can fit through gaps as narrow as 10 feet wide without squeezing.

The band can move through any opening large enough for one Medium creature without squeezing.

fd6aafcd-3a50-5768-9f10-161b915caf26.name: Band Dispersal (Lemure Band)
fd6aafcd-3a50-5768-9f10-161b915caf26.description: When the band is reduced to 0 hit points, it turns into 2 (1d4) lemures with 6 hit points each.

attributes.description: When the band is reduced to 0 hit points, it turns into 2 (1d4) lemures with 6 hit points each.

b2d0c7b3-3a8c-52f5-8974-586fb70c922e.name: Devils Sight (Lemure Band)
b2d0c7b3-3a8c-52f5-8974-586fb70c922e.description: The bands darkvision penetrates magical darkness.

attributes.description: The bands darkvision penetrates magical darkness.

2e2f325b-4638-5d9d-8a68-5178b315e8df.name: Eerie Groan (Lemure Band)
2e2f325b-4638-5d9d-8a68-5178b315e8df.description: While the band can see a non-devil within 100 feet, it emits a groan that is audible within 300 feet.

attributes.description: While the band can see a non-devil within 100 feet, it emits a groan that is audible within 300 feet.

a22cc8fe-22c9-590e-b167-2c68ff693c34.name: Lawful Evil (Lemure Band)
a22cc8fe-22c9-590e-b167-2c68ff693c34.description: The band radiates a Lawful and Evil aura.

attributes.description: The band radiates a Lawful and Evil aura.

a0b23769-ee8e-5b0d-97ef-940b9bfac346.name: Fists (Lemure Band)
a0b23769-ee8e-5b0d-97ef-940b9bfac346.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (5d4) bludgeoning damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (5d4) bludgeoning damage.

a33bd945-9047-5200-a228-e409f9f619e6.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day) (Lich)
a33bd945-9047-5200-a228-e409f9f619e6.description: The lichs body or vestments are warded with three protective runes. When the lich fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead. When it does so, one of its protective runes disappears.

attributes.description: The lichs body or vestments are warded with three protective runes. When the lich fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead. When it does so, one of its protective runes disappears.

c6a9bd7a-3acc-56a7-8f14-0f8cf6855b9e.name: Rejuvenation (Lich)
c6a9bd7a-3acc-56a7-8f14-0f8cf6855b9e.description: If it has a soul vessel, a destroyed lich gains a new body in 1d10 days, regaining all its hit points. The new body forms within 10 feet of the soul vessel.

attributes.description: If it has a soul vessel, a destroyed lich gains a new body in 1d10 days, regaining all its hit points. The new body forms within 10 feet of the soul vessel.

49ec5253-75f0-5087-bc34-bb9384340992.name: Spellcasting (Lich)
49ec5253-75f0-5087-bc34-bb9384340992.description:
The lich is a 16th level spellcaster. Its spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save DC 20 +12 to hit with spell attacks). The lich has the following wizard spells prepared:

- **Cantrips** (at will): Fire Bolt, Mage Hand, Prestidigitation
- **1st-Level** (4 slots): Detect Magic, Shield, Silent Image, Thunderwave
- **2nd-Level** (3 slots): Blur, Detect Thoughts, Locate Object
- **3rd-Level** (3 slots): Animate Dead, Dispel Magic, Fireball
- **4th-Level** (3 slots): Confusion, Dimension Door
- **5th-Level** (2 slots): Geas, Scrying
- **6th-Level** (1 slot): Create Undead, Disintegrate
- **7th-Level** (1 slot): Finger of Death, Teleport, 8th-level (1 slot): Power Word Stun

- **6th-Level** (1 slot): Create Undead, Disintegrate
- **7th-Level** (1 slot): Finger of Death, Teleport, 8th-level (1 slot): Power Word Stun

5ccb7227-f4e8-524f-93b8-5936ce9dd700.name: Tongueless Utterance
5ccb7227-f4e8-524f-93b8-5936ce9dd700.description: Unless a spell has only a vocal component, the lich can cast the spell without providing a vocal component.

attributes.description: Unless a spell has only a vocal component, the lich can cast the spell without providing a vocal component.

c63cfe54-6294-53c6-8ca1-2998af04d89a.name: Turn Resistance
c63cfe54-6294-53c6-8ca1-2998af04d89a.description: The lich has advantage on saving throws against any effect that turns undead.

attributes.description: The lich has advantage on saving throws against any effect that turns undead.

4f2631ad-2913-5e15-b090-e430c81da800.name: Undead Nature (Lich)
4f2631ad-2913-5e15-b090-e430c81da800.description: A lich doesnt require air, sustenance, or sleep.

attributes.description: A lich doesnt require air, sustenance, or sleep.
The lich uses Arc Lightning.

3c5757f1-3e0d-5cb0-86a9-cc32087adb2e.name: Blur
3c5757f1-3e0d-5cb0-86a9-cc32087adb2e.description: (2nd-Level; V, Concentration) The lichs form is blurred. Attack rolls against it are made with disadvantage unless the attacker has senses that allow them to perceive without sight or to see through illusions (like blindsight or truesight).

attributes.description: (2nd-Level; V, Concentration) The lichs form is blurred. Attack rolls against it are made with disadvantage unless the attacker has senses that allow them to perceive without sight or to see through illusions (like blindsight or truesight).

3ff3c286-07d6-520f-9cf5-133cd63994aa.name: Cast Spell (Lich)
3ff3c286-07d6-520f-9cf5-133cd63994aa.description: The lich casts cantrip or a 1st-level spell. The lich can use 2 legendary actions to cast a 2nd-level spell or 3 legendary actions to cast a 3rd-level spell.

attributes.description: The lich casts cantrip or a 1st-level spell. The lich can use 2 legendary actions to cast a 2nd-level spell or 3 legendary actions to cast a 3rd-level spell.

58c7e57c-ed88-5cd9-904b-9124115b8e00.name: Confusion (Lich)
58c7e57c-ed88-5cd9-904b-9124115b8e00.description: (4th-Level; S, M, Concentration) Each creature within 10 feet of a point the lich can see within 120 feet makes a DC 20 Wisdom saving throw  becoming rattled until the end of its next turn on a success. On a failure  a creature is confused for 1 minute and can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns  ending the effect on itself on a success.

attributes.description: (4th-Level; S, M, Concentration) Each creature within 10 feet of a point the lich can see within 120 feet makes a DC 20 Wisdom saving throw  becoming rattled until the end of its next turn on a success. On a failure  a creature is confused for 1 minute and can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns  ending the effect on itself on a success.

7e812678-a46c-56fd-8d7e-1dd6d3301d83.name: Death Aura
7e812678-a46c-56fd-8d7e-1dd6d3301d83.description: The aura casts purple light. Each living creature that ends its turn inside the aura takes 17 (5d6) necrotic damage, and the lich regains the same number of hit points.

attributes.description: The aura casts purple light. Each living creature that ends its turn inside the aura takes 17 (5d6) necrotic damage, and the lich regains the same number of hit points.

9df22a4c-e150-5e58-af54-581194ce6186.name: Disintegrate
9df22a4c-e150-5e58-af54-581194ce6186.description: (6th-Level; S, M) The lich disintegrates a target within 60 feet. A Large or smaller nonmagical object or creation of magical force  or a 10-foot-cube section thereof  is automatically destroyed. A creature makes a DC 20 Dexterity saving throw  taking 75 (10d6 + 40) force damage on a failed save. If reduced to 0 hit points  the creature and its nonmagical gear are disintegrated  and the creature can be restored to life only with true resurrection or wish.

attributes.description: (6th-Level; S, M) The lich disintegrates a target within 60 feet. A Large or smaller nonmagical object or creation of magical force  or a 10-foot-cube section thereof  is automatically destroyed. A creature makes a DC 20 Dexterity saving throw  taking 75 (10d6 + 40) force damage on a failed save. If reduced to 0 hit points  the creature and its nonmagical gear are disintegrated  and the creature can be restored to life only with true resurrection or wish.

a3824dcc-6425-523a-b8db-6d92ea8fcdf0.name: Eldritch Aura
a3824dcc-6425-523a-b8db-6d92ea8fcdf0.description: The lich surrounds itself with a magical, rune-covered, glowing, translucent aura in a 10-foot radius. The aura moves with the lich and casts dim light inside its area. The aura disappears at the beginning of the lichs next turn.

attributes.description: The lich surrounds itself with a magical, rune-covered, glowing, translucent aura in a 10-foot radius. The aura moves with the lich and casts dim light inside its area. The aura disappears at the beginning of the lichs next turn.

189abb37-e021-57ac-b8a5-b5e79bf8a5fb.name: Finger of Death
189abb37-e021-57ac-b8a5-b5e79bf8a5fb.description: (7th-Level; S) A creature within 60 feet makes a DC 20 Constitution saving throw  taking 61 (7d8 + 30) necrotic damage on a failed saving throw or half damage on a success. A humanoid killed by this spell turns into a zombie under the lichs control at the start of the lichs next turn.

attributes.description: (7th-Level; S) A creature within 60 feet makes a DC 20 Constitution saving throw  taking 61 (7d8 + 30) necrotic damage on a failed saving throw or half damage on a success. A humanoid killed by this spell turns into a zombie under the lichs control at the start of the lichs next turn.

21afee2c-db9d-570c-b5a6-e2334c7eba3d.name: Fire Bolt (Lich)
21afee2c-db9d-570c-b5a6-e2334c7eba3d.description: (Cantrip; S) Ranged Spell Attack: +12 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. Hit: 16 (3d10) fire damage.

attributes.description: (Cantrip; S) Ranged Spell Attack: +12 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. Hit: 16 (3d10) fire damage.

79f30524-6bfc-5acb-bdef-353dd9d229c0.name: Fireball (Lich)
79f30524-6bfc-5acb-bdef-353dd9d229c0.description: (3rd-Level; S, M) Fire streaks from the lich to a point within 120 feet and explodes in a 20-foot radius  spreading around corners. Each creature in the area makes a DC 20 Dexterity saving throw  taking 21 (6d6) fire damage on a failed save or half damage on a success.

attributes.description: (3rd-Level; S, M) Fire streaks from the lich to a point within 120 feet and explodes in a 20-foot radius  spreading around corners. Each creature in the area makes a DC 20 Dexterity saving throw  taking 21 (6d6) fire damage on a failed save or half damage on a success.
The lich uses Paralyzing Touch.

9d66b4b1-6660-5d04-978b-0251fa676d22.name: Power Word Stun (Lich)
9d66b4b1-6660-5d04-978b-0251fa676d22.description: (8th-Level; V) The lich targets a creature within 60 feet. If the target has more than 150 hit points  it is rattled until the end of its next turn. Otherwise  it is stunned. It can make a DC 20 Constitution saving throw at the end of each of its turns  ending the effect on a success.

attributes.description: (8th-Level; V) The lich targets a creature within 60 feet. If the target has more than 150 hit points  it is rattled until the end of its next turn. Otherwise  it is stunned. It can make a DC 20 Constitution saving throw at the end of each of its turns  ending the effect on a success.

8635cffa-feab-5b0a-a379-78821d24c2bd.name: Sabotage Spell
8635cffa-feab-5b0a-a379-78821d24c2bd.description: When a creature within 60 feet casts a spell that targets the lich, the lich attempts to interrupt it. The lich makes an Intelligence check against a DC of 10 + the spells level. On a success, the spell fails, and the caster takes 10 (3d6) necrotic damage.

708b62be-e028-5109-8c7f-a17e475fac73.name: Shield (Lich)
708b62be-e028-5109-8c7f-a17e475fac73.description: (1st-Level; V) When the lich is hit by an attack or targeted by magic missile, it gains a +5 bonus to AC (including against the triggering attack) and immunity to magic missile. These benefits last until the beginning of its next turn.

attributes.description: (1st-Level; V) When the lich is hit by an attack or targeted by magic missile, it gains a +5 bonus to AC (including against the triggering attack) and immunity to magic missile. These benefits last until the beginning of its next turn.

a53b89b3-d0e7-5a9f-af2b-0606a4687dac.name: Shield Aura
a53b89b3-d0e7-5a9f-af2b-0606a4687dac.description: The aura casts orange light. It has 35 hit points. Whenever the lich would take damage, the aura takes the damage instead, and the aura visibly weakens. If the damage reduces the aura to 0 hit points, the aura disappears, and the lich takes any excess damage.

attributes.description: The aura casts orange light. It has 35 hit points. Whenever the lich would take damage, the aura takes the damage instead, and the aura visibly weakens. If the damage reduces the aura to 0 hit points, the aura disappears, and the lich takes any excess damage.

60f6661e-86aa-511c-97ff-95bf34ba5516.name: Spell Shield Aura
60f6661e-86aa-511c-97ff-95bf34ba5516.description: The aura casts blue light. Any spell cast with a 5th-level or lower spell slot from outside the aura can't affect anything inside the aura. Using a spell to target something inside the aura or include the auras space in an area has no effect on anything inside.

attributes.description: The aura casts blue light. Any spell cast with a 5th-level or lower spell slot from outside the aura can't affect anything inside the aura. Using a spell to target something inside the aura or include the auras space in an area has no effect on anything inside.

5da6392d-7fe7-5ecc-8396-3aa82c8f9d8a.name: Thunderwave (Lich)
5da6392d-7fe7-5ecc-8396-3aa82c8f9d8a.description: (1st-Level; S) Thunder rolls from the lich in a 15-foot cube. Each creature in the area makes a DC 20 Constitution saving throw. On a failure  a creature takes 9 (2d8) thunder damage and is pushed 10 feet from the lich. On a success  a creature takes half damage and is not pushed.

attributes.description: (1st-Level; S) Thunder rolls from the lich in a 15-foot cube. Each creature in the area makes a DC 20 Constitution saving throw. 4869791a-f24c-5eb7-affd-39de6bcc56cb.name: Keen Smell (Lion)
4869791a-f24c-5eb7-affd-39de6bcc56cb.description: The lion has advantage on Perception checks that rely on smell.

attributes.description: The lion has advantage on Perception checks that rely on smell.

5e17a25b-98cf-5889-a514-ece60e4389b4.name: Long Jump
5e17a25b-98cf-5889-a514-ece60e4389b4.description: The lion can long jump up to 25 feet.

attributes.description: The lion can long jump up to 25 feet.

e0003710-a12b-509a-b743-4ccc84f25507.name: Pack Tactics (Lion)
e0003710-a12b-509a-b743-4ccc84f25507.description: The lion has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of the lions allies is within 5 feet of the creature and not incapacitated.

attributes.description: The lion has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of the lions allies is within 5 feet of the creature and not incapacitated.

4667eb0f-9301-5d57-875c-65f541ab791a.name: Bite (Lion)
4667eb0f-9301-5d57-875c-65f541ab791a.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d10+3) piercing damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d10+3) piercing damage.

0c2d8bd4-8e88-5180-afea-24f8166d8e27.name: Claws (Lion)
0c2d8bd4-8e88-5180-afea-24f8166d8e27.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8+3) slashing damage. If the lion moves at least 20 feet straight towards the target before the attack  the target makes a DC 13 Strength saving throw  falling prone on a failure.

6213f379-b826-57b9-872a-79937e4cde8f.name: Opportune Bite (Lion)
6213f379-b826-57b9-872a-79937e4cde8f.description: The lion makes a bite attack against a prone creature.

07c4ecfb-3e84-53a3-8ca0-ca24380cf405.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +0 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1 piercing damage. If this damage would reduce a Small or larger target to 0 hit points  the target takes no damage from this attack.

73848713-0efe-5fb0-b62f-7fd070dc8e9c.name: Hold Breath (Lizardfolk)
73848713-0efe-5fb0-b62f-7fd070dc8e9c.description: The lizardfolk can hold its breath for 15 minutes.

405f81d5-b0f2-5087-9f1f-c485e8b0a956.description: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage.

attributes.description: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage.

bc9c759e-324a-5639-baf9-6443fa2c8f6c.name: Multiattack (Lizardfolk)
bc9c759e-324a-5639-baf9-6443fa2c8f6c.description: The lizardfolk attacks with its club and shield.

attributes.description: The lizardfolk attacks with its club and shield.

9a6f7f9f-e2f9-528a-8db5-be18468de699.name: Aligned (Lizardfolk Chosen One)
9a6f7f9f-e2f9-528a-8db5-be18468de699.description: The lizardfolk radiates either an Evil or Good aura.

attributes.description: The lizardfolk radiates either an Evil or Good aura.

f97740ef-f420-53c7-b24c-5bafd9735170.name: Multiattack (Lizardfolk Chosen One)
f97740ef-f420-53c7-b24c-5bafd9735170.description: The lizardfolk attacks once with its shield and twice with its trident.

cc1cf3ae-fcd4-5616-9197-735e9aeeffe1.name: Shield (Lizardfolk Chosen One)
cc1cf3ae-fcd4-5616-9197-735e9aeeffe1.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) bludgeoning damage  and the target makes a DC 13 Strength check. On a failure  it is knocked prone.
